data.jd_text:
**Job Title:**
**Project Engineering & Delivery Manager**
**Experience Required:**
Minimum 10 years
  
  
**Location:**
Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
  
  
**Employment Type:**
Full-time
  
  
**Job Summary**
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced
**Project Engineering & Delivery Manager**
specializing in
**SCADA (Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition), DMS (Distribution Management System), and EMS (Energy Management System)**
. The Project Engineering & Delivery Manager is responsible for leading both the technical engineering aspects and overall delivery of complex projects. This role combines strong engineering expertise with delivery management to ensure projects are executed with technical accuracy, delivered on time, within budget, and meet customer expectations. The position requires leadership, cross-functional collaboration, and strong client engagement skills.
  
  
The Project Engineering & Delivery Manager cultivates relationships with a portfolio of customers in both Pre-sales and project delivery phases and provides objective advice and assistance on the strategy, structure, management and operations of a customer organization, in support of identified business purposes and objectives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage engineering, design, integration, implementation and delivery of SCADA, DMS, and EMS projects from inception to delivery.
* Coordinate with clients, stakeholders, and internal teams to understand requirements, scope, and project deliverables.
* Prepare detailed project plans, schedules, and resource allocation to meet deadlines and budgets.
* Oversee system architecture, hardware, and software integration ensuring compliance with industry standards and safety regulations.
* Monitor and control project progress, conduct risk assessments, and implement mitigation strategies.
* Perform design reviews, troubleshooting, and root cause analysis for technical issues.
* Ensure quality assurance and testing protocols are followed during deployment phases.
* Mentor and guide a team of engineers, providing technical direction and fostering skill development.
* Manage documentation including design reports, test plans, project reports, and client communications.
* Support commissioning, training, and post-deployment troubleshooting.
* Drive process improvements and innovation by staying updated on the latest technologies and industry trends.
* Respond to all client inquiries, bugs, and product ideas for in-flight projects and file tickets for the OEM/Partners.
* Perform use case and client specific testing runs and lead factory and site acceptance testing.
* Report on project outcomes and present findings to project partners and stakeholders

**Additional Responsibilities**

* Technical Leadership of the delivery and implementation of large complex solutions.
* Analyse, define and prioritize Business and Functional requirements and processes and propose technical solutions to meet the business issues and close inefficiency gaps.
* Responsibility for the Business requirements through the entire lifecycle of the project from definition, implementation, test and delivery.
* Create and maintain relationships with key decision makers, stakeholders and 3rd Parties.
* Participate & lead technical requirements workshops.
* Prepare Technical Solutions for Utility Tenders.
* Write and present technical proposals and presentations.
* Ability to take ownership of issues and get them resolved using self-driven initiative

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, or related Engineering discipline.
* Minimum 10 years of experience in engineering management for SCADA, DMS, EMS, or similar utility automation systems.
* Proven experience in large-scale power grid projects or distribution network automation.
* Strong knowledge of protocols such as IEC 104, IEC 61850, Modbus, DNP3, OPC, etc.
* Experience with network architecture, cybersecurity best practices, and data communication systems.
* Proficiency in system simulation tools and project management software (MS Project, Primavera, etc.).
* Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and decision-making skills.
* Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal abilities.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously.
* Willingness to travel and work on-site at project locations.

**Preferred Skills**

* Utility integration experience (E.g. SCADA, ADMS, OT, OMS etc.).
* DevOps hands on experience.
* Cybersecurity hands on experience
* Familiarity with regulatory standards and safety compliance requirements.
* Ability to work with cross-cultural teams and diverse stakeholders.

data.title: Senior Director - Project Management Sports Bu - Interface SPA 250
data.raw_snippet: Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking an experienced and dynamic Senior Director - Project Management, Sports BU - Interface to lead and oversee the successful delivery of sports-related projects within the organization. This critical leadership role involves managing complex interfaces between vari
data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking an experienced and dynamic Senior Director - Project Management, Sports BU - Interface to lead and oversee the successful delivery of sports-related projects within the organization. This critical leadership role involves managing complex interfaces between various project teams, stakeholders, and business units to ensure seamless execution and integration of sports infrastructure and facilities.
  
  
The Senior Director will be responsible for driving strategic project management initiatives, coordinating cross-functional teams, mitigating risks, and ensuring that all sports projects meet Qiddiya's quality, cost, and schedule objectives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage the Project Management function for the Sports Business Unit, focusing on interface management between different project teams and stakeholders
* Develop and implement project management strategies, policies, and procedures that enhance coordination and integration across projects
* Ensure effective communication and collaboration among all parties to deliver projects on time, within scope, and budget
* Identify, assess, and mitigate risks related to project interfaces and dependencies
* Monitor project progress, quality, and compliance with contractual and regulatory requirements
* Manage relationships with internal and external stakeholders, including contractors, consultants, vendors, and government entities
* Drive continuous improvement in project delivery through lessons learned, best practices, and adoption of new technologies
* Provide leadership, guidance, and mentorship to project management teams to build strong capabilities and high performance
* Report regularly to senior leadership on project status, challenges, and recommendations

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Project Management, or a related field; advanced degree or PMP certification preferred
* Minimum of 15 years of project management experience, with at least 8 years in a senior leadership role managing complex sports, entertainment, or infrastructure projects
* Proven expertise in managing interface and integration challenges between multiple projects and business units
* Strong knowledge of project management methodologies, tools, and best practices
* Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills
* Experience working in large-scale, multi-disciplinary projects, preferably within the sports or entertainment sectors
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
* Fluency in English; knowledge of Arabic is a plus

**Benefits**
Offering a comprehensive compensation and benefits package.

data.title: Program Manager - Saudization
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
The
**Program Manager**
is responsible for leading and overseeing large-scale infrastructure programs comprising multiple projects, ensuring successful delivery from planning through execution. The role involves coordinating with project sponsors, cross-functional teams, and proj
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
The
**Program Manager**
is responsible for leading and overseeing large-scale infrastructure programs comprising multiple projects, ensuring successful delivery from planning through execution. The role involves coordinating with project sponsors, cross-functional teams, and project managers to define scope, resources, budgets, and timelines, while driving alignment with client objectives. The Program Manager ensures effective risk management, quality control, and compliance with design specifications, safety, and environmental standards. Additionally, the role manages stakeholder communication, oversees contracts and fiscal controls, and optimizes project sequencing to enhance delivery efficiency and minimize operational disruption.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Participate in the planning and formulation of design alternatives and solutions for the construction project.
* Work closely with project sponsor, cross-functional teams, and assigned project managers to develop the scope, deliverables, required resources, work plan, budget, and timing for new initiatives.
* Manage program and project teams for optimal return on investment, and coordinate and delegate cross-project initiatives.
* Identify key requirements for cross-functional teams and external vendors.
* Develop and manage budget for projects and be accountable for delivering against established business goals/objectives.
* Work with other program managers to identify risks and opportunities across multiple projects within the department.
* Analyze, evaluate, and overcome program risks, and produce program reports for managers and stakeholders.
* Communicate with the Client’s representatives continuously regarding Project Progress and areas of concerns.
* Develop and administer project budgets and fiscal controls, contracts, and quality control provisions.
* Direct work sequencing to expedite projects delivery and to minimize disruption of ongoing operations.
* Ensure that projects operations are in compliance with design specifications and with client requirements.
* Informs themselves of the relevant Quality, Environmental, Safety and Occupational Health Policies, Manuals and Procedures within Hill International and ensures continued compliance with these requirements while employed by Hill.
* Perform other duties as assigned by the line manager/supervisor.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in engineering from an accredited university.
* Minimum 20 years’ experience in managing large-scale infrastructure programs consist of multiple projects.
* Experience of major government and/or semi-government program and projects implementations.
* Extensive Experience in the construction management of water and wastewater works.
* Experience of implementing a zero-accident philosophy.
* A record of engagement with government entities / utility providers.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Experience of working internationally.

data.title: Senior Commercial Project Manager - Saudi Arabia/Riyadh
data.raw_snippet:
Senior Commercial Project Manager – Saudi Arabia
  
  
Siemens strongly believes in the value of a Digital Portfolio, hence Smart Infrastructure combines Digital Power Distribution and Digital Building Infrastructure technologies. Our Digital Portfolio will enable our customers to enjoy occupant’s i
data.jd_text:
Senior Commercial Project Manager – Saudi Arabia
  
  
Siemens strongly believes in the value of a Digital Portfolio, hence Smart Infrastructure combines Digital Power Distribution and Digital Building Infrastructure technologies. Our Digital Portfolio will enable our customers to enjoy occupant’s intuitive buildings which are comfortable, safe, secure and energy efficient.
  
  
Smart infrastructure from Siemens intelligently connects energy systems, buildings and industries to adapt and evolve the way we live and work. We work together with customers and partners to build an ecosystem that intuitively responds to the needs of people and helps customers to better use resources. It helps our customers to thrive, communities to progress and supports sustainable development.
  
  
Join our Smart Infrastructure Buildings division as Senior Commercial Project Manager – and help us re-imagine the world by finding solutions and making the world a smarter place for tomorrow.
  
  
**Your Role – International, Challenging And Future-Oriented!**

* Perform Commercial Project Management activities and tasks for the assigned Projects Portfolio.
* Drive end to end commercial execution, business performance planning and ensure alignment of portfolio performance with organization goals.
* Oversight of commercial execution across projects and contracts, ensuring alignment with KPIs (Revenue, Billing Plans, Cashflow and Margins)
* Contract & Claim management with clients and subcontractors
* Driving & monitoring of project KPIs (Revenues, Cashflows, Billing Plans etc.)
* Ongoing project Performance Monitoring (calculation and plan vs actual deviations)
* Ensuring timely cleanup of balance sheet and aging commitments costs
* Evaluation of Risks & Opportunities, risk mitigations and reporting
* Monitoring and evaluation of plan, actual & committed costs, and identification & corrections of discrepancies
* Processing of purchase orders, sales orders, debit & credit notes, and invoicing in SAP
* Bills verification with reference to agreed terms & conditions
* Maintaining progress & payment records of subcontractors
* Follow up of accounts receivable
* Ensuring compliance of policies & procedure of documentation required for smooth processing of subcontractors' payments
* Coordination with treasury for bonds, guarantees, letter of credits etc
* Planning & monitoring of procurements and equipment shipping schedules

**Your Qualifications And Skills – Digital And Solid!**

* Minimum Graduation in Accounting, Finance or Relevant Fields
* Minimum 7 Years, Past Siemens experience is a big plus
* Good understanding of IFRS, FRG, Accounting Standards
* Experience in SAP is must
* CPM@Siemens certification is a plus
* Excellent Communication Skills, Interpersonal Skills, Ability to work under high pressure with very close deadlines
* Fluency in English & Arabic

**What else do you need to know?**
As a world leader in developing and producing the most advanced engineering technologies, we improve lives and further human achievements worldwide, while also protecting the climate - all thanks to our employees. Working with us, you have the foundation to develop personally and professionally. We give you the chance to do something significant, that benefits society and human progress. We give you the chance to create a difference.
  
  
Diversity at Siemens is our source of creativity and innovation. Having different types of talent and experiences makes us more ambitious and better prepared to respond successfully to the demands of the Society. Therefore, we value the candidates that reflect the Diversity that we enjoy in our Company. Please find more information at www.siemens.com
  
  
At Siemens we are always challenging ourselves to build a better future. We need the most innovative and diverse Digital Minds to develop tomorrow‘s reality. Find out more about the Digital world of Siemens here: www.siemens.com/careers/digitalminds
  
  
We are looking forward to receiving your online application.
  
  
Please note: Only complete applications can be considered in the selection process.

data.title: KSA B&I Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Location -**
Al Khobar/Riyadh
  
  
**Role Overview**
The KSA Buildings & Infrastructure (B&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping the long‑ter
data.jd_text:
**Location -**
Al Khobar/Riyadh
  
  
**Role Overview**
The KSA Buildings & Infrastructure (B&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping the long‑term vision, delivering the annual P&L, and ensuring excellence across all operations.
  
  
The Director drives topline and gross margin delivery in close partnership with regional leadership, steering commercial strategy, optimizing delivery models, and ensuring high‑quality, efficient, and client‑centric execution. The role leads multidisciplinary teams across
**Asset Management, Infrastructure Technical Inspections, Project & Program Management, Environmental Services, and Commissioning**
, ensuring cohesive, high‑value solutions for clients.
  
  
The Director also strengthens BV’s market presence across major sectors including
**Hospitality, Entertainment, Tourism, Mega Projects, Developers, Contractors, Government Authorities, Urban Development, Smart Cities, Transportation Infrastructure, and Aviation**
, building trusted relationships and expanding BV’s impact on safe, sustainable, and resilient built environments.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and implement the regional B&I growth strategy aligned with regional and global Product Line priorities.
* Drive portfolio expansion, commercial performance, and market penetration across all B&I service domains.
* Lead the annual budgeting cycle and manage end‑to‑end P&L accountability for revenue, sales, and gross margin.
* Ensure delivery quality in line with BV’s Operational Excellence standards and performance KPIs.
* Oversee regional commercial activities and support major pursuits, tenders, and key account development.
* Build and maintain strategic relationships with key customers across priority sectors.
* Lead operational governance through structured meetings, reviews, and performance follow‑up.
* Coach and develop teams, drive a high‑performance culture, and lead recruitment and performance assessments.
* Collaborate with Product Line and Area leadership to build a strong B&I talent pipeline.
* Uphold BV’s Core Values, Code of Ethics, and the 3 Absolutes.
* Ensure rigorous compliance with BV procedures for technical governance, risk, and quality.

**Core Competencies**
**Leadership & Strategy**

* Strategic thinker with strong decision‑making, accountability, and change‑leadership capability.
* Effective people leader who empowers teams and navigates matrix environments with ease.

**Commercial & Client Excellence**

* Strong commercial acumen and ability to drive growth across diverse B&I markets, including Transportation Infrastructure and Aviation.
* Skilled at long‑term client relationship development and key account management.

**Operational Excellence**

* Proven ability to ensure consistent quality, compliance, and operational performance.
* Experience managing complex, multi‑disciplinary programs.

**Technical & Market Insight**

* Solid understanding of B&I service lines including inspections, commissioning, and asset management.
* Strong knowledge of regional standards, regulations, and industry dynamics across built‑environment and infrastructure sectors.

**Personal Attributes**

* High integrity, resilient, client‑centric, with strong communication and stakeholder influence.

data.jd_text:
HanmiGlobal Saudi is seeking an experienced and dedicated
**Project Manager**

The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in project management within the construction sector, with a proven ability to deliver projects on time and within budget. As a Project Manager, you will oversee the entire project lifecycle, from inception through planning and execution, ensuring all project objectives align with client requirements and organizational goals.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Plan, execute, and oversee multiple projects, ensuring adherence to timelines, budgets, and quality standards
* Develop comprehensive project plans, including scope, schedules, resource allocation, and risk management strategies
* Lead project teams, provide direction, and motivate members to achieve project goals
* Maintain continuous communication with clients, stakeholders, and team members, providing updates on project status and addressing concerns promptly
* Identify potential risks and develop mitigation strategies to ensure project success
* Ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements and company policies throughout the project lifecycle
* Conduct regular project reviews and prepare reports for senior management

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field
* Minimum 10 years of experience in project management, with at least 5 years in a managerial role within the construction industry
* Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is preferred
* Strong knowledge of project management methodologies, tools, and software
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills
* Proficient in budget management and forecasting.

data.title: Telco Solutions Customer Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.
  
  
**Who We Are**
Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data
data.jd_text:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.
  
  
**Who We Are**
Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
  
  
**Job Description**
***Job Family Definition:***
Leads customer engagement to ensure that it meets all scope, time, budget and quality expectations, through planning, controlling and managing customer projects. Manages corporate, customer and third party vendor efforts to plan, sell and implement solutions to customer problems. Responsible for business as well as team management.
  
  
**Job Family Definition For Mgr, Progr Mgmt Office**
Responsible for establishing and maintaining the portfolio and project management environment based upon Policies, Standards, Customer Engagement Roadmap and Global Method. May perform responsibilities as a member of an Engagement Program Management Office (EPMO) or as a business unit leader with responsibility for a portfolio of customer projects.
  
  
**Management Level Definition**
Applies advanced subject matter knowledge to solve complex business issues and is regarded as a subject matter expert. Frequently contributes to the development of new ideas and methods. Works on complex problems where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of multiple factors. Leads and/or provides expertise to functional project teams and may participate in cross-functional initiatives. Acts as an expert providing direction and guidance to process improvements and establishing policies. Frequently represents the organization to external customers/clients. Exercises significant independent judgment to determine best method for accomplishing work and achieving objectives. May provide mentoring and guidance to lower level employees.
  
  
**Education And Experience Required**

* First Level University degree.
* 7 years experience in project management or in like roles/businesses.

**Summary:**
We’re looking for a proactive and dynamic Project Manager for managing end-to-end next generation assurance, provisioning& orchestration projects implementation, for HPE telecommunications customers across EMEA region, to ensure successful implementations according to the specifications or SOW.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Manage medium to large projects with more than 20 team members, including responsibility for project scope, schedule, and cost.
* Manage client relationships.
* Manage mid to upper-level client delivery relationships.
* Frequently represent the organization to external customers/clients.
* Manage communication to the project team and stakeholders.
* Manage risks and issues in projects and lead them to closure.
* Maintain requirements traceability matrix, working with business analysts and architects.
* Enable team collaboration by conducting workshops, meetings, etc.
* Follow up on tasks assigned to project team members and resolve blockers to enable teams to make progress.
* Escalate issues to senior management and stakeholders to resolve impediments.
* Own project management deliverables such as project charter, project plan, and reports.
* Work with testing teams to ensure test phases are carried out per plan.
* Ensure change and release management processes are followed for implementing changes in production environments and transitioning to support teams.
* Track organizational metrics and ensure processes are followed during project execution.
* Manage project financials, including P&L.
* Meet or exceed approved budgets.
* Provide reliable financial forecasts to management.
* Manage business development activities.
* Identify and develop new opportunities within current projects.
* Support qualification and opportunity assessment for large and moderately complex opportunities.
* Act as opportunity manager for medium to high-risk deals.

**Knowledge And Skills**

* Bachelor’s degree in IT, Engineering, or related discipline with over 7 years of experience implementing IT solutions as a project manager in the Telco industry.
* Minimum 3–5 full life cycle IT implementations as an IT project manager in the Telco industry.
* Excellent oral and written communication, presentation, meeting management, negotiation, and conflict resolution skills.
* High internal drive/self-initiative; strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Deep knowledge and experience in project management methodologies—waterfall, agile, lean, etc.
* Experience following best practices and project management standards.
* Demonstrated eagerness to learn new methods, follow leadership, and achieve results.
* Thorough understanding of project management artifacts and deliverables.
* Good understanding of software test methodologies; exposure to test management tools is a plus.
* Formal education or certification in Project Management (PMP) is preferred.
* Experience with vendor engagement, statements of work, and procurement processes is a plus.
* Fluency in English.

**Additional Skills**
Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business Growth, Change Management, Client Expectations Management, Coaching, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Centric Solutions, Customer Relationship Management (CRM), Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Process Improvements, Project and Program Management (Inactive), Project Management Office (PMO), Project Management Tools {+ 5 more}
  
  
**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
  
  
**Personal & Professional Development**
We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
  
  
**Unconditional Inclusion**
We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
  
  
**Let's Stay Connected**
Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
  
  
**Job**
Services
  
  
**Job Level**
Expert
  
  
HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
  
  
**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
  
  
**No Fees Notice & Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer**
*It has come to HPE’s attention that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud whereby scammer impersonate HPE or HPE-authorized recruiting agencies and offer fake employment opportunities to candidates. These scammers often seek to obtain personal information or money from candidates.*
*Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors
**will never charge any candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process.**
The credentials of any hiring agency that claims to be working with HPE for recruitment of talent should be verified by candidates and candidates shall be solely responsible to conduct such verification. Any candidate/individual who relies on the erroneous representations made by fraudulent employment agencies does so at their own risk, and HPE disclaims liability for any damages or claims that may result from any such communication.*

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet: *Certified as a Top Employer; KONE is dedicated to a better world of work and exhibits this through excellent people practices. We are committed to fostering a great work culture and inspiring the highest standards of quality and efficiency putting our people first and creating a workplace that nurt
data.jd_text:
*Certified as a Top Employer; KONE is dedicated to a better world of work and exhibits this through excellent people practices. We are committed to fostering a great work culture and inspiring the highest standards of quality and efficiency putting our people first and creating a workplace that nurtures collaboration, diversity, growth and wellbeing.*
***It's time to make a move. Join our flow.***
We are seeking a Project Manager who will be responsible for managing the scope, schedule, and budget of assigned projects. The Project Manager will oversee coordination with all key stakeholders, both internal and external, with a strong emphasis on maintaining proactive and continuous collaboration with the customer.
  
  
In this role, the Project Manager will plan, direct, and coordinate project activities to ensure that objectives are achieved within the agreed timeline and budget, using approved KONE methodologies and tools.
  
  
The primary objectives of the Project Manager role are to ensure customer satisfaction and support KONE’s profitability.
  
  
***What will you do?***

* Accountable for project scope, schedule and budget, delivering the project within the defined contractual requirements and KONE objectives.
* Ensure KONE business success and customer satisfaction.
* Ensure professional stakeholder management.
* Accountable for proactively managing customer communication throughout the project
* Ensure integrated project planning and management with customers and KONE full chain teams!
* Managing project deliverables in line with project plan.
* Ensure continuous full chain project monitoring and control.
* Responsible for successful project start-up, project reviews, project reporting and facilitating project governance.
* Ensure that project status and progress is effectively communicated to KONE management and to customer.
* Responsible for operational and financial project risk identification, mitigation, contingency planning, and potential recovery actions
* Accountable for the project’s financial planning and forecasting, cash flow management and revenue management (capitalizing on change order opportunities)
* Responsible for actively driving Sales-to-Operations handover quality, accountable for handovers to Customer and Maintenance as well as project closing activities.
* Maintain master action log and lessons learned document.
* Plans and ensures sufficient project resourcing and competences.
* Manages and leads the full chain project team.
* Creates and maintains safety and security awareness amongst employees and subcontractors in the project. Ensures following of KONE's and Customer’s safety and security policies.

***Are you the one?***

* Bachelor degree in Engineering.
* Minimum of 5 years’ experience in a Project Management role.
* Proven experience in the elevator and escalator industry.
* Fluency in Arabic is essential.
* Excellent command of the English language.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
* Demonstrated negotiation skills with a proactive, results-driven approach.

*At KONE, we are focused on creating an innovative and collaborative working culture where we value the contribution of each individual. Employee engagement is a key focus area for us and we encourage participation and the sharing of information and ideas. Sustainability is an integral part of our culture and the daily practice. We follow ethical business practices and we seek to develop a culture of working together where co-workers trust and respect each other and good performance is recognized. In being a great place to work, we are proud to offer a range of experiences and opportunities that will help you to achieve your career and personal goals and enable you to live a healthy and balanced life.*
Read more on
*https://careers.kone.com/en/*

In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
  
  
At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate an innovative culture that empowers you to achieve your full potential. Unleash your talent and redefine what’s possible.
  
  
**Job Description**
Parsons is looking for an amazingly talented
**Insert Job Title**
to join our team! In this role you will get to
**Insert one sentence summary of key job role**
.
  
  
**What You'll Be Doing**

* Develop comprehensive project plans, including scope, objectives, timelines, and budgets.
* Conduct feasibility studies and risk assessments.
* Define project deliverables and milestones.
* Collaborate with engineers and designers to develop project designs.
* Review and approve design documents and drawings.
* Ensure designs meet regulatory requirements and client specifications.
* Oversee the day-to-day operations of project teams.
* Monitor progress and performance against project plans.
* Ensure compliance with quality control measures.
* Lead and mentor project teams, including project coordinators, engineers, and design sub consultants and client’s contractors.
* Facilitate effective communication and collaboration among team members.
* Resolve conflicts and issues that arise during project execution.
* Maintain strong relationships with clients, vendors, and other stakeholders.
* Provide regular updates and reports to stakeholders.
* Address client concerns and ensure satisfaction.
* Monitor project budgets and control costs.
* Allocate resources efficiently to meet project demands.
* Identify and mitigate financial risks.

**What Required Skills You'll Bring**

* Bachelor’s degree in project management, Engineering, or a related field. Having a Master’s degree is an advantage.
* Minimum 10 years of experience in project management, including at least 5 years in a leadership role on large-scale infrastructure or airport developments
* Minimum 6 years of experience in leading design projects. Experience in building and architectural design is a strong preference for this position.
* Demonstrated success managing multi-phase project delivery with complex interdependencies
* Experience leading multidisciplinary teams across design, supervision, and construction.
* Strong leadership and strategic planning capabilities.
* In-depth knowledge of project delivery methodologies.
* Proficiency in project management tools (e.g., Primavera P6, MS Project).
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and problem-solving skills
* Ability to work under pressure and deliver results.
* Experience delivering early works or phased building or infrastructure programs.
* Familiarity with local authority and regulatory environments.
* Experience managing transitions between planning and execution phases.
* Background in client-side project management, design management, or PMC oversight.

Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.
  
  
We truly invest and care about our employee’s wellbeing and provide endless growth opportunities as the sky is the limit, so aim for the stars! Imagine next and join the Parsons quest—APPLY TODAY!
  
  
Parsons is aware of fraudulent recruitment practices. To learn more about recruitment fraud and how to report it, please refer to https://www.parsons.com/fraudulent-recruitment/.

* ABOUT NEP

NEP is the leading worldwide technical production partner supporting premier content producers across live sports, entertainment, music, and corporate events. With
data.jd_text:
**Location:**
Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
  
  
**Department:**
Commercial
  
  
**Reporting To:**
Regional Sales Director
  
  

* ABOUT NEP

NEP is the leading worldwide technical production partner supporting premier content producers across live sports, entertainment, music, and corporate events. With innovation at our core, we empower our clients to create exceptional experiences through cutting-edge broadcast and media solutions.
  
  

* PURPOSE OF POSITION

As the Business Relations Manager – KSA, you will represent NEP’s world-class broadcast and media services across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Focusing on strengthening our presence in the region, you will build lasting partnerships with key stakeholders in sports, entertainment, government, and live events. Your role will drive revenue growth, elevate our market footprint, and ensure seamless delivery of NEP’s solutions in alignment with Vision 2030 and other national initiatives.
  
  

* POSITION KEY RESPONSIBILITIES AND JOB TASKS
* Strategic Client Engagement
* Cultivate and manage relationships with broadcasters, event organizers, production companies, and government entities across KSA.
* Serve as NEP’s primary interface for key clients, ensuring consistent communication and customer satisfaction.
* Business Growth & Opportunity Development
* Identify, pursue, and convert new business opportunities across major verticals including live sports, concerts, festivals, and national mega-events.
* Prepare client-centric proposals in collaboration with NEP’s technical and commercial teams that highlight our integrated production capabilities.
* Market Insight & Positioning
* Monitor developments within Saudi Arabia’s broadcast, entertainment, and sports production landscape.
* Translate market insights into actionable intelligence to help shape NEP’s regional go-to-market strategy.
* Project Interface & Client Success
* Support project delivery by acting as a liaison between clients and NEP’s production and engineering teams.
* Ensure a best-in-class client experience through proactive communication, onboarding support, and post-project follow-up.
* Reporting & Pipeline Management
* Maintain up-to-date CRM entries, sales pipelines, and regular reporting to regional leadership.
* Provide input into forecasting, planning, and revenue tracking for the Saudi market.
* QUALIFICATIONS / PROFESSIONAL REGISTRATION / OTHER INDUSTRY REQUIREMENTS

**Education & Experience**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Media, Communications, or related field.
* Minimum 7 years’ experience in the broadcast, production, or live events sector within KSA.
* Experience managing government and large enterprise accounts is strongly preferred.
* Familiarity with Saudi procurement portals and bidding frameworks.

**Skills & Competencies**

* Solid understanding of broadcast technologies and live production workflows (e.g., OB vans, remote production, IP transmission).
* Deep network and knowledge within the KSA entertainment, sports, and government ecosystem.
* Bilingual proficiency in Arabic and English (spoken and written).
* Excellent communication, presentation, and commercial negotiation skills.

**Personal Attributes**

* Relationship-driven, highly professional, and culturally tuned to the Saudi market.
* Confident self-starter with the ability to operate independently and travel as required across the Kingdom.
* Team player who collaborates effectively across departments and functions.

data.title: Senior Director - Commercial - SDU - 20012792 - CDU8
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Overview**
The Senior Director - Commercial (SDU) at Qiddiya Investment Company is a strategic leadership role responsible for overseeing commercial activities within the Strategic Development Unit (SDU). You will drive strategic commerciality (and safety) into every decision both in procureme
data.jd_text:
**Job Overview**
The Senior Director - Commercial (SDU) at Qiddiya Investment Company is a strategic leadership role responsible for overseeing commercial activities within the Strategic Development Unit (SDU). You will drive strategic commerciality (and safety) into every decision both in procurement and in contract administration. Setting up strategy and execution to the outset through PM/CM specific process and procedures to suit the task at hand whilst fully complying with internal governance and Delegation of Authority. Responsible for driving outturn cost within the agreed business plans and cost plans and feeding back commercial lessons learned and outturn to cost planning.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Establish, implement, and maintain the commercial management framework for the Construction Management vertical, covering procurement commercial strategy, contract administration, cost control, and commercial assurance
* Define and embed commercial policies, processes, procedures, manuals, and templates tailored to Project Management / Construction Management delivery models, while ensuring full alignment with QDC governance and Delegation of Authority requirements
* Drive strategic commercial decision‑making across procurement and contract administration, ensuring value for money, appropriate risk allocation, and integration of safety considerations into commercial outcomes
* Lead development of commercial strategies at project and programme level, aligned with approved business plans, cost plans, and delivery strategies
* Provide functional oversight and governance of procurement commercial inputs, including contract strategies, commercial terms, payment mechanisms, incentives, and risk provisions
* Lead and oversee contract administration frameworks, including change control, payment certification, claims management, EOT assessments, dispute avoidance, and close‑out
* Ensure robust cost management, forecasting, and reporting throughout the project lifecycle, driving delivery of final outturn costs within approved budgets
* Monitor commercial performance, risks, and exposures, and implement mitigation strategies in coordination with Delivery, Procurement, Finance, and Risk functions
* Act as the commercial authority within the Construction Management vertical, providing guidance, challenge, and escalation support to project teams in a matrix capacity
* Establish and maintain clear commercial governance checkpoints aligned with stage‑gate approvals and executive decision forums
* Support preparation and review of commercial inputs to Board and N‑1 papers, including cost summaries, risk positions, commercial strategies, and recommendations
* Ensure alignment between cost planning, commercial execution, and outturn performance, and provide structured feedback to cost planning teams on variances, trends, and lessons learned
* Capture, analyse, and disseminate commercial lessons learned, benchmarks, and best practices across the Construction Management vertical and wider QDC organisation
* Support the build‑up and capability development of the Construction Management commercial function, including mentoring, standards setting, and skills development
* Coordinate closely with the Project Director Design, Project Director Delivery, Project Director Procurement, and Finance functions to ensure integrated, end‑to‑end commercial control
* Represent the Construction Management vertical in senior internal and external forums on commercial, contractual, and cost matters, as required

**Requirements**
**Education**

* Bachelor's degree in Quantity Surveying, Engineering, Construction Management, Commercial Management, or a related discipline (minimum)
* Master's Degree in a related field is preferred

**Specific Skills Required**

* Strong experience in commercial management of large‑scale construction and infrastructure projects, preferably within CM or self‑delivery models
* Deep understanding of procurement commercial strategies and contract administration across multiple delivery models
* Proven ability to establish and operate commercial governance frameworks, controls, and assurance mechanisms
* Strong knowledge of cost planning, budgeting, forecasting, and outturn cost management
* Experience operating within strict governance and Delegation of Authority environments, ideally within giga‑projects
* Ability to embed safety, risk, and compliance considerations into commercial decision‑making
* Strong leadership, stakeholder management, and influencing skills
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, including executive‑level reporting
* High level of professionalism, judgment, and commercial acumen

**Experience**

* 15-20 years' relevant experience in senior commercial leadership roles within large programmes, mega or giga‑projects, or complex construction environments
* Experience within GCC is highly desirable

**Benefits**
Comprehensive benefits package

data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
Saatchi & Saatchi is a leading global communications and advertising network known for its impactful creative ideas that generate powerful emotional connections between consumers and brands. Present in over 67 countries, Saatchi & Saatchi employs 6,500 professionals over 114 offices. Global clients include HSBC, P&G, Toyota, Visa and GSK. Saatchi & Saatchi is part of Publicis Communications a key division of Publicis Groupe, the world’s third largest communications group.
  
  
**Overview**
The Business Director role is responsible for both building client relationships and managing a team, while collaborating with senior leadership ( Business Lead / CEO), other agency departments (creative, strategy, production) and other potential partners from Publicis Group (media, Vertical, epsilon, sapient)
  
  
This candidate will lead the strategic, operational and delivery aspects of major accounts and own relationships with Saatchi & Saatchi Wellness.
  
  
client(s).
  
  
They will work closely with the Business Lead of your account(s) and ultimately ensuring high levels of client satisfaction and revenue growth across your assigned client portfolio.
  
  
The Business Director will take responsibility & accountability for the growth of their team and client business, identifying and developing opportunities to drive new business proposals involving the group capabilities.
  
  
Foster the agency’s beliefs and spirit externally-internally, as well as develop and drive vision for the business, aiming to bring in more business and drive the Power of One development and implementation.
  
  
As part of their day-to-day office leadership team, the candidate will work to inspire, mentor, and guide the career development of your team members
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Technical & Product**

* Lead client conversations and work closely with Business Lead(s) to ensure excellence in strategy, creative
* and production.
* Oversee strategy, planning, creative execution, production for all assigned client accounts. Responsible
* for winning client commitment to the agency and Group’s direction, strategy, recommendations, and
* subsequent execution, translating business needs to creative challenges and ensuring a timely delivery
* milestone.
* Perceived as a trusted advisor by your own clients and as an expert in specific industry, internally and in the
* market, by demonstrating deep understanding and knowledge of category.
* Be able to define the correct scope, the needed resources and deliver accordingly to financial targets for the
* current year.
* Support in business development reports alongside other senior agency stakeholders and engage relevant
* group resources when appropriate.

**Business Acumen & Operational Efficiency**

* Responsible of all outcomes, quality control and the health of the relationship with the client across all
* disciplines, practices, facets of the business internal and external.
* Build strong client relationships to understand the needs and requirements to proactively support the
* day-to-day delivery of projects.
* Set the yearly strategic roadmap with the client on business transformation by becoming the trusted
* consultant and authority on the client’s consumer journey.
* Ensure that the brand strategy, client messaging and deliverables (from planning to roll out) are consistent.
* Serve in a brand guardian role.
* Responsible for the smooth operating of day-to-day workstreams and foster positive collaboration between
* senior team members, strategy & creative colleagues, and all other experts to facilitate smooth process and
* project management delivery.
* Lead your team on all plans (check and upload from markets), ensuring the process is running timely and
* efficiently.
* Drive business transformation and innovation for clients.
* Drives integration and interdependence across all capabilities to deliver high-standard integrated communication solutions
* Capable of breaking down silos to enable collaboration across different Groupe verticals and practices.
* Constantly aim to have award winning work delivered to get recognition for clients in their industry and
* get recognition as an industry leader in our field.
* Support other teams when pitching for clients of similar industry.
* Responsible for the management of a healthy and profitable client P&L.
* Responsible for the commercial tracking, forecasts, and numbers ensuring no blindsides negatively affect the
* agency’s commitments.
* Inspire, mentor, and nurture the team to build capability and develop competence.

**Qualifications**

* 10 years experience with a track record in creative, brand, digital, social and data-driven marketing projects in creative agencies, with a strong focus on healthcare communication.
* Experience in being client facing in a leading role
* Management experience of a team
* Arabic fluency is a must, as well as English
* Excellent understanding of end-to-end communication eco-system, with a deep understanding of the health industry , communications trends, and latest trends in data and marketing integration.
* Experience in planning, strategy, managing and activating multichannel campaigns.
* BA degree (or similar)

**Additional Information**
R-3712L-1170

data.raw_snippet:

Egis is an organisation with a capacity to make meaningful industry and community change in the s
data.jd_text:
Egis is a global organisation with over 20,000 employees worldwide. With our head office based in Paris, we offer global career opportunities, as well as offer rewarding careers for our people locally.

Egis is an organisation with a capacity to make meaningful industry and community change in the space of place-making, sustainability and creating connected cities. Different to other engineering firms, Egis offers true end-to-end capability across the entire design-to-operation lifecycle, offering advisory, architecture, engineering, design, asset management and operations services.

We are committed to creating great teams doing innovative work and would love
**you**
to join us to
**Impact the Future.**

**Job Description**

We are seeking an experienced and strategic Head of IT Applications to lead our applications management function in Lusail, Qatar. In this pivotal leadership role, you will oversee the entire IT applications portfolio, driving digital transformation initiatives and ensuring alignment with organizational business objectives. You will manage a talented team of IT professionals while optimizing application performance, managing vendor relationships, and implementing innovative technology solutions that enhance operational efficiency across the organization.

* Develop and execute a comprehensive IT applications strategy that aligns with organizational goals and supports business growth initiatives
* Lead, mentor, and manage a team of applications professionals, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and technical excellence
* Oversee the full lifecycle of enterprise applications, including planning, implementation, maintenance, and optimization
* Analyze current application portfolio and identify opportunities for modernization, consolidation, and cost optimization
* Manage vendor relationships and negotiate contracts to ensure optimal service delivery and value for money
* Establish and enforce IT governance frameworks, policies, and standards for application development and deployment
* Direct digital transformation projects and ensure successful adoption of new technologies across the organization
* Monitor application performance metrics and implement improvements to enhance system reliability and user satisfaction
* Prepare and manage IT applications budget, ensuring efficient allocation of resources and cost control
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into effective technical solutions
* Stay current with emerging technologies and industry best practices to maintain competitive advantage

**Qualifications**

\*\*Required Qualifications:\*\*

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or related field
* Minimum 10 years of experience in IT applications management and enterprise systems
* Minimum 5 years of progressive leadership experience managing IT teams and departments
* Proven expertise in enterprise application portfolio management and IT service delivery
* Strong knowledge of ERP systems, CRM platforms, and cloud-based technologies
* Demonstrated experience with digital transformation initiatives and organizational change management
* Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to make data-driven decisions
* Strong project management capabilities with experience delivering complex IT initiatives
* Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills
* Proficiency in IT governance frameworks and best practices

\*\*Preferred Qualifications:\*\*

* Project Management Professional (PMP) or ITIL certification
* Experience with IT financial management and budget optimization
* Knowledge of cybersecurity principles and application security best practices
* Familiarity with agile development methodologies and DevOps practices
* Experience in a multinational or global organization
* Background in business process optimization and systems integration

data.title: Chief Executive Officer
data.raw_snippet:
Our client is a well-established, diversified group and market leader in the automotive space in Saudi Arabia. The organization plays a critical role in its sector and is recognized for operational scale, brand strength, and financial depth.

As part of its next phase of strategic growth and operati
data.jd_text:
Our client is a well-established, diversified group and market leader in the automotive space in Saudi Arabia. The organization plays a critical role in its sector and is recognized for operational scale, brand strength, and financial depth.

As part of its next phase of strategic growth and operational transformation, the group is seeking to appoint a
**Chief Executive Officer**
to join the executive leadership team. This role will partner directly with the Board of Directors to drive financial strategy, optimize capital structure, enhance governance, and support sustainable expansion across multiple business divisions.

This opportunity is suited to a commercially driven finance leader with experience in large-scale, multi-entity operations and strong exposure to working capital-intensive environments.

**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – Automotive Dealership Group (KSA)**

**Overview**

A leading automotive dealership group in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia is seeking a dynamic and commercially driven
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO)**
to lead the organization through its next phase of growth, operational excellence, and digital transformation.

The CEO will be responsible for driving profitability, strengthening OEM partnerships, expanding market share, and positioning the business as a leading mobility solutions provider in line with Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Strategic Leadership**

* Define and execute the company’s long-term strategy across vehicle sales, aftersales, and mobility services
* Align business strategy with Vision 2030, including localization, digitization, and sustainability initiatives
* Identify new revenue streams (EVs, fleet solutions, leasing, mobility platforms, etc.)

**Commercial & Financial Performance**

* Deliver top-line growth and optimize EBITDA across all business units
* Drive vehicle sales (retail, fleet, government) while maximizing aftersales profitability
* Ensure strong working capital management, inventory optimization, and cost discipline
* Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and financial performance tracking

**OEM & Partner Management**

* Maintain and strengthen relationships with global automotive OEMs
* Negotiate favorable commercial terms, distribution rights, and performance incentives
* Ensure compliance with OEM standards across showrooms, service centers, and brand representation

**Operational Excellence**

* Optimize dealership operations across sales, service, parts, and logistics
* Drive performance improvement initiatives across the branch network
* Enhance customer experience and retention through best-in-class service delivery

**Digital Transformation & Innovation**

* Lead digitalization across sales channels, CRM, and aftersales platforms
* Implement data-driven decision-making and performance dashboards
* Explore e-commerce, online car sales, and integrated mobility ecosystems

**People & Culture**

* Build and lead a high-performing executive team
* Drive a performance-oriented culture with strong governance and accountability
* Develop Saudi national talent in line with Saudization requirements

**Governance & Stakeholder Management**

* Report directly to the Board of Directors and shareholders
* Ensure strong corporate governance, compliance, and risk management frameworks
* Represent the company with regulators, government entities, and key stakeholders

**Candidate Profile**

**Experience**

* 15–20+ years of experience in automotive, mobility, or related sectors
* Proven CEO / Managing Director / GM experience within a large dealership group or automotive distributor
* Strong track record of delivering growth and profitability in complex, multi-branch operations
* Experience working with international OEMs is essential
* Prior experience in the GCC / Saudi Arabia is highly preferred
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, or related field
* MBA or equivalent postgraduate qualification preferred

**Skills & Competencies**

* Strong commercial acumen with deep understanding of dealership economics (sales, aftersales, parts)
* Strategic thinker with hands-on operational leadership capability
* Expertise in turnaround, scaling, or transformation environments
* Strong financial literacy and performance management skills
* Excellent stakeholder management and negotiation skills
* Visionary yet execution-focused
* High resilience and adaptability in a fast-evolving market
* Strong people leadership and cultural intelligence
* Entrepreneurial mindset with a focus on innovation

data.title: Chief Financial Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Role**

Al Emadi Enterprises is undergoing a strategic organizational restructuring to transition to a scalable enterprise. As part of this transformation, we are seeking a highly experienced
**Chief Financial Officer (CFO)**
to establish robust financial governance across our diverse po
data.jd_text:
**About the Role**

Al Emadi Enterprises is undergoing a strategic organizational restructuring to transition to a scalable enterprise. As part of this transformation, we are seeking a highly experienced
**Chief Financial Officer (CFO)**
to establish robust financial governance across our diverse portfolio of companies.

The CFO will serve as a key strategic partner to the CEO, responsible for overseeing all financial operations, driving profitability, and ensuring rigorous financial controls.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Strategic Financial Leadership**

* Develop and execute the group's long-term financial strategy, supporting portfolio expansion and new investments.
* Lead the financial planning and analysis (FP&A) function, providing actionable insights on revenue growth, margin optimization, and capital expenditure.
* Establish a unified financial governance framework across all group entities, ensuring consistency in reporting, budgeting, and forecasting.
* Initiate necessary developments to finance and accounting systems and procedures
* Provide business recommendations based on financial and operational
* information to higher management

**Operational Finance & Cross-Entity Optimization**

* Oversee the centralized Finance & Accounts team
* Implement and manage a formal cross-entity chargeback model (Service Level Agreements)
* Optimize cash flow management and working capital across the group's diverse business lines
* Identify and manage financial risks across the businesses

**Governance, Risk, and Compliance**

* Strengthen internal controls and audit processes to mitigate financial risk and ensure compliance.
* Oversee the preparation of consolidated financial statements and manage relationships with external auditors, banks, and financial institutions.
* Drive the digitization and automation of financial processes to improve reporting accuracy and operational efficiency.
* Identify and mange financial risks across the businesses

**Qualifications and Experience**

* **Education**
  : Master's degree in Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration; CPA, CFA, CMA, or equivalent professional certification is required.
* **Experience**
  : Minimum of 10 years of progressive financial leadership experience, with at least 3 years in a CFO or VP of Finance role within multi-entity conglomerate (Real Estate, Retail, or Hospitality sectors preferred).
* **Expertise**
  : Proven track record in implementing financial governance, cross-entity cost allocation models, and leading organizational restructuring initiatives.
* **Skills**
  : Exceptional strategic thinking, advanced financial modeling, and the ability to communicate complex financial data to non-financial stakeholders.
* **Language**
  : Fluency in English is required; proficiency in Arabic is highly advantageous.

**Why Join Us?**

This is a rare opportunity to play a foundational role in the strategic transformation of one of Qatar's most prestigious enterprise groups. You will have the autonomy to build a world-class financial organization and directly impact the growth trajectory of our iconic portfolio.

data.title: QNB3373 - Assistant Vice President - Climate Risk
data.raw_snippet:
**About QNB**
Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
  
  
QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries acr
data.jd_text:
**About QNB**
Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
  
  
QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
  
  
QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard & Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3) and Fitch (A+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
  
  
Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
  
  
QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
  
  
**Summary**
The incumbent will join the Group Strategic Risk Management department and will support the Bank’s climate risk efforts globally. Working in close partnership with stakeholders across the Bank, the role will focus on delivery and coordination of risk management best practice in this evolving area. This will involve the enhancement of the Group’s framework to identify, measure, monitor and manage the financial risks from Climate Change in line with evolving regulatory and market expectations. The incumbent will be involved in the integration of climate risk into governance frameworks and processes and will collaborate with stakeholders across the Bank to implement specific climate risk management processes.
  
  
A key part of the role will involve taking ownership for the delivery of the QNB Group’s climate scenario analysis, including interpretation and communication of the resulting conclusions & the formulation of recommended actions. The role also encompasses responsibility for understanding and responding to new regulation and improving transparency and disclosures.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Support the development and implementation of a framework for identifying, measuring, monitoring and managing the financial risk from Climate Change in line with regulatory expectations
* Draft and develop governance materials and risk framework documentation
* Coordinate integration of climate risk into core governance frameworks and processes such as portfolio analysis, risk appetite and ICAAP
* Partner with risk management teams (e.g. Credit Portfolio Management, Market Risk) to drive portfolio analysis capabilities
* Review the output of the Stress Testing / scoring tool models and engage with Credit Approvers on determining the best course of actions for customer identified as presenting a high climate risk.
* Provide risk input into climate risk disclosures (e.g. TCFD)
* Develop expertise in the following areas: the drivers of Climate Change including how it affects economies and corporations, governmental and regulatory responses to Climate Change and emerging thought over how to measure and manage Climate Risk from a financial loss perspective

**Experience**

* University graduate preferably with a Major in Banking, Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration or related field of study (Masters preferred). Relevant professional certifications will be an added advantage (e.g. GARP Sustainability and Climate Risk).
* At least 10 years of relevant banking experience, preferably within a highly rated international bank, and in a managerial capacity
* Excellent understanding and knowledge of banking & risk management practices.
* Experience of framework design and implementation.
* Experience in dealing with and delivery of regulatory projects an advantage.
* Confidence and ability to communicate effectively with senior professionals and various stakeholder groups within QNB.
* Strong interest in continually developing skills and knowledge related to Climate Change and its implications for risk management.
* Excellent oral and written communication skills (including report writing) in English, while Arabic would be an added advantage.
* Leadership & Change Management abilities in influencing senior personnel throughout the group.
* Strong analytical skills and the ability to communicate both verbally and in writing with all levels of management.

Note: you will be required to attach the following:
  
  

* Resume/CV
* Copy of Passport or QID
* Copy of Education Certificate

**About QNB**
Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
  
  
QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
  
  
QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard & Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3) and Fitch (A+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
  
  
Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
  
  
QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
  
  
**Job Purpose Summary**
The incumbent will assume responsibility for the Dividend and IPO Processing unit and will ensure timely and accurate distribution/ payments of dividends to a corporate entity’s shareholders by virtue of the contractual arrangement entered into by the respective corporate entity with Group Corporate Credit. The incumbent will also supervise Initial Public Offering (IPO) related activities of corporate clientele through managing the IPO subscription process. Additionally the incumbent will assist in exploring the possibilities to enhance the IPO processing system and improve the dividend distribution for non-Qatari shareholders through the payment of their dividends with their currency.
  
  
**Essential Duties & Responsibilities By Dimensions**

* Shareholder & Financial:
* Assist in the creation of Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for performance monitoring and quality measurement purposes for the Dividend and IPO Processing Unit and monitor their achievement on periodic basis.
* Implements KPI’s and best practices for Assistant Vice President Corporate Actions role.
* Act within the limits of the powers delegated to the incumbent and delegate authority to the respective staff and monitor exercise of the same.
* Demonstrate clear understanding of the important factors behind the bank's financial & non-financial performance.
* Promote cost consciousness and efficiency and enhance productivity, to minimise cost, avoid waste, and optimise benefits for the bank.
* Customer (Internal & External):
* Develop Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with internal departments/ units to achieve improvements in turnaroundtime (TAT) with regards to dividend and IPO processing which will also help increase external customer satisfaction.
* Liaise with their counterparts in the lead bank(s) and corporate customers, as and when applicable
* Build and maintain strong and effective relationship with all the other related departments and units to achieve the Group’s goals/ objectives.
* Provide timely and accurate information to the external and internal auditors and the compliance function as andwhen required.
* Provide timely and accurate information to the external and internal auditors and the compliance function as and when required.
* To assist customers in all their queries on Bank’s product and seek solution to their requests.
* Internal (Processes, Products, Regulatory):
* Ensure that set procedures and regulations are complied with during the processing of dividends and IPO.
* Ensure the timely and accurate processing of all dividend and IPO related transactions, within the pre-agreed SLAexecution time-frames.
* Ensure the timely distribution of QNB and other companies’ dividends to shareholders in a timely fashion.
* Ensure the maintenance of shareholders unit files in compliance with set regulatory requirements.
* Coordinate with other banks participating in the IPO process, where applicable.
* Supervise the processing of IPO subscription applications, ensure that all documents are gathered to meet QNB and DSM requirements and ensure that all KYC and AML requirements are adhered to during the process.
* Participate in marketing QNB services of dividend distribution/ IPO processing to listed corporate customers in coordination with other relevant departments/ units.
* Continuous Improvement
* Set examples by leading improvement initiatives through cross-functional teams ensuring successes.
* Identify and encourage people to adopt practices better than the industry standard.
* Continuously encourage and recognise the importance of thinking out-of-the-box within the team.
* Encourage, solicit and reward innovative ideas even in day-to-day issues.

**Education/Experience Requirements**

* Bachelor degree University Graduate/preferred with a Major in Marketing, Banking, Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration or Information Technology (related field of study)
* -At least 10 years of relevant experience, preferably within a highly rated international bank.

Note: you will be required to attach the following:
  
  

* Resume/CV
* QID (Front & Back)
* Passport
* Education Certificate
* Birth Certificate

data.title: Chief Financial Officer
data.raw_snippet: The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) is responsible for strategic financial leadership, capital allocation discipline, liquidity management, financial governance, and value creation across the Group’s upstream exploration & production assets and midstream infrastructure investments. We are seeking an e
data.jd_text:
The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) is responsible for strategic financial leadership, capital allocation discipline, liquidity management, financial governance, and value creation across the Group’s upstream exploration & production assets and midstream infrastructure investments. We are seeking an exceptional
**Chief Financial Officer (CFO)**
to join a leading organization operating across the
**Oil & Gas (Upstream & Midstream) and Energy sector**
.

**IMPORTANT:**
Candidates
**must have strong, proven experience in Oil & Gas / Energy (Upstream & Midstream)**
to be considered.

**Requirements (Mandatory)**

* 15–20+ years of finance leadership experience
* **Minimum 8–10 years in Oil & Gas / Energy (Upstream & Midstream – Mandatory)**
* Experience in project finance, joint ventures, and multi-country operations
* Strong exposure to capital projects, financing, and M&A

**Key Responsibilities**

**Financial Strategy & Capital Allocation**

* Develop and execute financial strategy aligned with production and infrastructure growth
* Lead investment decisions across exploration, field development, pipelines, and acquisitions
* Evaluate investments using NPV, IRR, and sensitivity analysis
* Optimize portfolio through divestments, restructuring, and contract renegotiation

**Financing & Liquidity Management**

* Structure and manage reserve-based lending, project finance, bonds/sukuk, and equity funding
* Maintain banking and investor relationships
* Oversee liquidity planning and hedging (oil price, FX, interest rates)

**Planning & Performance Management**

* Lead budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning
* Monitor performance (cost per barrel, EBITDA, cash flow)
* Provide insights on profitability, break-even, and capital efficiency

**JV & Contract Governance**

* Manage PSC/EPSA, JOA, and infrastructure agreements
* Ensure compliance with cost recovery, profit sharing, and partner reporting
* Handle JV audits and financial disputes

**Accounting & Compliance**

* Oversee financial reporting (IFRS / US GAAP)
* Manage asset accounting, impairment, and provisions
* Strengthen internal controls and audit processes

**Tax & Treasury**

* Manage cross-border tax structures and compliance
* Oversee cash flow, funding, receivables, and covenant compliance

**Risk & Stakeholder Management**

* Lead financial risk management (commodity, liquidity, political risks)
* Manage relationships with shareholders, lenders, and partners

**Leadership**

* Build and lead high-performing finance teams
* Drive finance transformation and talent development

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s in Finance / Accounting / Economics
* CA / CPA / ACCA / CMA (preferred)
* MBA (Finance / Strategy) is an advantage

**Core Skills**

* Financial strategy & capital allocation
* Oil & Gas fiscal and project economics
* Treasury, hedging, and structured finance
* Stakeholder management and leadership

data.raw_snippet:
