data.search_title: "Saudi German Hospital Group" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
Acts as the airline’s ambassador; strives to achieve customers’ loyalty and to promote a positive corporate image, at all times, through enhancing the overall customers’ experience. Provides excellent customer service to all passengers whilst ensuring their safety and comfort are achieved throughout the complete flight cycle. Be ready and fit to operate ensuring productivity is in line with set measures and company’s adopted policies and procedures.
  
  
**Conduct**
**Key Result Responsibilities**

* Ensures timely attendance, proper grooming, fitness and legality of self for the assigned flights. Attends “Briefing” to ensure acknowledgement of flight details, distribution of roles, targets, security checks, boarding, etc.

**Safety Measures**

* Instructs passengers on safety procedures to be followed ensuring their safety and comfort at all times.
* Identifies areas of safety and security risks and partners with the Cabin Supervisor to take remedial action in accordance with the SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures).
* Administers first aid to passengers where necessary.
* Informs Cabin Supervisor, Flight Crew and Captain, as appropriate, with any irregularities and malfunctions promptly.

**Customer Service**

* Welcomes passengers and assists in their boarding formalities; enters necessary data into the aircraft logbook as per the Airline and Civil Aviation Authority’s adopted procedures.
* Provides constant excellent customer services to passengers by attending to their individual pre-bookings, requests and needs.
* Identifies and assists passengers experiencing stress or difficulties in accordance with the corresponding policies and procedures detailed in the Operations Manual and other relevant instructions.
* Contributes to maximizing on-board revenue and “Charity Cloud” program by efficiently promoting the on-board meals, products and charity services and thereby achieves individual and team targets.
* Ensures proper and secure handling of cash and credit card payments received against individual sales and donations managed by him/her.

**Crosschecking And Reports**

* Carries out pre-flight checks to ensure sufficient supplies, emergency equipment, catering equipment and other specified equipment prior to take off; provides report for any deficiencies to Cabin Supervisor and/or Captain as appropriate.
* Assists in ensuring the aircraft cabin is cleaned thoroughly at transit stations and that adequate re-catering and duty free products are provided before flying.
* Ensures orderly and complete handover/takeover of the cabin to/from catering, cleaning and/or maintenance staff.
* Carries out the post-flight briefing and assessment reports as per adopted policies and procedures: provides objective evaluation of the Cabin Supervisor, reports any problems or discrepancies on flight, closing and sealing of duty free containers.
* Accounts to Cabin Supervisor for the conduct of passengers; carries out the duties of ‘Cabin Supervisor’ when designated as such by the Captain.
* Maintains necessary professional and safety knowledge and competitiveness by attending recurrent trainings, emergency procedures trainings, and educational workshops and by ensuring current license.
* Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results and achieving allocated sales targets and objectives.

**Qualifications (Academic, Training, Languages)**

* Diploma or Higher Secondary Certificate is acceptable for this role; a diploma in Travel/ Tourism is a plus.
* Training in First Aid, Safety and Emergency Procedures are an added value.
* Fit to fly, has good general health, no serious medical conditions or chronic diseases.
* Presentable, friendly, demonstrates cheerful and positive attitude even under stress.
* Customer service oriented, capable of understanding and attending to customers’ needs and requests.
* Capable of handling difficult situations and angry customers without compromising corporate image.
* Focused, capable of identifying irregularities and handling threats and emergencies with efficiency and commitment to successful results.
* Proactive, self-motivated, demonstrates initiative and positive teamwork competency.
* Very good verbal and written communication skills.
* Excellent time management and problem-solving skills.
* Proficient in Microsoft Office.
* Fluent in English Language. Other languages are an advantage based on the Airline requirements

**Important Requirements**

* Age: Between 20 29 for non-experienced crew, and up to 33 years for experienced crew
* Minimum Height: 160 cm (Female), 170 cm (Male)
* Weight: To be in proportion to Age and Height
* Clear skin with no marks or tattoos that would be visible whilst wearing the cabin crew uniform
* Medically/ Physically fit to perform Cabin Crew duties
* Ability to swim with aid of a flotation device

**Work Experience**

* Fresh graduates are encouraged to apply for this role.
* Previous experience as cabin crew or in a customer service role in the Airlines/Aviation/ or hospitality Industries shall be treated as an added value.
* Active cabin crew license is an advantage.
* Capable of working in shift pattern and for extended working hours.
* Shows high flexibility and adaptability to frequent changes and busy schedules.
* Demonstrates the ability to contribute and successfully deliver against policies, procedures, and set KPIs.

data.title: Customer Service Roles
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**
The Emirates Group is a highly profitable business comprising of Emirates Airline, the largest international airline in the world and dnata, one of the world's biggest air services providers. With our headquarters located in the cosmopolitan emirate of Dubai, working with us puts you
data.search_title: "Saudi German Hospital Group" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
The Emirates Group is a highly profitable business comprising of Emirates Airline, the largest international airline in the world and dnata, one of the world's biggest air services providers. With our headquarters located in the cosmopolitan emirate of Dubai, working with us puts you at the forefront of technological advances in the aviation industry while offering you a dynamic lifestyle.
  
  
If you're seeking a position that will allow you to thrive professionally and develop your career in aviation industry, look no further. There are openings for individuals who are passionate about traveling and enjoy collaborating with customers and colleagues across the world.
  
  
We are looking for exceptional individuals who can be a part of our Customer Service team. If successful, you will join an extensive training program which include systems training and customer service skills and then be allocated to an area across the group: Emirates Airport Services, dnata, Marhaba services and Contact Centre.
  
  
**During The Hiring Process, You Can Expect**
**Step 1 – Apply**
Submit your application and we’ll then send you an email to confirm that we’ve received your application.
  
  
**Step 2 – Review**
Our Recruitment Team will review your application.
  
  
**Step 3 – Video Interview and Assessment**
If you’re shortlisted for the role, we’ll send you a link to our on-demand, interactive and gamified video interview assessment via HireVue. This is most critical part of the process and required if you want to progress to the next stage.
  
  
**Step 4 – Offer**
If successful, we’ll send you an offer of employment which will include the benefits package for your role.
  
  
We have outlined below the specific job details for each of our roles:
  
  
**I. Customer-facing Roles**
Airport / Customer Service Agent (Emirates and Dnata)
  
  
As an Airport / Customer Services Agent, you will be one of the first welcoming faces our customers meet at Dubai International Airport, a leading global aviation hub. Every day brings the opportunity to guide travellers from around the globe through check-in, boarding, arrivals, and baggage services with confidence, care, and professionalism.
  
  
From assisting lounge customers to supporting families, unaccompanied minors, connecting passengers, and those needing extra assistance, you will play a key role in ensuring every journey feels seamless and stress-free.
  
  
In this role, you will gain strong operational expertise, develop your people and problem-solving skills, and build a career in a dynamic, fast-paced, and highly international environment.
  
  
Strong performance in this role can also unlock opportunities for career progression and internal moves across airport operations, customer services, and wider business areas.
  
  
Marhaba Service Agent
  
  
As a Marhaba Services Agent, you will deliver a personalized airport experience to our guests, supporting them across key touchpoints including check-in, immigration, boarding and baggage services. You will provide dedicated assistance to VIP customers, families, unaccompanied minors and passengers requiring additional support. This role allows you to build strong customer engagement and service excellence skills, while offering career growth across Marhaba’s services, airport operations, and customer experience functions.
  
  
**II. Back-office Role**
Customer Sales and Service Agent – Contact Centre
  
  
As a Contact Centre Customer Sales and Service Agent, you will be the trusted voice of Emirates, delivering exceptional support and care throughout every stage of our customers’ journey. Your role is pivotal in creating seamless, reassuring experiences, whether you are helping customers plan their travel or resolving real-time queries with confidence and empathy. In this dynamic position, you will engage with customers across multiple communication channels, ensuring that every interaction reflects clarity, consistency, and up-to-date knowledge of our products and services. Your ability to actively listen, think critically, and communicate effectively will make customers feel valued and supported at all times.
  
  
Joining the Contact Centre fast-paced, multicultural environment means you will not only sharpen your communication, problem-solving, and sales expertise but also unlock clear pathways for career growth, both within the Contact Centre and across the wider Emirates Group.
  
  
Qualification
  
  
**To be considered for Customer Service roles, you must meet the following requirements:**

* Fluency in both spoken and written English
* Fluency in any other language is a plus
* A levels/High School certificate
* Excellent interpersonal and customer service skills
* Willing to work in a shift environment
* PC based skills to operate Windows package (Microsoft Word/Excel/E-mail)
* Willing to wear uniform (Front-line customer facing roles)

**In addition to the above, the job specific requirements for the Contact Centre role are:**

* Proficiency in English and at least one of the following languages is a must-have requirement for this position: Arabic, French, Czech, German, Italian, Japanese, Cantonese, Mandarin, Russian, Spanish, Polish, Portuguese.
* Customer and sales focus on providing excellent service and closing any sales opportunity.
* The ability to type accurately and quickly while maintaining excellent written communication is an essential requirement for the messaging-based role.

Experience the excitement of being on the front-line customer-facing roles with dnata, Marhaba and Emirates Airport Services Agents, or work behind the scenes as a Contact Centre Service Agent. You'll have the chance to work with a diverse team of professionals, interact with people from all over the world, and make a positive impact on the lives of travellers every day. Both full-time and part-time opportunities are available, providing flexibility to fit your lifestyle and career goals. Whether it be Emirates Airline or dnata, our goal is to ensure that our customers experience service is consistent with the Emirates Group high standards.
  
  
Salary & benefits
  
  
Join us in Dubai and enjoy attractive salary and travel benefits that are exclusive to our industry, including discounts on flights and hotels stays around the world.
  
  
Find out what it’s like to live and work in our fast-paced, cosmopolitan home city in the Dubai Lifestyle section of our website emiratesgroupcareers.com

Krispy Kreme’s

data.jd_text:
Since its founding in 1937, Krispy Kreme’s focus has remained the same - making fresh doughnuts using our founder’s original recipe. The brand’s iconic Hot Light lets consumers know when doughnuts are being made in the shop so they can stop in and enjoy them hot, right off the line.

Krispy Kreme’s
***International Sourcing Manager (Middle East & Asia)***
will be responsible for identifying and establishing reliable supplier networks, ensuring cost-effective procurement, and maintaining compliance with local food safety, import regulations and company policy, as well as the development of existing international supply community – ensuring appropriate innovation, service levels, value for money and ESG contributions for both equity & franchise partners.

**A TASTE OF WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:**

* Lead sourcing for ingredient supplies, equipment and packaging.
* Management of vendor performance to include suppler relationship management (SRM) service level agreement compliance (SLA) and key performance indicator (KPI) delivery.
* Forecast, manage and administer international KK US concentrate demand and orders.
* Support new market openings as appropriate, in territory.
* Identify, evaluate, introduce and manage international vendors and supply chains for key ingredients including flour mix, yeast, sugar, shortening and packaging.
* Foster collaborative vendor and partner relationships to support consistent ingredient supply quality and efficient supply chains and by doing this, optimizing value for money spent.
* Support NMO and region procurement budgets, optimize costs through strategic negotiations, and explore alternative sourcing options to deliver optimum profitability.
* Development and implementation of procurement strategies for ingredient sourcing, equipment, non-consumables and packaging in existing and future new markets.
* Regulatory and compliance management, in liaison with regulatory dept. ensuring that all sourced ingredients and materials meet local labeling requirements and import/export policies.
* Ensure the smooth and on-time delivery of ingredients and materials to minimize disruptions across supply chain, including concentrate supply to all international equity and franchisee partners, in territory.
* Coordinate with R&D, operations, marketing, H+S, finance, production and global partners to align procurement strategies with product offerings and market demand.
* Assess global supply chain risks, ensure vendor sustainability practices, build and maintain territory business continuity plans.
* Solve supply issues including rejected received or supplied ingredients, missing consignments and customs queries and delays.
* Manage vendor performance, commodity trends, and market developments to support data-driven decision-making.
* Provide for out-of-hours cover and problem solving for the varying international operational time zones as well as general support to the international procurement team as required.
* Quarterly management updates covering area of responsibility.

**YOUR RECIPE FOR SUCCESS:**

* 5+ years of experience in international procurement required
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent certification or experience

*\*The above statements are intended to describe the general nature of work performed by the employees assigned to this job and are not the official job description for the position. The official job description will be provided during the application/interview process.*

**BENEFITS:**

* Comprehensive benefits (medical, vision, and dental insurance)
* Employee discount program
* 401K plan
* Generous PTO Plan
* Company events
* Education Reimbursement
* Adoption Assistance
* Life Insurance
* FSA/HSA Plans
* Pet Insurance

**Learn more at www.kkbenefits.com**

**WHY KRISPY KREME?**

At Krispy Kreme, we focus on:

**Loving People:**

* Our global culture is best captured by our Leadership Mix, a dozen behaviors that define how we work with one another across the world and give back to our communities. Check out our leadership mix here.
* Belonging happens once each Krispy Kremer knows their bold authentic self is welcomed, dignified, and loved, where their wonderfully original identities flourish and thrive.

**Loving Communities:**

* At Krispy Kreme, sharing joy is at the center of everything we do, and we strive to inspire this in our communities. Our brand purpose truly shines through our Acts of Joy and community fundraising initiatives.
* In the U.S., we have been donating unsold doughnuts to local food banks, with a goal of bringing a smile to our consumers as they enjoy a small, sweet treat. We partner with Feeding America and Convoy of Hope, who in turn partner with organizations nationwide to distribute donations to people in need through diverse types of programs and services.
* In 2022, we helped community groups raise $40 million globally. Last year in the U.S., we supported more than 83,000 fundraising events, raising nearly $37 million.

**Loving Planet:**

* We have been conducting a multi-year global GHG emissions assessment to establish an emissions baseline, using this foundation to soon set goals for greenhouse gas emission reductions.
* We are working on reducing food waste through donation efforts, animal feed, and composting programs.

**Krispy Kreme is an Equal Opportunity Employer:**

At Krispy Kreme, we believe that your originality sweetens our recipe. We value the diverse ingredients of the ethnicity, national origin, race, age, sex, gender, intersex, or veteran status of every individual. We strive for an inclusive culture that allows each of our peeps to bring their bold authentic self to work regardless of their religion, gender identity & expression, sexual orientation, or disability.

**About Krispy Kreme**

Headquartered in Charlotte, N.C., Krispy Kreme is one of the most beloved and well-known sweet treat brands in the world. Our iconic Original Glazed® doughnut is universally recognized for its hot-off-the-line, melt-in-your-mouth experience. Krispy Kreme operates in more than 35 countries through its unique network of fresh doughnut shops, partnerships with leading retailers, and a rapidly growing Ecommerce and delivery business with more than 14,000 fresh points of access. Our purpose of touching and enhancing lives through the joy that is Krispy Kreme guides how we operate every day and is reflected in the love we have for our people, our communities and the planet. Connect with Krispy Kreme Doughnuts at www.KrispyKreme.com, or on one of its many social media channels, including www.Facebook.com/KrispyKreme and www.Twitter.com/KrispyKreme.

Stellantis é uma das principais fabricantes mundiais de automóveis e fornecedora de mobilidade, presente em todos os continentes, com fábricas em 30 países e operação em 150 mercados comerciais.
  
  
Somos o encontro de pessoas e 14 marcas icônicas, incluindo Abarth, Citroën, Fiat, Jeep, Peugeot, Ram e outras.
  
  
Impulsionados pela nossa diversidade, lideramos a forma como o mundo se move, desenvolvendo novas soluções para a mobilidade do futuro em uma jornada de inovação diversa e colaborativa.
  
  
Porque trabalhar conosco
  
  
Na Stellantis, avaliamos os candidatos com base nas qualificações, mérito e necessidades de negócios. Aceitamos inscrições de pessoas de todas as identidades de gênero, idade, etnia, nacionalidade, religião, orientação sexual e deficiência. Equipes diversificadas nos permitirão atender melhor às crescentes necessidades de nossos clientes e cuidar do nosso futuro.
  
  
**Horário:**
Disponibilidade para atuar em turnos
  
  
**Contratação:**
Efetivo – CLT
  
  
**Nível:**
Operacional
  
  
**Descrição e Responsabilidades**

* Operar a central de abastecimento, garantindo o processo de desumidificação do material
* Identificar as matérias-primas utilizadas na produção
* Auxiliar no preparo e mistura das matérias-primas, conforme especificações dos documentos da linha
* Abastecer as máquinas com matéria-prima, assegurando o suprimento contínuo da produção
* Alimentar máquinas de produção que utilizam sistemas de abastecimento diferenciado
* Realizar atividades auxiliares na produção, como transporte, acondicionamento e limpeza
* Executar inspeção visual dos silos de abastecimento
* Contribuir para o bom andamento e organização do setor de produção

**Requisitos**

* Ensino Médio Completo;
* Disponibilidade para atuar em turnos;
* Desejável conhecimento em NR-12;
* Desejável conhecimento em NR-35.

**Benefícios:**
Assistência médica, Assistência odontológica, Auxílio academia, Auxílio farmácia, Benefícios internos, Cesta básica, Fretado, Participação nos lucros, Previdência privada, Refeição no local, Seguro de Vida
  
  
Job Details
  
  
Role Level: Not Applicable Work Type: Full-Time Country: United Arab Emirates City: Dubai Company Website: https://www.stellantis.com/ Job Function: Management Company Industry/
  
  
Sector: Motor Vehicle Manufacturing
  
  
What We Offer
  
  
**About The Company**
Searching, interviewing and hiring are all part of the professional life. The TALENTMATE Portal idea is to fill and help professionals doing one of them by bringing together the requisites under One Roof. Whether you're hunting for your Next Job Opportunity or Looking for Potential Employers, we're here to lend you a Helping Hand.

Disclaimer: talentmate.com is only a platform to bring jobseekers & employers together. Applicants are advised to research the bonafides of the prospective employer independently. **Description**
Gulf Center United Industrial Equipment Co. is urgently looking for skilled candidates to join our Mechanical Engineering Team in Kuwait.
  
  
**🔧 Open Positions**

* TIG & ARC Welders – 5 Nos
* Structural Fabricators – 5 Nos

📍 Location: Kuwait
  
  
⚙️ Industry: Mechanical / Stainless Steel & Structural Fabrication
  
  
Job Responsibilities
  
  
TIG & ARC Welders
  
  

* Perform TIG (GTAW) and ARC / SMAW welding on stainless steel and carbon steel materials.
* Carry out welding work as per WPS, technical drawings, and project specifications.
* Ensure all welding activities comply with KOC, ASME, and AWS standards.
* Prepare and clean metal surfaces before welding and ensure proper fit-up and alignment.
* Maintain welding equipment and follow strict HSE safety procedures.

Structural Fabricators
  
  

* Fabricate and assemble structural steel components as per engineering drawings.
* Cut, shape, and fit metal parts using fabrication tools and equipment.
* Perform marking, measuring, drilling, and grinding operations.
* Ensure proper alignment and fitting of structural components before welding.
* Maintain quality standards and safe working practices in the workshop.
* \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

**Requirements**

* Minimum 3–5 years of experience in TIG / ARC welding.
* Experience with stainless steel and carbon steel fabrication preferred.
* Experience in Oil & Gas or piping work is preferred.
* Valid welding certification (3G / 4G / 6G).
* Proficient in GTAW (TIG) and SMAW (ARC) welding processes.
* Experience in CS / SS piping, tanks, and structural steel welding.
* Knowledge of WPS, safety standards, and quality requirements.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
  
  
💼 Salary & Benefits
  
  

* Salary: To be decided during the interview (based on experience).
* Benefits: As per Kuwait Labor Law.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Electronic Diagnostics: Utilize Caterpillar Electronic Technician (Cat ET) software to plug into machine ECMs, diagnose fault codes, and monitor real-time engine performance.
  
  
Hydraulic System Repair: Troubleshoot and overhaul complex Cat hydraulic systems, including pumps, cylinders, and control valves, ensuring they meet factory pressure specifications.
  
  
Powertrain & Engine Overhaul: Perform "mid-life" or major overhauls on Cat diesel engines (e.g., C7, C9, C15) and transmissions, often working in the dust-controlled environment of the central workshop.
  
  
Undercarriage Maintenance: Inspect and repair Cat track systems, including rollers, idlers, and track tensioning, which wear rapidly in Kuwait’s abrasive desert sand.
  
  
**Qualification:**
Technical Certification: Completion of the Cat ThinkBig program or an equivalent Heavy Equipment Diploma is highly preferred by Kuwaiti firms like Al-Bahar (the local Cat dealer).
  
  
System Knowledge: Mastery of Cat SIS (Service Information System) for retrieving parts manuals and repair procedures.
  
  
Experience – 5 to 7 Years in Kuwait
  
  

* Senior mechanic - Hydraulic system specialist.

**Job Description**
System Diagnostics: Use pressure gauges and flow meters to troubleshoot hydraulic circuits. You'll identify if a loss of power is due to a pump failure, a leaking control valve, or internal cylinder bypass.
  
  
Component Overhaul: Disassemble and rebuild high-pressure hydraulic pumps (piston, gear, or vane), motors, and multi-spool control valves to factory specifications.
  
  
Cylinder Servicing: Reseal and re-chrome hydraulic cylinders and jacks. In Kuwait's abrasive sand, rod seals fail frequently; you are responsible for ensuring zero leaks.
  
  
Hose Fabrication: Operate hose crimping machinery to manufacture custom high-pressure hoses (up to 6,000 PSI) for field replacements.
  
  
Fluid Management: Monitor hydraulic oil quality and filtration. You’ll coordinate with the Maintenance Manager to schedule oil flushing to prevent "varnishing" caused by extreme summer heat.
  
  
Qualifications: Technical Expertise: Mastery of reading hydraulic schematics (ISO symbols) to trace circuits across complex machines like CAT or Komatsu.
  
  
Precision Tooling: Proficiency with micrometers and calipers to measure tolerances in pump housings and valves.
  
  
Education: Vocational diploma in Fluid Power or Mechanical Engineering.
  
  
Experience: Usually 5+ years specifically in heavy-duty hydraulics. Experience with closed-loop hydrostatic drives is a major advantage.
  
  

* Senior Diesel mechanic.

**Job Description:**
Diagnose and repair diesel engines used in oilfield equipment (generators, cranes, pumps, compressors, trucks)
  
  
Perform preventive and corrective maintenance to minimize downtime in remote field operations
  
  
Troubleshoot mechanical, hydraulic, and electrical faults using advanced diagnostic tools
  
  
Overhaul engines, fuel injection systems, and transmissions
  
  
Supervise and mentor junior mechanics and workshop staff
  
  
Ensure compliance with company HSE (Health, Safety & Environment) policies and Kuwait oilfield regulations
  
  
Conduct equipment inspections before deployment to field locations
  
  
Maintain accurate maintenance logs, service reports, and work orders
  
  
Coordinate with procurement teams for spare parts and inventory control
  
  
Support emergency breakdown repairs in field conditions (on-call duties)
  
  
**Education:**
Diploma or Technical Certification in Diesel Mechanics or Heavy Equipment Maintenance
  
  
Relevant OEM certifications (e.g., Caterpillar, Cummins) preferred
  
  
HSE certifications (e.g., NEBOSH, OSHA) are a strong advantage
  
  
Valid driving license (Kuwait or transferable GCC license preferred)
  
  
**Experience:**
Minimum 5 years of experience in diesel engine repair, preferably in oil & gas or heavy equipment
  
  

* Senior heavy equipment electrician

**Job Description:**
Diagnose and repair electrical faults in heavy equipment such as excavators, loaders, cranes, generators, and oilfield machinery
  
  
Troubleshoot wiring systems, control modules (ECMs), sensors, and CAN bus systems
  
  
Perform preventive maintenance on electrical systems to reduce downtime
  
  
Read and interpret electrical schematics, wiring diagrams, and technical manuals
  
  
Install, repair, and calibrate electrical components and systems
  
  
Work on battery systems, alternators, starters, lighting, and control panels
  
  
Support engine diagnostics related to electronic control systems
  
  
Supervise and mentor junior electricians and technicians
  
  
Ensure compliance with HSE (Health, Safety & Environment) standards in oilfield operations
  
  
Maintain accurate service reports, inspection records, and maintenance logs
  
  
**Education:**
Diploma or Technical Certification in Electrical Engineering or Heavy Equipment Electrical Systems
  
  
OEM certifications (e.g., Caterpillar, Komatsu) are an advantage
  
  
HSE certifications such as NEBOSH or OSHA preferred
  
  
**Experience:**
Minimum 5 years of experience in heavy equipment electrical systems, preferably in oil & gas or heavy equipment
  
  
If interested please send your cv to info@tcpcest.com

data.jd_text:
Document controller Gradiant Muscat LLC Muscat, Oman 3/16/26 Engineering
  
  
**About Gradiant**
Gradiant is a Different Kind of Water Company. With a full suite of differentiated and proprietary end-to-end solutions for advanced water and wastewater treatment powered by the top minds in water, the company serves its clients’ mission-critical operations in the world’s essential industries, including semiconductors, pharmaceuticals, food & beverage, lithium and critical minerals, and renewable energy. Gradiant’s innovative solutions reduce water used and wastewater discharged, reclaim valuable resources, and renew wastewater into freshwater. The Boston-headquartered company was founded at MIT and has over 1,400 employees worldwide. Discover us at www.gradiant.com.
  
  
**Job Overview**
We are looking for an Omani Document Controller with a minimum of 4 years of experience to join our team. The candidate will be responsible for managing, tracking, filing, and controlling project documents to ensure proper documentation flow and timely submission of records for water and wastewater treatment projects.
  
  
The role includes coordinating with project teams, consultants, subcontractors, and clients to maintain updated drawings, technical submittals, correspondence, reports, and quality records in an organized and efficient manner.
  
  
**Specific Duties/Responsibilities**

* To collaborate with project teams, vendors, and stakeholders to ensure timely distribution, retrieval, and archiving of project documents.
* Develop and implement document control procedures compliance with industry standards, and organizational policies.
* Maintain document confidentiality by enforcing access controls, conducting periodic audits, and ensuring overall security of sensitive information.
* Coordinate the transmittal distribution, review, approval, and timely return of project documents.
* Ensure all stakeholders have access to the latest, accurate, and approved project documents.
* Administer and maintain the Electronic Document Management System (EDMS), ensuring data integrity and proper archiving.
* Monitor document workflows to ensure on-time delivery (OTD).
* Provide training and support to internal teams on document control procedures and systems.
* Prepare reports on document control activities to monitor Project Schedule.
* Manage document revision control, ensuring proper handling of obsolete, void, and superseded documents with complete records.
* Ensure all documents comply with internal standards & client requirements.
* Track and monitor project documentation progress to ensure alignment with project schedules.
* Manage EDMS document control software (e.g., ACC Docs.) and administer project-specific document numbering systems.

**Requirements**

* Any Graduation or Diploma with relevant work experience
* Omani national
* Experience in document control for construction or infrastructure projects preferred
* Good knowledge of document management systems, filing, and record keeping
* Proficiency in MS Office and document tracking tools
* Good communication and coordination skills
* Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in industrial engineering & Construction firm, with experience in managing and organizing documents within an organization.

Gradiant is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will be considered without regard to race, color, religion, creed, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, national origin, age, veteran status, disability, or any other protected class.

**Job Purpose:**

The Officer – Loan Review supports the review and assessment of loan portfolios and ensures adherence to established policies and procedures. He/She assists in reviewing loan documentation for accuracy, completeness, and compliance with regulatory and internal requirements. The Officer – Loan Review supports the monitoring of loan classifications, maintains accurate loan review records, and highlights potential risks. He/She contributes to the preparation of reports and communicates observations to support effective loan review processes.

**Key Accountabilities:**

* Reviews loan documentation to ensure accuracy, completeness, and compliance with approved policies and procedures.
* Identifies documentation gaps, inconsistencies, and potential risks and escalates findings to the concerned stakeholders.
* Supports the monitoring of loan classification and declassification in line with regulatory guidelines and internal frameworks.
* Assists in maintaining accurate and up-to-date loan review records, reports, and documentation.
* Coordinates with relevant departments to obtain required information and to support timely completion of loan reviews.
* Follows established procedures and guidelines to ensure consistency and compliance in loan review activities.
* Supports the implementation of improvements in loan review processes based on identified observations.
* Maintains awareness of applicable regulations, policies, and lending standards to support compliant practices.
* Stays current on the latest lending regulations and changes to loan process policies.

**Qualifications and Experience:**

* Bachelor's Degree in Banking & Finance or Accounting.
* Fresh graduate with 0 years of experience, registered as unemployed and have no registered work history.
* Demonstrates basic understanding of lending principles and loan documentation.
* Shows awareness of local central bank regulations related to lending.
* Understands basic concepts of Credit Risk Management and Loan Review processes.
* Exhibits basic awareness of IFRS 9 and Expected Credit Loss (ECL) concepts.

We are seeking a General Manager (Business Development & Operations) to oversee and grow our business in Muscat. data.raw_snippet:
**Purpose/ Mission:**
The HR Manager is responsible for leading the human resources function within the steel manufacturing company, ensuring the development and implementation of HR strategies, policies, and programs that support the organization's objectives. This role requires strong leadership,
data.search_title: "Saudi German Hospital Group" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Purpose/ Mission:**
The HR Manager is responsible for leading the human resources function within the steel manufacturing company, ensuring the development and implementation of HR strategies, policies, and programs that support the organization's objectives. This role requires strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills, as well as in-depth knowledge of HR best practices and labor laws. The HR Manager will play a key role in recruiting and retaining top talent, fostering a positive work environment, and driving employee engagement and performance.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities:**

* Develop, review, and implement company HR policies and procedures to ensure alignment with Omani labor laws and international best practices.
* Ensure compliance with legal and regulatory requirements in all HR processes, including audits, reporting, and documentation.
* Oversee the collection, management, and protection of employees' personal data in line with data privacy regulations.
* Lead communication of HR policies, updates, and programs to all employees; act as a key point of contact for HR-related matters.
* Supervise and ensure the accuracy of payroll processing for employees in Oman, in collaboration with Finance and external vendors.
* Design, oversee, and continuously improve employee benefits programs to enhance retention and employee satisfaction.
* Manage full-cycle recruitment, working closely with external partners and internal hiring managers—oversee sourcing strategy, interviews, selection, and offer negotiation.
* Oversee visa and work permit processes for international staff, ensuring legal compliance and timely renewals.
* Act as a strategic partner to business leaders by participating in cross-functional initiatives to drive employee engagement, performance, and operational effectiveness.
* Guide and support line managers in developing and delivering employee development programs—including leadership development, DE&I (diversity, equity & inclusion), and performance management training.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to department heads and supervisors on employee relations, disciplinary procedures, and conflict resolution.
* Monitor HR trends, laws, and emerging practices; provide recommendations for continuous improvement and strategic initiatives.
* Lead or contribute to HR projects related to organizational growth, cultural integration, and internal communications.
* Provide hands-on support to the Director of Operations in matters related to people management, compliance, and organizational development.

**Support the Director Operations in all relevant tasks where requested.**
**Requirements/ Skills/ Experience:**

* Omani nationals only
* Minimum of 8-10 years of experience in human resources management, preferably in the steel industry or a related manufacturing sector.
* In-depth knowledge of labor laws, regulations, and HR best practices in Oman.
* Has expertise in work permits/visa matters.

data.raw_snippet:
**ABOUT GROUP-IB:**

Founded in 2003 and headquartered in Singapore, Group-IB is a leading creator of cybersecurity technologies to investigate, prevent, and fight digital crime. Combating cybercrime is in the company’s DNA, shaping its technological capabilities to defend businesses, and citizens,
data.search_title: "Saudi German Hospital Group" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**ABOUT GROUP-IB:**

Founded in 2003 and headquartered in Singapore, Group-IB is a leading creator of cybersecurity technologies to investigate, prevent, and fight digital crime. Combating cybercrime is in the company’s DNA, shaping its technological capabilities to defend businesses, and citizens, and support law enforcement operations.

Group-IB’s Digital Crime Resistance Centers (DCRCs) are located in the Middle East, Europe, Central Asia, and Asia-Pacific to help critically analyze and promptly mitigate regional and country-specific threats. These mission-critical units help Group-IB strengthen its contribution to global cybercrime prevention and continually expand its threat-hunting capabilities.

Each of us can help make the world a safer place. Join us!

**ABOUT THE ROLE:**

As a Business Development Manager at Group-IB, you will be a key member of our META Sales Team, focused on driving strategic growth and expanding our footprint across Kuwait &Oman. You will be generating high-value business opportunities, build trusted relationships with key stakeholders, and promote our advanced cybersecurity solutions across government, enterprise, and critical infrastructure sectors.This role is ideal for a motivated, self-starting sales professional who is passionate about cybersecurity and eager to make a tangible impact in one of the world’s most dynamic markets.

**YOUR MISSION**

* Lead sales growth Kuwait &Oman countries, targeting enterprise and strategic accounts while expanding existing customer relationships.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key financial services, government stakeholders in Oman, as well as senior decision-makers across diversified industries in Kuwait.
* Engage in consultative discussions to position solutions that support national digital transformation initiatives in Oman and sector-specific strategies in Kuwait.
* Drive opportunity identification by understanding customer cybersecurity maturity, regulatory requirements, and business priorities.
* Build and strengthen an established channel and alliance ecosystem, working closely with system integrators and technology partners.
* Execute proactive sales outreach, networking, and partner-driven initiatives to generate and qualify pipeline opportunities.
* Work cross-functionally with sales engineering, marketing, and partner teams to ensure cohesive go-to-market execution.
* Maintain accurate forecasting, pipeline visibility, and CRM reporting aligned with regional business objectives.
* Position Group-IB as a leading cybersecurity authority in the market through thought leadership and consultative customer engagement.

**WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:**

* Proven success in enterprise or strategic accounts sales within Oman & Kuwait markets, preferably in cybersecurity or enterprise technology.
* Strong understanding of local market conditions, compliance frameworks, and enterprise buying processes.
* Experience working with channel partners, system integrators, and alliance-driven sales models.
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills, with the ability to influence senior decision-makers.
* Minimum 8 years of B2B sales experience in cybersecurity, technology, or systems integration.
* High level of interest in cybersecurity innovation and evolving threat landscapes.
* Fluency in Arabic and English is required.

**OUR WORK ENVIRONMENT & CULTURE:**

At Group-IB, we believe that employee happiness is fundamental to success. We foster a supportive, inclusive, and dynamic workplace where every team member is empowered to grow. Whether you’re aiming to deepen your expertise, step into leadership, explore new departments, or take your career abroad, we provide diverse opportunities for professional development.

Our team is made up of specialists from around the world who bring deep international expertise and thrive on solving complex challenges. You’ll be working with cutting-edge technologies recognized globally by Gartner, IDC, and Forrester, and contributing to projects that span across 60 countries alongside 450+ partners and 500+ clients.

We take pride in our multicultural, values-driven culture—where mutual respect, collaboration, and shared goals unite us across borders. And with Group-IB’s continued global growth and financial stability, your career trajectory here can accelerate faster than in most traditional environments.

**WHAT DO WE OFFER**
:

* Flexible Work Schedule: We don’t believe in fixed hours—what matters is impact, not time spent. You have the freedom to design your own workday in a way that drives results and balance.
* Comprehensive Health Coverage: Your well-being comes first. We offer health insurance to support you when it matters most.
* Certifications & Continuous Learning: Our team holds over 1,000 globally recognized certifications, including CEH, CISSP, OSCP, and more. Through our incentive program, we cover the cost of professional development—because your growth fuels our innovation.
* Meaningful Challenges & Growth Paths: From soft skills development to advanced technical training, a wide range of internal programs help you expand your skill set—and earn recognition and rewards along the way.
* Entrepreneurial spirit is encouraged: We value initiative. Whether it’s launching a tech blog, organizing events, building communities, or starting a sports team—Group-IB is a place where bold ideas are supported and celebrated.

data.search_title: "Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
Database Administration and Maintenance

* Administer, maintain, and support MS SQL, Oracle, and Sybase databases across production, DR, and test environments.
* Install, configure, and maintain database management systems (DBMS) such as Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Sybase, or MongoDB
* Monitor database performance, identify bottlenecks, and implement tuning solutions
* Implement and maintain the Minimum Baseline (MSB) for all databases in accordance with the bank’s standards.
* Conduct regular performance tuning, capacity planning, and data integrity checks
* Design and maintain database schemas, indexes, and queries
* Troubleshoot database issues and provide timely resolution
* Implement and maintain access controls, roles, and permissions

Security, Patching, and Compliance

* Apply security patches and upgrades as recommended by internal security assessments or vendor advisories.
* Ensure all databases meet compliance requirements related to security, access control, and data privacy.
* Monitor and mitigate database vulnerabilities through proactive controls and vendor coordination.
* Ensure data integrity, security, and compliance with company policies and regulations
* Manage database upgrades, patches, and migrations

Issue Resolution and Support

* Collaborate with other team members on handling tasks and knowledge sharing
* Troubleshoot and resolve database incidents and performance issues in coordination with IT applications and infrastructure teams.
* Provide support for banking applications that interface with the databases, ensuring smooth data operations.
* Coordinate with principal vendors for escalated issues and advanced technical support.
* Work closely with developers and system administrators to support applications

Backup and Recovery

* Ensure scheduled backups are successfully performed and recovery processes are tested regularly.
* Maintain disaster recovery plans and ensure readiness of DR systems.
* Perform database backup, recovery, and disaster-recovery planning

Capacity and Change Management

* Monitor database usage trends and conduct capacity planning to avoid resource bottlenecks.
* Participate in change management processes, including review and execution of database-related changes in alignment with ITIL standards.
* Manage and maintain database availability and resiliency across all datacenters

Requirements
  
  

* Omani nationals only
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science or engineering
* Minimum 6 years of hands-on experience as a DBA, preferably within the banking sector

data.jd_text:
**About PulseMediaNL**
PulseMediaNL is a forward-thinking digital marketing agency delivering innovative, data-driven solutions for healthcare, medical, and wellness brands. We help our clients achieve sustainable growth through high-performance campaigns, strategic insights, and creative digital experiences.
  
  
As we continue to expand globally, we are seeking a
**Junior Front-End Developer (Remote)**
based in the
**MENA region**
to join our growing remote team. This role is ideal for a motivated developer eager to build modern user interfaces, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and grow technically in a fast-paced, healthcare-focused environment.
  
  
If you’re passionate about front-end development, modern web technologies, and crafting engaging digital experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Front-End Development
  
  

* Develop and maintain responsive, user-friendly interfaces for healthcare and medical clients
* Convert UI/UX designs into clean, reusable, and high-quality front-end code
* Support the creation of landing pages, websites, and marketing assets for digital campaigns

Collaboration
  
  

* Work closely with designers, marketers, and project managers to ensure accurate and seamless implementation
* Support SEO, CRO, and performance-focused front-end updates

Performance & Optimization
  
  

* Optimize websites for speed, performance, and cross-browser compatibility
* Ensure consistent responsiveness across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
* Follow best practices for accessibility and usability

CMS & Content Management
  
  

* Assist with maintaining and updating CMS-based websites (primarily WordPress)
* Implement content updates, page layouts, and templates as needed

Quality Assurance
  
  

* Identify and resolve front-end bugs and UI inconsistencies
* Test features across browsers and devices to ensure reliability

Continuous Learning
  
  

* Stay current with modern front-end technologies and best practices
* Participate in code reviews and learn from senior developers

**Experience**
Required Qualifications
  
  

* 0–2 years of front-end development experience (including internships, freelance, or personal projects)
* Hands-on experience with live websites or applications is a plus

Education
  
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Web Development, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience

Technical Skills
  
  

* Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
* Understanding of responsive and mobile-first design
* Familiarity with front-end frameworks (React, Vue, or similar) is a plus
* Experience with WordPress or other CMS platforms preferred
* Basic understanding of SEO-friendly front-end practices

Tools
  
  

* Experience with Git or other version control systems
* Familiarity with Figma, Adobe XD, or similar design tools
* Basic knowledge of performance optimization and cross-browser testing

Soft Skills
  
  

* Strong attention to detail and problem-solving abilities
* Clear communication skills and comfort working remotely
* Willingness to learn, accept feedback, and grow
* Good time management and ability to meet deadlines

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, or similar frameworks
* Basic knowledge of WCAG accessibility standards
* Exposure to healthcare, medical, or regulated industries
* Familiarity with JavaScript build tools or workflows
* Fluent in English; Arabic is a strong advantage

Why Join PulseMediaNL?
  
  
**Compensation & Benefits**

* Competitive salary based on experience and skills
* Paid time off and holidays (based on country of residence)

Professional Growth
  
  

* Mentorship from experienced developers and designers
* Clear growth path toward mid-level front-end or full-stack roles
* Exposure to real-world healthcare projects and global clients

Remote-First Culture
  
  

* Fully remote role within the MENA region
* Flexible working hours and strong work-life balance
* Collaborative, remote-friendly workflows

Culture & Impact
  
  

* Innovative, supportive, and quality-driven team
* Learning-focused environment that encourages growth
* Opportunity to contribute to meaningful healthcare and wellness solutions

How to Apply
  
  
If you’re a motivated Junior Front-End Developer (Remote) based in the MENA region and excited to grow your career in a healthcare-focused digital agency, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and portfolio (if available).
  
  
**PulseMediaNL is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and value diverse perspectives.**

data.search_title: "Mediclinic Middle East" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Job Requisition ID:**
177186
  
  
Established in the 1930s as a trading business, Al-Futtaim Group today is one of the most diversified and progressive, privately held regional businesses headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Structured into five operating divisions; automotive, financial services, real estate, retail and healthcare; employing more than 35,000 employees across more than 20 countries in the Middle East, Asia and Africa, Al-Futtaim Group partners with over 200 of the world's most admired and innovative brands. Al-Futtaim Group’s entrepreneurship and relentless customer focus enables the organization to continue to grow and expand; responding to the changing needs of our customers within the societies in which we operate.
  
  
By upholding our values of respect, excellence, collaboration and integrity; Al-Futtaim Group continues to enrich the lives and aspirations of our customers each and every day
  
  
**Overview Of The Role**
As an Administrative Executive, you will support Trading Enterprises brands—Honda, CJDR, Volvo, by ensuring smooth and efficient back office operations. You will play a key role in enhancing administrative processes across Sales, Aftersales, Marketing, HR, Finance, and Compliance, enabling teams to deliver a seamless customer and employee experience.
  
  
**What You Will Do**

* Conduct User Acceptance Testing (UAT) for sales teams, troubleshoot SAP and Connect systems, and support back-office invoicing activities.
* Manage pricing and discount updates, support showroom invoicing during staff absence, maintain monthly campaign setups, and handle down payment assistance in SAP.
* Process asset requisitions and procurement needs for Network & Facilities, Marketing, Sales, and Aftersales projects and operations.
* Manage recovery and invoice corrections related to short collections and upsells from showroom and aftersales.
* Ensure employees are aligned to the correct org units/cost centres and process manpower requisitions, vacancies, leavers, and replacement roles.
* Work closely with Real Estate and Network teams to support new location setups, refurbishments, AMC renewals, trade licenses, CI compliance, and other facility requirements.

**Required Skills To Be Successful**

* 2–3 years of experience in retail sales or a similar administrative support environment.
* Bachelor’s degree preferred.
* Experience in SAP, Ariba P2P, and MS Excel (advantageous).
* Excellent communication—written, verbal, and presentation.

**About The Team**
You will be part of the Central Administration function, supporting multiple automotive brands within Trading Enterprises. The team works collaboratively with Sales, Aftersales, Marketing, Human Resources, Finance, Network & Facilities, and Compliance to deliver seamless operational excellence across the UAE.
  
  
**What Equips You For The Role**

* Strong organizational foundations and ability to manage diverse tasks.
* Technical understanding of ERP and procurement systems (SAP, Ariba P2P preferred).
* A proactive, self driven approach and strong accountability.
* Ability to work across departments and support multiple stakeholders simultaneously.
* Proactive attitude with strong initiative and commitment to deadlines.
* Team player with proven cross functional collaboration.
* Ability to clearly communicate processes and respond to queries.

We’re here to provide excellent service but a little help from you can ensure a five-star candidate experience from start to finish.
  
  
Before you click “apply”: Please read the job description carefully to ensure you can confidently demonstrate why this opportunity is right for you and take the time to put together a well-crafted and personalised CV to further boost your visibility. Our global Talent Acquisition team members are all assigned to specific businesses to ensure that we make the best matches between talent and opportunities. We not only consider the requisite compatibility of skills and behaviours, but also how candidates align with our Values of Respect, Integrity, Collaboration, and Excellence.
  
  
As part of our candidate experience promise, we also want to make ourselves available to you throughout the application process. We make every effort to review and respond to every application.
  
  
Additional Internal Information:
  
  

* Reports to: Sr. Operations & Planning Manager
* Band: F

**Note:-**
You must have been an Al-Futtaim employee for at least 18 months in order to be considered.
  
  
You must inform your HRBP in confidence of your application.
  
  
Please note that this vacancy may be advertised externally in the next week so apply without delay.

Job Purpose

We are seeking a highly skilled Power Apps Developer to design, develop, and implement enterprise-level solutions using Microsoft Power Platform. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience with Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, and integrations with Microsoft 365 and Azure services. This role requires strong problem-solving skills, and experience delivering scalable business applications.

Principal Accountabilities

**General**

* Should be able to work independently as well as in team. Must possess good analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Should be able to effectively communicate (verbal or in written) with Customers, team members and Product vendors on the matters related to all functional or technical areas
* Documents and maintain Knowledge database to share experience and knowledge with team members in order to enhance efficiency and reduce single person dependence
* Coordinate work tasks with Customer, team members, and Product Vendors to perform the tasks assigned efficiently in Timely manner
* Analyses business needs and conceptualises solutions to meet and exceed customer expectations
* Should be Customer centric, achieve customer satisfaction and maintain proper perspective in all activities.

**Operational**

* Design, develop, and deploy Canvas and Model-Driven apps using Microsoft Power Apps
* Build and manage automated workflows using Microsoft Power Automate
* Design and manage data models within Microsoft Dataverse
* Integrate Power Platform solutions with:
* **Microsoft 365**
* **Microsoft Dynamics 365**
* **Microsoft Azure**
* **Third-party systems via APIs and custom connectors**
* Develop custom components using Power Apps Component Framework (PCF), and Power Apps plugins.
* Implement role-based security and governance best practices
* Optimize app performance, scalability, and maintainability
* Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions
* Support DevOps practices including solution packaging and deployment pipelines
* Troubleshoot and resolve production issues
* Attention to detail and commitment to high-quality, error-free deliverables
* Should have good understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
* Good communication skills suitable for liaison with departmental staff and business stakeholders
* Ability to produce technical documentation and participate in technical discussions
* Must be motivated, independent, and self-sufficient; able to receive an assigned task and see it through to completion with minimal supervision.

**Education**

* Degree: Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering or equivalent
* Microsoft Power Platform certifications (PL-400, PL-600) are a plus.

**Experience**

* 5+ years of experience in application development
* 3+ years of hands-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform
* Strong knowledge of:
* Canvas Apps & Model-Driven Apps
* Power Automate
* Dataverse data modeling
* REST APIs & custom connectors
* JavaScript, TypeScript, C#, .NET
* Experience integrating with Azure services (Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus)
* Strong understanding of ALM (Application Lifecycle Management)
* Experience with DevOps and CI/CD pipelines.
* Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Experience with Power BI integration is a plus.
* Experience with Copilot Studio, AI Builder, and RPA are a plus.

**What you'll do:**

Team noon has some of the fastest, smartest, and hardest-working people we've encountered. With a young, aggressive, and talented team, we're driving major missions forward.

The Supervisor will be responsible for managing end-to-end store operations, ensuring smooth day-to-day functioning, adherence to operational protocols, and delivery of high standards in inventory management, customer experience, and team performance.

* Own and manage the end-to-end store operations, ensuring efficiency, accuracy, and compliance with company standards.
* Ensure strict adherence to inventory management protocols, including:
* Maintaining 5S standards within the store
* Conducting weekly stock checks and daily inventory walks
* Performing regular security audits
* Lead and manage a team comprising shift leaders, logistics associates, delivery associates, warehouse staff, and cashiers to ensure optimal performance.
* Oversee payroll and attendance processes, ensuring timely closure as per defined timelines.
* Monitor and track key store performance metrics, identifying gaps and driving corrective actions.
* Ensure compliance with all applicable legal and local regulatory requirements.
* Conduct monthly store audits to ensure proper inventory placement and adherence to company policies.
* Own and drive key metrics related to inventory management, delivery experience, and customer satisfaction.
* Ensure all team members are adequately trained and equipped to perform their roles effectively.
* Take proactive actions during operational challenges and escalate issues in a timely manner when required.
* Manage store cash operations, including reconciliation and timely deposits.
* Plan and optimize workforce rosters for warehouse and delivery staff to ensure productivity and performance targets are met.
* Prepare and share daily reports on store performance and operational metrics.
* Identify opportunities to increase order volumes by improving serviceability and operational efficiency.

**What you'll need:**

* Bachelor’s degree in any relevant field.
* 3–6 years of relevant experience in operations, preferably in a supervisory or team leadership role.
* Industry experience in e-commerce, logistics, warehousing, or retail operations is mandatory.
* Strong understanding of Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets, with the ability to analyze and interpret data effectively.
* Good numerical and analytical skills, with strong attention to detail.
* Proven experience in team management and driving performance in a fast-paced environment.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to handle multiple priorities and work under pressure.
* Proactive problem-solving mindset with the ability to take ownership and drive results.

**Who will excel?**

* We’re looking for people with high standards, who understand that hard work matters.
* You need to be relentlessly resourceful and operate with a deep bias for action.
* We need people with the courage to be fiercely original.
* noon is not for everyone; readiness to adapt, pivot, and learn is essential.

data.search_title: "Mediclinic Middle East" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Our Client**

Our client is a well-established, construction and EPC business in Oman, operating across civil, MEP, industrial, and commercial projects. With a strong legacy of delivery and recent strategic alignment with a larger regional group, the company is entering a new phase of structured growth, governance, and operational scale-up.

The business manages a diverse project portfolio and is now looking to appoint a General Manager to take full ownership of operations, drive performance, and lead the organization through its next stage of evolution.

**Your Role**

As General Manager, you will act as the senior operational leader of the business, translating strategic direction into disciplined execution across all functions. You will lead all Heads of Department, oversee the full project portfolio, and ensure delivery, profitability, governance, and client satisfaction are consistently achieved.

Key responsibilities include:

* Lead end-to-end operations across all departments, ensuring alignment with business strategy and performance targets
* Drive annual business planning, setting clear priorities, milestones, and resource allocation across functions
* Manage and hold accountable all Heads of Department through structured performance reviews and KPI tracking
* Oversee the full project portfolio, ensuring delivery on time, within budget, and to required quality and safety standards
* Act as the primary escalation point for operational, commercial, and client-related issues
* Ensure seamless coordination across Business Development, Pre-Contracts, Post-Contracts, and Execution teams
* Oversee tendering strategy, bid pipeline, and contract handover processes to minimize commercial and operational risk
* Drive financial performance, including budget control, margin protection, cost management, and receivables tracking
* Strengthen governance, internal controls, and compliance with corporate policies, audit requirements, and authority frameworks
* Oversee procurement, supply chain, plant, and resource utilization to support efficient project execution
* Champion HSE and QA/QC standards across all operations, ensuring compliance with ISO and local regulatory requirements
* Lead workforce planning, talent development, and succession planning in coordination with HR
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key clients, consultants, and stakeholders
* Provide structured reporting, MIS, and performance insights to senior leadership and the board

**Must-Have**

* 15+ years of experience in the construction / EPC / contracting industry
* Proven track record in a General Manager, Operations Director, COO, or similar leadership role
* Experience managing multi-project portfolios across civil, MEP, and building construction
* Strong commercial acumen, with hands-on exposure to contracts, claims, cost control, and margin management
* Demonstrated ability to lead and manage cross-functional teams and senior stakeholders (HOD level)
* Experience operating within structured, governance-driven environments, ideally within group or board-led organizations
* Strong understanding of tendering, project lifecycle, and delivery frameworks
* Experience in the GCC region preferred; Oman experience is an advantage
* Ability to operate effectively in founder-led or transitioning organizations, balancing execution with structure
* Strong leadership presence with the ability to drive accountability and performance across teams

**Next Steps**

Upload your resume via our ATS platform and ensure all form details are complete. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted within 5–7 working days for a more detailed discussion about the role. Please note, due to high application volumes, we will only respond to shortlisted profiles.

data.jd_text:
Accounts Manager Gradiant Muscat LLC Muscat, Oman 4/15/26 Finance
  
  
**About Gradiant**
Gradiant is a Different Kind of Water Company. With a full suite of differentiated and proprietary end-to-end solutions for advanced water and wastewater treatment powered by the top minds in water, the company serves its clients’ mission-critical operations in the world’s essential industries, including semiconductors, pharmaceuticals, food & beverage, lithium and critical minerals, and renewable energy. Gradiant’s innovative solutions reduce water used and wastewater discharged, reclaim valuable resources, and renew wastewater into freshwater. The Boston-headquartered company was founded at MIT and has over 1,400 employees worldwide. Discover us at www.gradiant.com.
  
  
**Job Overview**
The Business Finance Manager oversees the organization's financial operations, including general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, payroll, taxation, and reporting. They ensure accurate financial records, implement internal controls, and maintain compliance with regulatory standards. This role drives process improvements, manages budgets and forecasts, and provides strategic insights through financial analysis. The manager supports cross-functional collaboration, translates financial data for non-finance stakeholders, and ensures optimal cash flow and working capital management. They also oversee risk mitigation and support audit and compliance efforts.
  
  
**Specific Duties/Responsibilities**
**Accounting Operation**

* Manage general ledger accounts payable/receivable, payroll, and tax functions.
* Ensure proper recording of financial transactions.
* Oversee correctness of data and reports generated from the system.
* Implement and maintain internal controls and accounting policies.
* Supervise accounting teams.

**System & Process Improvement**

* Streamline financial processes and systems.
* Identify bottlenecks, redundancies, or areas prone to error and find solution to improve the process.
* Ensure all process changes support audit trails and compliance standards.
* Ensure the finance function supports broader business goals efficiently.

**Financial Reporting & Compliance**

* Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements and management reports.
* Ensure compliance with financial regulations, internal controls, and audit requirements.
* Coordinate with external auditors and regulatory bodies when necessary.

**Budgeting & Forecasting**

* Provide historical data and trends for better insights on forecast.
* Manage annual/quarterly budgets and rolling forecasts.
* Analyse trends, variances, and business drivers to provide actionable insights.

**Local Cash & Treasury Management**

* Oversee cash flow, banking relationships and liquidity planning.
* Manage working capital and ensure optimal use of financial resources.
* Credit Controllership to manage collection and risk assessment on accounts.

**Cross-Functional Collaboration**

* Collaborate with Sales, Operations, HR, and other departments to align financial targets.
* Translate financial concepts for non-finance stakeholders to support informed decision-making.
* Support financial aspects of cross-functional projects and initiatives.

**Risk Management & Governance**

* Identify financial and operational risks; recommend and implement mitigation strategies.
* Maintain strong internal controls and ensure risk awareness across teams.

**Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.
* Deep understanding of accounting principles and regulations.
* Strong analytical and quantitative skills with the ability to interpret complex data sets.
* Strong leadership and communication skills.
* High attention to detail and accuracy.
* Strong time management and organizational abilities, especially under pressure or tight deadlines.
* Problem-solving mindset with adaptability in dynamic environments.
* Advance Knowledge in Microsoft excel and ERP systems expertise.
* 7-8 years of progressive experience in financial planning & analysis, corporate finance, or business finance.
* Prior experience in Financial reporting, budgeting, forecasting is essential.
* CA, CPA, CMA, ACCA or equivalent certified (preferred, not required).

Gradiant is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will be considered without regard to race, color, religion, creed, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, national origin, age, veteran status, disability, or any other protected class.

data.jd_text:
**🚀 Welcome to Your Next Adventure!**
We are looking for a hands-on and entrepreneurial
**Finance Lead**
to join our team at Snoonu. In this role, you will take full ownership of the finance function in the early stages, acting as a one-person finance team and working closely with the CFO to build strong financial foundations. You will set up financial processes from scratch and support strategic decisions through solid financial insights. This is an exciting opportunity to shape the financial operations of a scaling business and grow alongside the company.
  
  
**🛠 What You’ll Get Your Hands On**

* Manage end-to-end financial operations including accounting, reporting, budgeting, and forecasting
* Build and implement financial processes, controls, and systems from the ground up
* Prepare monthly financial statements, management reports, and cash flow analysis
* Work closely with the CFO on financial planning, strategy, and key business decisions
* Oversee compliance with local regulations, audits, and tax requirements
* Support cross-functional teams with financial insights to drive growth and operational efficiency

**🧙‍♂️ The Magic You Bring**

* 5–8 years of experience in finance, accounting, or financial operations
* Previous experience working in a startup or high-growth tech environment
* Strong understanding of financial reporting, budgeting, and internal controls
* Ability to work independently and build finance processes from scratch
* Excellent analytical skills and a data-driven mindset
* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field
* Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment and collaborating with multiple teams

**✨ Bonus Points If You Have**

* CPA/ACCA/CFA is a plus

**Inside Snoonu’s Universe**
Snoonu is Qatar’s homegrown Super App, reinventing daily life with blazing-fast delivery, shopping, and more – all in one place. Powered by tech, driven by a global team, and obsessed with making life easier.
  
  
**The Dream We’re Chasing**
To be the first Qatari Ultra App that propels the region and its community through innovation and technology. We have global ambitions where what we do surpasses norms and limitations every time.
  
  
**The Quest We’re On**
To radically transform how people live by leveraging technology to connect them with endless possibilities.
  
  
**Our Everyday Superpowers**
**👥 Be Customer Obsessed**
: “Focus on the customer and all else will follow.”
  
  
**💪 Act with Integrity:**
“We are honest, ethical, and trustworthy in everything we do.”
  
  
**🧪 Be Curious and Creative:**
“We constantly innovate and create solutions to bring a lasting positive impact.”
  
  
**🏅Lead by Example and Take Ownership:**
“Be the change you want to see and take ownership.”
  
  
**🚀 Work Smart and Deliver Results**
: “You can do more by doing less, better, and faster.”
  
  
**👨‍💼 It's All About People:**
“Be a team player; together we are stronger.”
  
  
**Perks & Worklife Magic At Snoonu**
**🌐 Global Vibes**
– Collaborate with a worldwide crew.
  
  
**🧠 Brain Boosters**
– Learning budgets, access to courses, and tools for your growth.
  
  
🚒
**Builder’s Playground**
– Own your tasks, own your path! We’re big on autonomy.
  
  
🏝️
**Flexible Time Off**
– We take recharging seriously. Generous leave and wellness policies.
  
  
🛠️
**Agile Everything**
– Scrum isn’t a buzzword here. It’s how we roll, from product to ops.
  
  
**Great Place to Work® Certified**
We’re certified as a Great Place to Work®, a recognition that celebrates a culture we’ve built together where people come first, always. This certification reflects our commitment to creating a workplace where everyone feels valued, empowered, and inspired to do their best work.
  
  
**Certified for Excellence**
Our ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018 certifications demonstrate our dedication to world-class quality and a safe, supportive workplace, reinforcing our promise to deliver exceptional service while prioritizing the wellbeing of our people.
  
  
**Beyond the Code: Giving Back Matters**
We don’t just build apps. We’re committed to doing business sustainably and giving back to the community that fuels us. From eco-conscious practices to CSR projects, we’re always finding ways to do better—and we invite you to be a part of that mission.
  
  
**Diversity Isn’t Just a Buzzword**
At Snoonu, fairness and inclusion are the foundation of everything we do. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity workplace that welcomes people from every walk of life. Be bold. Be you. Thrive here.
  
  
**Let’s Build the Future Together**
Apply now to join a team where your contributions spark a change and your voice is heard. Let’s make some magic together.
  
  
Stay in the loop—connect with us on LinkedIn!

**Job Description**
The Security Analyst will participate and be part of information security monitoring and incident handling team in order to monitor and manage all information security incidents and risks and solve them as per the business security requirements. The Security Analyst will work and follow-up with the IT Teams and other Business Units to develop action plans to mitigate identified vulnerabilities and promote security initiatives.
  
  
Key Activities Include:
  
  

* Work as part of 24x7 security operation team
* Monitor the Security Information and Event Management System (SIEM) and follow up all related security incidents and events.
* Follow the day-to-day operations related to own job to ensure continuity of work
* Respond to security incidents and report on incident handling and resolution.
* Participate in forensic analysis and data recovery, and penetration testing.
* Perform daily security analysis and scanning and assessment for information security risks, threats and vulnerabilities.
* Proactive research to identify and understand new threats, vulnerabilities, and exploits.
* Configuration and administration of security systems and tools.
* Define and evaluate security technologies required to ensure safe technology operation and detection of cyber-attack.
* Provide the security recommendations on actions which assist in improving security posture within CLIENT Environment.
* Follow all relevant departmental policies, processes, standard operating procedures and instructions so that work is carried out in a controlled and consistent manner
* Participating in reviewing and documenting computer security and emergency gate identified vulnerabilities and promote security initiatives.

Qualifications
  
  

* Bachelor’s degree in IT, Engineering
