data.jd_text:
**About PulseMediaNL**
PulseMediaNL is a forward-thinking digital marketing agency delivering innovative, data-driven solutions for healthcare, medical, and wellness brands. We help our clients achieve sustainable growth through high-performance campaigns, strategic insights, and creative digital experiences.
  
  
As we continue to expand globally, we are seeking a
**Junior Front-End Developer (Remote)**
based in the
**MENA region**
to join our growing remote team. This role is ideal for a motivated developer eager to build modern user interfaces, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and grow technically in a fast-paced, healthcare-focused environment.
  
  
If you’re passionate about front-end development, modern web technologies, and crafting engaging digital experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Front-End Development
  
  

* Develop and maintain responsive, user-friendly interfaces for healthcare and medical clients
* Convert UI/UX designs into clean, reusable, and high-quality front-end code
* Support the creation of landing pages, websites, and marketing assets for digital campaigns

Collaboration
  
  

* Work closely with designers, marketers, and project managers to ensure accurate and seamless implementation
* Support SEO, CRO, and performance-focused front-end updates

Performance & Optimization
  
  

* Optimize websites for speed, performance, and cross-browser compatibility
* Ensure consistent responsiveness across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
* Follow best practices for accessibility and usability

CMS & Content Management
  
  

* Assist with maintaining and updating CMS-based websites (primarily WordPress)
* Implement content updates, page layouts, and templates as needed

Quality Assurance
  
  

* Identify and resolve front-end bugs and UI inconsistencies
* Test features across browsers and devices to ensure reliability

Continuous Learning
  
  

* Stay current with modern front-end technologies and best practices
* Participate in code reviews and learn from senior developers

**Experience**
Required Qualifications
  
  

* 0–2 years of front-end development experience (including internships, freelance, or personal projects)
* Hands-on experience with live websites or applications is a plus

Education
  
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Web Development, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience

Technical Skills
  
  

* Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
* Understanding of responsive and mobile-first design
* Familiarity with front-end frameworks (React, Vue, or similar) is a plus
* Experience with WordPress or other CMS platforms preferred
* Basic understanding of SEO-friendly front-end practices

Tools
  
  

* Experience with Git or other version control systems
* Familiarity with Figma, Adobe XD, or similar design tools
* Basic knowledge of performance optimization and cross-browser testing

Soft Skills
  
  

* Strong attention to detail and problem-solving abilities
* Clear communication skills and comfort working remotely
* Willingness to learn, accept feedback, and grow
* Good time management and ability to meet deadlines

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, or similar frameworks
* Basic knowledge of WCAG accessibility standards
* Exposure to healthcare, medical, or regulated industries
* Familiarity with JavaScript build tools or workflows
* Fluent in English; Arabic is a strong advantage

Why Join PulseMediaNL?
  
  
**Compensation & Benefits**

* Competitive salary based on experience and skills
* Paid time off and holidays (based on country of residence)

Professional Growth
  
  

* Mentorship from experienced developers and designers
* Clear growth path toward mid-level front-end or full-stack roles
* Exposure to real-world healthcare projects and global clients

Remote-First Culture
  
  

* Fully remote role within the MENA region
* Flexible working hours and strong work-life balance
* Collaborative, remote-friendly workflows

Culture & Impact
  
  

* Innovative, supportive, and quality-driven team
* Learning-focused environment that encourages growth
* Opportunity to contribute to meaningful healthcare and wellness solutions

How to Apply
  
  
If you’re a motivated Junior Front-End Developer (Remote) based in the MENA region and excited to grow your career in a healthcare-focused digital agency, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and portfolio (if available).
  
  
**PulseMediaNL is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and value diverse perspectives.**

data.jd_text:
With our groundbreaking satellite 5G constellation, OQ Technology is a global leader in the domain of IoT communication connectivity and associated services. We are a venture capital backed company with a successful track record of satellite launches and the first company in the world to disrupt the telecommunication industry by merging cellular 5G with satellites.

  

Our technology will have massive implications to the Oil & Gas, Maritime, Industry 4.0, and Transport segments, particularly for the management and tracking of assets in remote and rural areas and extending 5G coverage through non-terrestrial networks.

  

As our wireless technologies are constantly evolving and winning multiple awards, with funding for next phase secured, and commercial traction demonstrated, we are now looking to on-board a talented Sales and Business Development Manager to drive and execute the commercial activities of our organization.

  

You will lead the execution of the commercial strategy, build our sales and marketing organization to achieve our ambitious business targets for 2026 and beyond, and lead the efforts to grow our customer base and revenues.

  
Tasks
  

  
* In depth understanding and execution of the company go to market strategy (GTM) and team charter to achieve agreed objectives and to promote revenue, profitability, and growth.
  
* Ability to both ideate, develop, and execute a sales pipeline that delivers above market growth whilst managing priorities and challenges and overcoming them, with focus on MEA market.
  
* Meet and overachieve revenues and backlog objectives
  
* Intimate understanding of market, trends, customer segmentation and competitor activity, to determine target customer and sales planning per locations, segments, and service lines.
  
* Provide market intelligence feedback. Support generic business planning and general planning & execution processes.
  
* Assess, validate market strategy needs for differentiated global/regional services.
  
* Define strategic sales initiatives for the company and its Affiliates globally as well as generate sales leads and close contracts in accordance with set revenue objectives.
  
* Develop sales pipeline forecasting for both existing products and services along with new ideas for improvement and innovation to influence investment decisions.
  
* Identify commercial leads, elaborate client proposals, negotiate offers, execute sales, and manage relationships with existing and potential customers.
  
* Negotiate and close contracts – simplify the complex.
  
* New business development for MEA partners, and other yet TBC regions which fall under the scope of Regional Sales.
  
* Report directly to the CEO.
  

  
Requirements
  

  
* 5+ years experience in the sales and business development of satellite or mobile telecommunication solutions into key target M2M markets (including, but not limited to: Oil & Gas, Utilities, Maritime, Transport).
  
* Must have developed new business across Middle East region.
  
* Strategic Thinker with a Hunter Mentality and strong prospecting skills.
  
* Strong professional sales and presentation skills.
  
* Proven ability to negotiate.
  
* Successful and quantifiable “new business” sales track record; experienced in working to and exceeding targets.
  
* Ability to execute strategic initiatives and develop and close business autonomously and proactively (self-motivate).
  
* Ability to design and implement a business development strategy aligned with overall corporate goals.
  
* Ability to manage external account projects, while managing internal process and aligning key resources.
  
* Strong written, communication and organizational skills.
  
* University education within Engineering, Information Technology, Business, or other relevant area. Additional MBA is considered an advantage.
  
* Languages: English is a must, an additional language of the regions is a plus.

data.search_title: "Aster DM Healthcare" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Director of E-Commerce (Derm Brand) in Saudi Arabia.**
This role offers a unique opportunity to lead and scale a fast-growing, clinically driven skincare brand’s direct-to-consumer business. As the strategic owner of the e-commerce P&L, you will drive revenue growth, optimize the online customer experience, and maximize lifetime value. You will oversee the entire digital storefront, including site merchandising, CRO initiatives, subscription programs, and product launches, while aligning cross-functional teams to execute high-impact strategies. The ideal candidate is a data-driven leader with deep DTC experience, capable of balancing clinical education with performance optimization. This position provides high visibility, hands-on leadership, and the chance to shape the digital strategy of a premium skincare brand at scale.
  
  
Accountabilities
  
  

* Own and scale the DTC e-commerce business, driving revenue, conversion, average order value (AOV), and customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Develop and execute growth strategies aligned with brand objectives, forecasting performance, and managing the e-commerce P&L.
* Lead site experience optimization, including homepage, product pages, checkout flow, and subscription programs, leveraging CRO and analytics.
* Drive onsite merchandising strategy, product hierarchy, bundles, promotions, and new product launches in partnership with marketing and product teams.
* Serve as a cross-functional leader, connecting Growth, Creative, Product, Operations, and Customer Support to execute initiatives that maximize conversion and retention.
* Build, mentor, and manage a high-performing e-commerce team, alongside external partners and agencies.
* Establish KPIs, dashboards, and reporting frameworks to track performance and identify optimization opportunities.

**Requirements**

* 7+ years of e-commerce experience, with at least 3 years in a leadership role.
* Proven success scaling DTC e-commerce for skincare, beauty, wellness, or health-adjacent brands.
* Strong expertise in Shopify or equivalent platforms, CRO, subscriptions, and site merchandising.
* Data-driven mindset with experience managing revenue targets, forecasting, and P&L responsibilities.
* Excellent cross-functional communication and leadership skills, with experience managing teams and external partners.
* Preferred: experience with dermatologist-founded or clinically positioned brands, international e-commerce, omnichannel expansion, A/B testing, personalization, and retention tools.

**Benefits**

* Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.
* Comprehensive health coverage including medical, dental, and vision.
* Flexible work arrangements, including remote options.
* Professional growth opportunities in a fast-growing, premium skincare brand.
* Access to team-building initiatives, training programs, and industry events.
* Employee discounts and wellness benefits.

**How Jobgether Works**
We use an
**AI-powered matching process**
to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
  
  
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
  
  
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
  
  
**Data Privacy Notice:**
By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
  
  
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.raw_snippet:

We are seeking a visionary Head of People & Culture to shape the future of how people, culture, and organisations evolve. This is not a traditional HR role - it is a senior leadership position for someone who sees people strategy as a driver of creativity, performance and competitiv
data.search_title: "King Faisal Specialist Hospital" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Your mission**
We are seeking a visionary Head of People & Culture to shape the future of how people, culture, and organisations evolve. This is not a traditional HR role - it is a senior leadership position for someone who sees people strategy as a driver of creativity, performance and competitive advantage.
  
  
You will be responsible for designing bold, modern People & Culture approaches across the UAE, KSA, and Europe, helping the organisation move into the next era of growth. This role is ideal for someone who has challenged conventions, built progressive people models and helped organisations do things they had never done before.
  
  
Operational excellence matters - but it is not the core of this role. We are looking for a strategic thinker, culture shaper and organisational innovator who can reimagine what People & Culture can be.
  
  
Your key focus areas will be:
  
  
**Culture & Organisational Evolution**

* Act as a culture architect, defining and evolving values, behaviours and ways of working
* Design people experiences that enable trust, creativity, accountability and high performance
* Push the organisation toward more modern, progressive, and future-ready people practices

**Strategic Leadership**

* Being part of the leadership board, partner with senior management as a strategic advisor on organisational design, growth and culture
* Translate business ambition into people strategies that unlock long-term performance
* Influence at the highest levels, shaping how leadership thinks about people and culture

**Innovation in People & Culture**

* Introduce bold ideas, frameworks and systems that move beyond traditional HR models
* Challenge legacy thinking and experiment with new approaches to performance, engagement and growth
* Build people systems that are scalable, human-centred and data-informed, not bureaucratic

**Leadership Enablement**

* Coach and enable leaders to lead teams with confidence, empathy and clarity
* Build leadership capability in managing performance, change and growth
* Foster psychological safety, ownership and accountability across the organisation

**Governance (Supported, Not Central)**

* Oversee People & Culture operations at a strategic level, with execution managed by your team
* Ensure compliance frameworks exist across regions without becoming compliance-led or process-heavy
* Balance freedom and structure - keeping systems light, pragmatic and trust-based

**Your profile**
This role is for thought leaders, not traditional HR operators.
  
  
You are likely someone who:
  
  

* Has led People & Culture, Organisational Development or similar functions in progressive, creative or fast-evolving organisations
* Has introduced people practices or cultural shifts that didn’t previously exist in the organisation
* Thinks in systems, narratives and long-term impact - not just policies and processes
* Is comfortable challenging leadership, asking difficult questions and pushing boundaries
* Sees people strategy as a creative and strategic discipline, not an administrative one

**Experience & Perspective**

* Experience working with or across the UAE, KSA, Germany is valuable, but deep technical labour law expertise is not the priority
* Regional labour law knowledge can be supported by specialists - vision, strategy and leadership cannot
* Background in creative, experiential, project-based or innovation-driven environments is a strong advantage

**Capabilities**

* Strong strategic thinking with the ability to translate vision into action
* High emotional intelligence and influence at senior levels
* Excellent communication, storytelling, and alignment skills
* Comfortable navigating ambiguity, growth, and transformation

**Mindset**

* Curious, bold and experimental
* Willing to try, test, learn and evolve
* Motivated by building something meaningful rather than maintaining the status quo

**Why us?**

* Unified CAT A Silver Premium Medical Insurance provided as standard to all team members – yes, you read that correctly, we all enjoy the same insurance category benefits!
* Complimentary lunches provided daily in our Dubai office canteen.
* Team Engagement Initiatives – team-building activities, health and wellness drives, etc.
* Team Socials – team BBQs, season opening and closing parties.
* Worker’s Compensation and Accident Insurance.
* Annual Flight Allowance.
* Recruitment Referral Bonus Scheme for team members who refer successful applicants for our open positions.
* Project Referral Bonus Scheme for team members who refer successful project leads.
* The opportunity to work in an international and multi-cultural team with collaboration across our offices in the Middle East and Europe.
* Collaborative and motivated working environment.
* Trusting and partnership-based cooperation across all units.
* An innovative and growth-oriented company with a matrix organizational structure and an open corporate culture.

**About Us**
**BeWunder**
is your turnkey partner specializing in
**Event Production**
and
**Spatial Experiences**
.
  
  
We create inspiring and unforgettable experiences for our clients and their guests. Our renowned and highly-skilled team of industry experts in both live events and permanent construction is well-versed in bridging the gap between vision and reality. We design, deliver and service complex, challenging, and large-scale projects in the field of museums and exhibitions, EXPO and brand pavilions, visitor and experience centers, digital art spaces, live events - both corporate and sporting, as well as conferences and multimedia shows.
  
  
Our passion lies in producing multisensory and immersive experiences, a perfect blend of new technologies and content, staged lighting and interactive elements.
  
  
With our international track record in Europe, the Middle East and Asia, we are perfectly positioned to realize exceptional projects for our clients around the globe, from initial concept design through to final installation and beyond!

data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**DESCRIÇÃO**
O Grupo Pulsa está contratando Recepcionista! Venha fazer parte de um time que é essencial para a vida.
  
  
Somos o maior Grupo de Hemoterapia da América Latina e estamos prontos para ir além!
  
  
No Grupo Pulsa, somos um só time que pulsa o mesmo propósito: entregar segurança de ponta a ponta, acolher com humanidade e gerar resultados que realmente transformam vidas. Aqui, cada colaborador tem um papel fundamental na nossa missão e queremos pessoas que compartilhem desse mesmo ritmo.
  
  
Se você é comprometido, busca evolução contínua e quer fazer parte de uma organização que carrega a responsabilidade de ser essencial para a vida, seu lugar pode ser aqui.
  
  
**Principais Responsabilidades**
Organizar as atividades diárias de reposição de materiais e insumos e manter a área de trabalho limpa e organizada;
  
  
Realizar cadastro dos clientes de acordo com documento apresentado, identificar doador, paciente e acompanhante com segurança;
  
  
Participar na captação de doadores;
  
  
Auxiliar no contato com doador para comparecimento na unidade;
  
  
Atender chamadas telefônicas;
  
  
Marcar e controlar a agenda do ambulatório;
  
  
Organizar fila de doadores e preferência dos mesmos;
  
  
Registrar as visitas e os telefonemas recebidos. Auxiliar em pequenas tarefas de apoio administrativo;
  
  
Utilizar recursos de informática;
  
  
Executar outras tarefas de mesma natureza e nível de complexidade associadas ao ambiente organizacional;
  
  
Auxiliar em tarefas simples relativas às atividades de administração, para atender solicitações e necessidades da unidade;
  
  
Realizar solicitação de material para rotina, controlar a entrada e saída de pessoas nos locais de trabalho, receber, transmitir mensagens telefônicas e fax, receber, coletar e distribuir correspondência, documentos, mensagens, encomendas, volumes e outros, interna e externamente.
  
  
**Requisitos Necessários**
Ensino Médio Completo;
  
  
Ter atuado como recepcionista no contexto hospitalar.
  
  
**O Que Oferecemos**
Salário: R$1.707,00 + R$324,20 (insalubridade)
  
  
Horário de trabalho: Segunda a Sexta 07h30 às 17h30.
  
  
Benefícios: Vale Alimentação/Vale Refeição, Vale transporte, Plano de saúde, Plano Odontológico, Programa Pulsa Saúde – Telemedicina.
  
  
Junte-se a nós. Aqui, a vida pulsa.
  
  

* Número de vagas: 2
* Local de trabalho: Vitória, ES
* Regime de contratação de tipo: Efetivo – CLT
* Jornada: Período Integral
* Área e especialização profissional: Administração - Recepção
* Nível hierárquico: Auxiliar

**REQUISITOS**
Escolaridade Mínima: Ensino Médio (2º Grau)
  
  
**Formação Desejada**

* Ensino Médio (2º Grau)

**VALORIZADO**
Tempo de experiência: Entre 1 e 3 anos
  
  
**HABILIDADES**

* organização, foco no resultado, comprometimento

**BENEFÍCIOS**

* vale alimentação, vale transporte, plano saúde e odontológico

Job Details
  
  
Role Level: Not Applicable Work Type: Full-Time Country: United Arab Emirates City: Dubai Company Website: https://grupopulsa.com/ Job Function: Administrative Support Company Industry/
  
  
Sector: Investment Banking

data.jd_text:
Delivers exceptional customer service by providing accurate, timely, and compliant sales and service support to customers.
  
  
Responsible for processing account opening, product onboarding, service requests, and after-sales transactions while meeting service KPIs — including NPS, complaint resolution timelines, service request turnaround, and mystery shopping scores — and ensuring full adherence to FAB policies and regulatory requirements.
  
  
Acts as the primary point of customer interaction in the branch, promoting FAB products and services, supporting sales growth, and enhancing customer satisfaction.
  
  
Sales & Business Development
  
  

* Actively promote and cross-sell FAB asset and liability products to new and existing customers.
* Identify customer needs and recommend suitable FAB products and services.
* Generate product leads from walk-in customers, referrals, and personal outreach.
* Assist in meeting branch and individual sales targets.

Service Excellence & KPI Delivery
  
  

* Achieve personal and branch service KPIs, including:
* Net Promoter Score (NPS) through positive and professional customer engagement.
* Complaint resolution timelines for customer service issues within SLA.
* Service Request (SR) turnaround times in line with agreed standards.
* Mystery Shopping scores through consistent delivery of FAB service standards.
* Handle customer queries, requests, and complaints professionally, escalating where necessary.
* Educate customers on FAB’s digital channels and self-service options.

Product Onboarding & Transactions
  
  

* Prepare, process, and review account opening forms, loan and credit card applications, and related documentation for completeness and accuracy.
* Ensure product onboarding is completed without errors and in compliance with FAB policies and regulatory guidelines.
* Process customer service requests efficiently, ensuring accuracy and SLA adherence.

Customer Relationship Management
  
  

* Maintain proactive communication with customers to build loyalty and strengthen relationships.
* Provide product information, clarify terms and conditions, and ensure customers are fully informed before signing agreements.
* Encourage customers to upgrade to higher-tier products and services where relevant.

Operational Discipline & Compliance
  
  

* Ensure all customer transactions and documentation comply with FAB policies, operational risk controls, and regulatory requirements.
* Adhere to information security policies, including secure handling of documents and maintaining a clear desk.
* Participate in mandatory compliance and operational training.
* Treat compliance as a mandatory requirement, not a KPI.
* Minimum Qualification
* High school diploma or higher education in business, finance, or related discipline.
* Minimum Experience
* Minimum 2 years’ experience in banking, preferably in customer service or sales roles.

Knowledge of banking products, services, and regulatory requirements

Dealer Market Manager, UAE
  
  
**Role Purpose**
The Healthcare Support Representative is a UAE‑based role responsible for supporting the coordination and execution of healthcare projects across the UAE while providing operational support to dealer partners across the GCC region. The position is primarily operational, with approximately 70–80% of the role focused on coordination, documentation, and internal follow‑up, and 20–30% supporting dealer and client interactions related to healthcare opportunities and projects.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**Project Coordination & Operational Support**
Support the coordination of healthcare projects and opportunities by maintaining organized project information, tracking key activities, and ensuring timely follow‑up on requests and action items. Assist the Healthcare team in preparing project documentation, proposals, and internal updates to support effective decision‑making and project execution.
  
  
Dealer & Stakeholder Coordination
  
  
Act as a coordination point between MillerKnoll Healthcare and dealer partners across the UAE and GCC. Facilitate clear communication, dealer training, timely information exchange, and alignment between dealer partners, internal teams, and other stakeholders involved in healthcare opportunities.
  
  
Team & Client Support
  
  
Assist the Healthcare team in preparing for client meetings, product presentations, and healthcare facility visits. Support interactions with dealer partners and healthcare clients when required, ensuring project discussions, information requests, and follow‑up actions are clearly documented and communicated.
  
  
**Communication & Responsiveness Expectations**
Maintain consistent responsiveness during working hours and ensure timely communication with internal teams and dealer partners. Provide clear updates on project status, follow‑up actions, and any issues requiring attention.
  
  
**Minimum Requirements**

* University degree completed or in progress
* Strong communication skills in English and Arabic
* Strong organizational and time management skills
* Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word, Outlook)
* Willingness to travel within the UAE when required

**Preferred Background**

* Project coordination
* Sales operations or sales support
* Facility management coordination
* Construction or fit‑out project support
* Engineering or technical project environments

**Personal Competencies**

* Highly organized and detail‑oriented
* Strong sense of accountability and ownership
* Proactive and responsive in communication
* Ability to work independently while collaborating with a wider team
* Professional, reliable, and adaptable in a dynamic project environment

**Who We Hire?**
Simply put, we hire qualified applicants representing a wide range of backgrounds and abilities. MillerKnoll is comprised of people of all abilities, gender identities and expressions, ages, ethnicities, sexual orientations, veterans from every branch of military service, and more. Here, you can bring your whole self to work. We’re committed to equal opportunity employment, including veterans and people with disabilities.
  
  
MillerKnoll complies with applicable disability laws and makes reasonable accommodations for applicants and employees with disabilities. If reasonable accommodation is needed to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and/or to receive other benefits and privileges of employment, please contact MillerKnoll Talent Acquisition at careers\_help@millerknoll.com.

data.jd_text:
Immerse yourself in the world of Cartier, where heritage and innovation come together to create unforgettable experiences.
  
  
With a growing presence across the UAE, we are looking for experienced Sales Associates to join us.
  
  
**HOW WILL YOU MAKE AN IMPACT?**
As a Sales Associate, you will create meaningful connections with clients, guiding them through their journey and sharing the unique craftsmanship behind each creation. You will play a pivotal role in achieving boutique goals by providing personalized advice, cultivating client relationships, and ensuring every interaction reflects the excellence of Cartier.
  
  
As an integral part of our Boutiques, you will be responsible for the following:
  
  
**Sales Achievements**

* Deliver exceptional client experiences in line with Cartier’s service excellence standards.
* Achieve and exceed individual and boutique sales objectives through consultative selling and deep product knowledge.
* Proactively identify and convert clienteling opportunities by scheduling appointments and developing robust client profiles.

**Client Relationship & Portfolio Development**

* Cultivate meaningful and lasting client relationships, fostering loyalty to the Maison.
* Strategically grow and manage your client portfolio to maximize engagement and sales potential.
* Execute targeted CRM actions to strengthen client connections and drive repeat business.
* Represent Cartier as a true Ambassador during client events and exclusive activations.

**Daily Boutique Operations**

* Uphold the highest standards of operational compliance across all boutique procedures and policies.
* Ensure accurate stock management, actively participate in inventory processes, and maintain the impeccable presentation of the boutique.

**One Team Spirit**

* Embody Cartier’s values and contribute to a collaborative, positive team spirit.
* Engage in team initiatives, supporting colleagues to achieve shared goals and deliver a seamless client experience.

**HOW WILL YOU EXPERIENCE SUCCESS WITH US?**
At Cartier, we believe passion and expertise are the sparks that create extraordinary success.
  
  
**To Truly Thrive In This Role, You’ll Bring**

* Strong selling skills and an innate sense of service excellence, creating memorable client experiences that foster loyalty.
* Communicate fluently in Arabic and English.
* Leverage your product knowledge and genuine curiosity to engage clients and share the story behind each Cartier creation.
* Excel at time management and multitasking in a dynamic environment, adapting seamlessly to shifting priorities while maintaining meticulous attention to detail.
* Embrace a positive, team-oriented mindset, contributing to a supportive and inspiring boutique culture.

**What Do We Offer**
At Cartier, you will be part of a community bound by a strong sense of responsibility, where connection, collaboration, and collective spirit thrive.
  
  
We empower individual talents, united by a shared commitment to excellence, inspired by the world's diverse cultures, to respect and enrich our unique heritage. We believe that different perspectives fuel innovation and drive us to create exceptional experiences.
  
  
We offer an energizing environment for career growth and the opportunity to contribute your individual vision to a legacy of creativity.
  
  
We celebrate every achievement, big or small, fostering meaningful connections through gratitude and mutual support, nurturing a sense of belonging.
  
  
**Join us at Cartier, a place like no other, forever moving forward.**
**YOUR JOURNEY WITH US**
If your application is selected, you will receive an introductory call from a member of our Talent team to explain further steps and discuss the opportunity. If there is a match from both sides, you will have a chance to meet with the Boutique and Retail Management Team, as well as HR as part of a video or in-person interview. If we are positive from all sides and this is an exciting challenge for you, you will receive a job offer to join Cartier and a warm invitation to the team!
  
  
**Take your next step with Cartier, we look forward to hearing from you!**

data.raw_snippet: We are seeking a highly organised and detail-oriented Operations Assistant to join our team. This is a pivotal support role sitting at the heart of our day-to-day operations, providing essential administrative and coordination services across workforce management, supplier and client liaison, visa a
data.search_title: "Abu Dhabi Health Services" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
We are seeking a highly organised and detail-oriented Operations Assistant to join our team. This is a pivotal support role sitting at the heart of our day-to-day operations, providing essential administrative and coordination services across workforce management, supplier and client liaison, visa and compliance documentation, and financial record-keeping.

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**

**Timesheet & Workforce Administration**

* Collect, review and process weekly timesheet submissions from contract staff, ensuring accuracy and timely sign-off.
* Maintain an up-to-date register of all contract staff, including contract start/end dates, rates, and engagement status.
* Liaise with line managers and contractors to resolve any discrepancies or missing submissions promptly.

**Supplier & Client Account Management**

* Act as a primary point of contact for supplier and client accounts, maintaining strong working relationships and clear communication channels.
* Coordinate with suppliers on purchase orders, service agreements, and ongoing delivery requirements.
* Assist in onboarding new suppliers and clients, ensuring all required documentation and compliance checks are completed.
* Monitor supplier and client communications, escalating issues to senior management where necessary.

**Visa & Immigration Documentation — UK, Europe & GCC**

* Gather, collate and manage all documentation required for work visa and residency applications across the UK, European jurisdictions, and GCC countries.
* Liaise directly with Public Relations Officers (PROs) in GCC markets to ensure timely processing of government-related applications and renewals.
* Track visa expiry dates and proactively initiate renewal processes to avoid lapses in compliance.
* Maintain a secure and organised digital filing system for all immigration and compliance-related documentation.
* Stay informed of relevant changes in immigration and labour regulations across jurisdictions to ensure ongoing compliance.

**Data Entry, Invoicing & Record Keeping**

* Perform accurate and timely data entry across internal systems, ensuring all records are current and consistent.
* Process, track and file invoices related to contract staff, suppliers and client accounts, coordinating with finance as required.
* Maintain comprehensive records of all contractual documentation, purchase orders, and correspondence.
* Generate regular reports on operational metrics including timesheet compliance, invoice status, and contract renewals.

**REQUIREMENTS**

* **Perfect English fluency (written and spoken):**
  This is an absolute requirement. All internal and external communications are conducted in English at a professional standard.
* **Experience in operations, administration or office management:**
  Minimum 2 years in a relevant administrative or operational support role.
* **Recruitment industry knowledge:**
  A sound understanding of how a recruitment or staffing business operates is highly desirable.
* **Visa & immigration familiarity:**
  Prior experience handling visa or residency documentation for UK, EU or GCC jurisdictions is a significant advantage.
* **GCC PRO experience:**
  Familiarity with PRO processes and government portals in the UAE or wider GCC is preferred.
* **Attention to detail:**
  Meticulous approach to data entry, document management and compliance tracking.
* **Organisation and time management:**
  Ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously and meet deadlines without close supervision.
* **Proficiency in Microsoft Office / Google Workspace:**
  Comfortable working with Excel/Sheets, Word/Docs, and email platforms at an intermediate level or above.
* **Discretion and professionalism:**
  Able to handle sensitive personal and commercial information with appropriate confidentiality.

**COMPENSATION & BENEFITS**

The successful candidate will receive a monthly salary of AED 8,000 – 10,000 during the probationary period, commensurate with experience. Compensation will be formally reviewed following the completion of a 6-month probation, with scope for increase based on performance and contribution.

* Probationary salary: AED 8,000 – 10,000 per month
* Salary review after 6 months
* Supportive and dynamic team environment
* Exposure to international operations across UK, Europe and GCC markets
* Opportunity to grow within a fast-paced recruitment business

Ensures the facility adheres to all relevant regulations, codes, and standards, including compliance with local Civil Defense and health & safety requirements. 6. Prepares and delivers regular safety presentations and reports to line manager, ensuring clear communication of safety concerns, incidents, and compliance status. 7. Plans, executes, and evaluates emergency drills. Develops action plans to address any findings, ensuring ongoing preparedness for any emergency scenario. 8. Develops and delivers safety awareness lectures and training programs for staff, residents, and visitors to maintain a high level of safety consciousness. 9. Trains new staff on safety protocols and procedures, ensuring they are well-prepared to follow established safety guidelines. 10. Actively participates in safety-related meetings and committees, collaborating with interdisciplinary teams to integrate safety into daily operations. 11. Conducts comprehensive risk assessments for Fakeeh Healthcare facility, identifying potential hazards and preparing action plans to mitigate risks and ensure a safe environment. 12. Leads safety-related projects, ensuring compliance with Civil Defense regulations and accreditation standards.13. Manages the Safety Unit’s budget and staffing needs, ensuring that resources are allocated efficiently to support all safety operations and initiatives. 14. Other duties as assigned within the scope of the job.
  
  
**Requirements**

data.search_title: "Fakeeh Care" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Description**
**Job Purpose:**
Managing and overseeing all outpatient pharmacies and their related tasks that include without limitation: dispensing, receiving, ordering items from store and inventory management. In addition to managing all other services covered by the outpatient pharmacies
  
  
**Key Responsibilities And Duties**

* Supervises and directs the staff to provide professional, safe and timely pharmaceutical services to the patients.
* Develops, coordinates, implements and ensures compliance with all Fakeeh Care and pharmacy services policies and procedures and ensures compliance of staff with accreditations standards.
* Schedules staff as required to be sure of the smooth of work especially during peak hours.
* Evaluates, develops and implements at all times best practice recommendations related to medication safety.
* Ensures that medication verification and medication dispensing in outpatient pharmacy meets set time frames.
* Conducts periodic performance evaluation of the outpatient pharmacy staff and gives the staff constructive feedback.
* Reports the nearly expired medicines (within 6 months) to medical stockroom, ensures return when applicable and subtracts from the inventory.
* Trouble shoots variations and problems that could arise from day to day work.
* Reviews on monthly basis outpatient pharmacy indicators and addresses variations by developing performance improvement projects.
* Ensures that inventory of narcotic and controlled drugs is done every shift and re-checked.
* Ensures that pharmacists do the inventory of medicines and re-checks the inventory.
* Works on self-development by enrolling in continuous education program regarding medication management practices, high risk medications, medication errors and others.
* Evaluates, develops and implements best practice recommendations related to medication safety.
* Provides training and detailed orientation for newly hired staff.
* Promotes, encourages and assists pharmacy personnel in their self-development.
* Outpatient Pharmacy Automation related functions if applicable:
* Understand clinical, technical, and business workflows to achieve planned outcomes of the smart solution.
* Oversee clinical management of the Robotic Solution, such as determining override standards, implementing Clinical Data Categories and developing policies and procedures.
* Assimilates information from variety of sources, able to analyze data and make recommendations and executes a course of action.
* Design quality assurance and process improvement studies to monitor and utilize the Robotic Solution.
* Develop training checklists and competency for pharmacy staff.
* Researches and trends information from reports or data files from multiple divisions and service centers.
* Manages all requests for Robotic Solution design or drug dictionary changes to the enterprise system standards and strategy.
* Review interface design and ongoing activity.
* Participate in policy and procedure development and review.
* Redesign and monitor workflow pertaining to Robotic Solution activities, including override activities.
* Manage the Robotic Solution formulary for new medications.
* Assist in resolving Robotic Solution issues as a member of a multidisciplinary team.
* Manage the Robotic Solution user database.
* Assures appropriate testing of all integrated applications.
* Provides supports to Pharmacy staff and all other stakeholders to increase adoption, improve and enhance Pharmacy information solutions for high quality safe patient care, education and research.
* Ensures prompt and timely calling of patients to dispensing windows and aims at reducing patients waiting time to the minimum possible.
* Follows all medication safe procedures when dispensing medications.
* Enters on OVR any encountered medication error or ADR.
* Attends continuing education programs to maintain expertise in Pharmacy and required licensure.
* Ensures Enrollment in continuous education program regarding medication management practices, high-risk medications, medication errors and others.
* Ensure the staff training and implement CIBAHI & JCI requirement to be in place by providing a trace activities with a timeframe and action plan adding to that he/she shall submit monthly report with the progress.
* Ensures that all plans, policies and procedures, protocols, clinical practice guidelines and scope of services for the pharmaceutical services are up-to-date, uploaded, and communicated to the quality team to upload to the system.
* Educates patients and their families about health conditions, treatments and preventative measures if applicable.

**All Fakeeh Care employees are responsible for continuous improvement, including:**

* Performing all duties and tasks in a manner that supports Fakeeh’s Person-Centered care values.
* Actively contributing to continuous improvement initiatives, within the scope of the role.
* Adherence to safety protocols and proactively seeking to address any job-related safety concerns.
* Maintaining strict confidentiality of all sensitive information accessed or encountered during work.
* Complying with cybersecurity policies and standards to protect Fakeeh’s systems and participating in awareness training and initiatives to prevent cyber threats.
* Adhering to and upholding Fakeeh Care’s code of conduct, policies and ethical standards.
* Completion of mandatory education as per the requirement, at least one month prior to expiration.

**Requirements**
**Skills and Abilities:**

* Actively strive to upgrade professional skills through engaging in appropriate professional training and experience.
* Competent computer skills with software applications to include Microsoft Word, Excel.

**Experience**
5 - 7 years of experience in pharmaceutical field with at least 2 years in managerial role
  
  
**Education**
Pharm-D
  
  
**Language**
Arabic & English
  
  
**Licenses / Certifications**
License for practice as per the regional health regulatory authority e.g. (SCFHS / DHA).

data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
To coordinate all the security team’s activities and daily operations such as scheduling, shifts and training smoothly and effectively to protect the company’s property, assets and personnel by maintaining a secure environment. He/she shall carry out patrol and other security duties to prevent all illegal or inappropriate actions.
  
  
**Key Result Responsibilities**

* Acts primarily in direct defence of life and company’s property by detecting, investigating, resolving and reporting any security breaches or incidents to maintain a secure environment in accordance with company’s policies and procedures.
* Briefs the security team at the beginning of a new shift to update them on developments since the last shift and shares information about any security concerns.
* Patrols randomly or regularly company premises and perimeter (gates, doors, windows, parking, etc.) to prevent and detect signs of intrusion and ensure security.
* Reports unlawful activities observed during routine patrols such as theft, or vandalism to law enforcement parties for further action.
* Monitors and controls access of employees, visitors and vehicles against theft, hazards, or vandalism and blocks areas when needed.
* Detains trespassers and criminals and calls the police when he/she observes unauthorized persons. Initiates calls to fire department in cases of emergency such as fire.
* Monitors the report of the daily activities for any incidents or irregularities such as equipment or property damage, theft, presence of unauthorized persons or suspicious objects.
* Warns persons of rule infractions or violations and apprehend or evict violators from premises.
* Ensures all alarm systems, CCTV cameras and detecting/emergency equipment are working properly and reports any breakdowns to management company.
* Monitors and adjusts controls that regulates building systems, such as air conditioning and reports any issues to the Facilities Management Department.
* Performs first aid or CPR when needed, given he/she is qualified to do so.
* Escorts/coordinates with management to arrange for escorting individuals to specific locations/destinations as required.
* Maintains a pro-active approach to Health and Safety.

Key Result Responsibilities - Continued
  
  
**Qualifications (Academic, Training, Languages)**

* 3-5 years of similar experience in any security company in any industry is a must.
* Willing to work on shift patterns (24/7) and long working hours.
* High School or Diploma in any stream is acceptable.
* PSBD security license is a must
* Related training such as Emergency Response Compatibility and First Aid are considered a must.
* Demonstrates confident and composed personality and positive attitude all times.
* Well-groomed and organized.
* Dynamic and physically fit for the job, requires frequent movement.
* Proficient in computer skills (Microsoft Office).
* Very good English Language (written and spoken)
* Good reporting skills

data.jd_text:
**About PulseMediaNL**
PulseMediaNL is a forward-thinking digital marketing agency delivering innovative, data-driven solutions for healthcare, medical, and wellness brands. We help our clients achieve sustainable growth through high-performance campaigns, strategic insights, and creative digital experiences.
  
  
As we continue to expand globally, we are seeking a
**Junior Front-End Developer (Remote)**
based in the
**MENA region**
to join our growing remote team. This role is ideal for a motivated developer eager to build modern user interfaces, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and grow technically in a fast-paced, healthcare-focused environment.
  
  
If you’re passionate about front-end development, modern web technologies, and crafting engaging digital experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Front-End Development
  
  

* Develop and maintain responsive, user-friendly interfaces for healthcare and medical clients
* Convert UI/UX designs into clean, reusable, and high-quality front-end code
* Support the creation of landing pages, websites, and marketing assets for digital campaigns

Collaboration
  
  

* Work closely with designers, marketers, and project managers to ensure accurate and seamless implementation
* Support SEO, CRO, and performance-focused front-end updates

Performance & Optimization
  
  

* Optimize websites for speed, performance, and cross-browser compatibility
* Ensure consistent responsiveness across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
* Follow best practices for accessibility and usability

CMS & Content Management
  
  

* Assist with maintaining and updating CMS-based websites (primarily WordPress)
* Implement content updates, page layouts, and templates as needed

Quality Assurance
  
  

* Identify and resolve front-end bugs and UI inconsistencies
* Test features across browsers and devices to ensure reliability

Continuous Learning
  
  

* Stay current with modern front-end technologies and best practices
* Participate in code reviews and learn from senior developers

**Experience**
Required Qualifications
  
  

* 0–2 years of front-end development experience (including internships, freelance, or personal projects)
* Hands-on experience with live websites or applications is a plus

Education
  
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Web Development, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience

Technical Skills
  
  

* Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
* Understanding of responsive and mobile-first design
* Familiarity with front-end frameworks (React, Vue, or similar) is a plus
* Experience with WordPress or other CMS platforms preferred
* Basic understanding of SEO-friendly front-end practices

Tools
  
  

* Experience with Git or other version control systems
* Familiarity with Figma, Adobe XD, or similar design tools
* Basic knowledge of performance optimization and cross-browser testing

Soft Skills
  
  

* Strong attention to detail and problem-solving abilities
* Clear communication skills and comfort working remotely
* Willingness to learn, accept feedback, and grow
* Good time management and ability to meet deadlines

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, or similar frameworks
* Basic knowledge of WCAG accessibility standards
* Exposure to healthcare, medical, or regulated industries
* Familiarity with JavaScript build tools or workflows
* Fluent in English; Arabic is a strong advantage

Why Join PulseMediaNL?
  
  
**Compensation & Benefits**

* Competitive salary based on experience and skills
* Paid time off and holidays (based on country of residence)

Professional Growth
  
  

* Mentorship from experienced developers and designers
* Clear growth path toward mid-level front-end or full-stack roles
* Exposure to real-world healthcare projects and global clients

Remote-First Culture
  
  

* Fully remote role within the MENA region
* Flexible working hours and strong work-life balance
* Collaborative, remote-friendly workflows

Culture & Impact
  
  

* Innovative, supportive, and quality-driven team
* Learning-focused environment that encourages growth
* Opportunity to contribute to meaningful healthcare and wellness solutions

How to Apply
  
  
If you’re a motivated Junior Front-End Developer (Remote) based in the MENA region and excited to grow your career in a healthcare-focused digital agency, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and portfolio (if available).
  
  
**PulseMediaNL is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and value diverse perspectives.**

SPEED & SPIRIT is what we look for in our candidates, defined by some simple values that inspire us to BE DRIVEN in our performance, BE VIBRANT in our sporting legacy, BE TOGETHER in our team spirit, and BE YOU to let our individual talent and experience shine. Applying for a job at PUMA is easy and all genders are welcome. Simply click APPLY ONLINE and follow the steps to upload your application.
  
  
**YOUR MISSION:**
The accountant is responsible for all relevant accounting functions. The position oversees all accounting positions (accounts payable, export, reconciliation etc.) and responds to issues and questions.
  
  

* Timely and accurate processing of AP invoices in line with company policies
* Ensuring invoices are posted to the correct GL accounts and supported with proper documentation
* Regular vendor reconciliations and timely resolution of discrepancies
* Timely and planned vendor payment processing in accordance with agreed terms
* Accurate recording and monitoring of prepayments, including proper amortization schedules
* Proper accounting and maintenance of fixed assets, including additions, disposals, and depreciation
* Timely posting of journal entries (accruals, prepayments, and adjustments) with adequate support
* Adherence to month-end closing timelines and compliance with accounting standards and internal controls

**YOUR TALENT:**
Education:
  
  

* Professional Degree / Certification (e.g., CA / ACCA / CPA / MBA in Finance)

Experience:
  
  

* Experience in Finance / Accounting role preferably within retail or eCommerce environments

Capabilities:
  
  

* Strong understanding of Accounts Payable and General Accounting processes
* Knowledge of prepayments accounting and amortization principles
* Experience in fixed asset accounting and register maintenance
* Good understanding of month-end close procedures and journal entry preparation
* Ability to ensure compliance with internal controls and accounting standards (IFRS)
* Strong attention to detail and accuracy in high-volume transaction environments
* Ability to work with ERP systems and Excel for reconciliations and reporting
* Strong coordination skills with vendors and internal finance stakeholders

PUMA supports over 21,000 employees across 120+ countries. The PUMA Group owns the brand PUMA, Cobra Golf and stichd, and is headquartered in Herzogenaurach, Germany.
  
  
PUMA provides equal opportunities for all job applicants, regardless of race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, or disability. Equality for all is one of the core principles at PUMA and we do not tolerate any form of harassment or discrimination.

data.title: Operations Manager
data.company: Gulfa Mineral Water and Processing Industries L.L.C
data.raw_snippet: The Logistics and Warehouse Manager is responsible for overseeing and managing all warehouse and logistics operations to ensure efficient storage, movement, and distribution of goods. The role focuses on optimizing processes, maintaining accurate inventory control, ensuring compliance with safety re
data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
The Logistics and Warehouse Manager is responsible for overseeing and managing all warehouse and logistics operations to ensure efficient storage, movement, and distribution of goods. The role focuses on optimizing processes, maintaining accurate inventory control, ensuring compliance with safety regulations, and leading warehouse and logistics teams to achieve operational excellence.
  
  
**Roles And Responsibilities**

* Oversee and manage daily warehouse and logistics operations to ensure smooth and efficient functioning.
* Plan, manage, and coordinate inbound and outbound logistics activities, including transportation and delivery schedules.
* Monitor inventory levels, ensure accurate stock control, and maintain proper documentation and reporting.
* Implement and maintain best practices in warehousing and logistics to improve productivity and reduce operational costs.
* Collaborate closely with procurement, sales, and production teams to ensure timely availability and delivery of goods.
* Develop, implement, and enforce Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for warehouse and logistics operations.
* Ensure full compliance with health, safety, environmental, and OHS regulations and company policies.
* Recruit, train, schedule, motivate, and evaluate warehouse personnel to foster a high-performance work culture.
* Address and resolve issues related to transportation delays, delivery challenges, and stock discrepancies.
* Direct receiving, storage, picking, packing, and shipping activities to maximize space utilization and workflow efficiency.
* Maintain accurate inventory records, conduct cycle counts, manage stock levels, and ensure system data accuracy.
* Enforce strict safety, hygiene, and security standards within warehouse and logistics operations.

**Key Skills And Competencies**

* Strong leadership and team management skills.
* Excellent organizational and planning abilities.
* In-depth knowledge of warehouse operations and logistics processes.
* Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills.
* Knowledge of inventory management systems and reporting.
* Sound understanding of OHS and safety compliance.

**About Gulfa Mineral Water And Processing Industries LLC**
Gulfa was founded in 1975 as the first water company in the GCC and has since raised the standards of our bare necessity of water consumption. The wells in Masfout that surround the foundation of Gulfa have been naturally flowing through centuries, and it is through Gulfa that we are able to consume such mineral-enriched water to our convenience.

data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
We're seeking an experienced Product Analyst to join our Customer Experience team!

The Product Analyst will support and drive strategic digital product initiatives that enhance consumer experiences across our platform ecosystem. In this role, you will contribute to shaping the product direction and roadmap for key digital services, working at the intersection of business needs, user-centered design, and technology.

You will work closely with the leadership and business stakeholders to help shape product vision by identifying opportunities, conducting market and competitive analysis, and bringing user and design insights to the forefront of decision-making. By leveraging strong UX and design thinking skills, you will help visualize concepts, frame options, and translate ideas into tangible experiences through artefacts such as journey maps and wireframes.

You may also facilitate structured workshops and working sessions to support alignment across the team, ensuring strategic decisions are informed, well-articulated, and grounded in user-centric thinking.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* **Product Strategy:**
  Contribute to shaping the product vision and strategic direction by supporting leadership with insight-driven analysis. Identify and assess market opportunities through competitive landscape reviews, market studies, and user research, bringing clear perspectives on trends, gaps, and emerging consumer needs. Translate business objectives into strategic options and decision frameworks that highlight user value, experience implications, and business impact. Use UX and design thinking tools to visualize concepts, scenarios, and future-state journeys, enabling leadership to evaluate priorities, make informed trade-offs, and align on strategic direction with confidence.

* **User Research & UX Design:**
  Lead strategic user and experience research activities to inform leadership decision-making. Plan and conduct exploratory research, insight synthesis, and experience assessments to surface unmet user needs, behavioral patterns, and experience gaps. Help translate insights into visual narratives such as journey maps, experience frameworks, concept models, and low‑fidelity prototypes that help leadership understand implications and options. Use qualitative and quantitative insights to challenge assumptions, support hypothesis framing, and guide strategic discussions. Contribute in user‑centred thinking at a leadership and management level by playing an active and contributing role in workshops, design-led discussions, and alignment sessions that ensure strategic decisions are grounded in a deep understanding of user experience and customer value.

* **Stakeholder Management & Communication:**
  Build trusted advisory relationships with senior business stakeholders to support strategic product thinking and decision-making. Act as a strategic partner by synthesizing insights from market analysis, user research, and experience evaluations into clear, compelling narratives for leadership consumption. Facilitate structured discussions and alignment sessions to help leadership and management teams converge on priorities, assumptions, and strategic direction. Support informed decision-making by framing complex topics clearly, managing ambiguity, and ensuring stakeholder alignment around user-centric and business-driven outcomes.

* **Cross functional collaboration:**
  Work with cross-functional teams through the complete product development lifecycle from ideation through launch and optimization. Collaborate with engineering teams to translate product requirements into clear user stories, specifications, and acceptance criteria. Work with marketing and sales to develop go-to-market strategies, product positioning, and launch plans. Partner with data analytics teams to establish key performance indicators, monitor product metrics, and derive actionable insights.

* **Product Execution & Delivery:**
  Own product outcomes and drive timely delivery of features that meet quality standards and business objectives. Manage product backlog, prioritize feature requests, and make strategic trade-off decisions. Conduct competitive analysis and market research to identify opportunities and inform product direction. Monitor product performance through analytics and customer feedback, iterating based on data and user insights. Ensure products support business goals including user engagement, retention, revenue growth, and customer satisfaction.

* The responsibilities and duties outlined above are not exhaustive and may evolve over time. The role may require additional tasks and responsibilities as assigned by the line manager or higher authorities, in alignment with organizational needs.

**What We’re Looking For**

**Education:**

* Educated with at least bachelor’s degree or equivalent in related field
* MBA or advanced degree in Product Management, Design, or related discipline
* 5-8 years of product management experience with at least 2-3 years focused on digital consumer products or platform ecosystems
* Background in UX design, human-computer interaction, or related field
* Proficient in English
* Proficient in Arabic
* Experience with design thinking methodologies and facilitation of product discovery workshops
* Excellent communication and presentation skills for leadership and management levels
* Familiarity with modern development practices including APIs, microservices architecture, and cloud technologies

**Experience:**

* 5-8 years of product management experience in digital products, consumer-facing platforms, or SaaS environments, with demonstrated track record of launching successful products
* Experience in product design and development, particularly in sectors such as Fintech, banking, finance, or working with agencies on enterprise-level digital projects
* Strong UX sensibility with hands-on experience leading user research initiatives
* Proven ability to develop and execute product strategy and roadmaps that align with business objectives and deliver measurable results
* Proven experience in driving customer engagement, improving user satisfaction, and delivering exceptional digital experiences that align with business goals and digital product strategies
* Outstanding communication and presentation skills with ability to articulate complex product concepts to diverse audiences including executives, engineers, and customers
* Strategic thinking combined with tactical execution capabilities, balancing long-term vision with short-term priorities
* Ability to work in a fast-paced, agile environment
* Able to deal with varied tasks and to work under pressure to meet deadlines and targets
* Able to work effectively and responsibly without supervision
* Proven ability to use primary and secondary user insights to influence decisions
* Able to work in a start-up environment and can handle the unexpected with flexibility
* Capable of agile thinking
* Applies a structured and analytical approach to business challenges and solutions
* Demonstrates critical thinking and problem-solving capabilities

**Why Join Us?**

* Opportunities for continuous learning, certifications, and professional development.
* Dedicated to building a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and empowered to be their authentic selves.
* Committed to building a stable, forward-thinking organization where innovation thrives.

data.jd_text:
**Job title: Team Leader**

**Location: Dubai**

**Reporting to: Program Manager, Customer Support**

**About noon**

We’re building an ecosystem of digital products and services that power everyday life across the Middle East. Fast, scalable, and deeply customer-centric. Our mission is to deliver to every door every day. We want to redefine what technology can do in this region, and we’re looking for a (add title) who can help us move even faster.

**noon’s mission: Every door, every day.**

**What you'll do:**

Team noon has some of the fastest, smartest, and hardest-working people we've encountered. With a young, aggressive, and talented team, we're driving major missions forward.

Enterprise procurement in the Middle East is a $100 billion opportunity, and most of it still runs on WhatsApp messages, PDF catalogs, and manual invoicing. Noon for Business is changing that. We're building the region's first full-stack B2B procurement platform with VAT invoicing, digital RFQs, credit lines, and team management built in. This is a ground-floor role in a business that will fundamentally reshape how companies in the UAE and KSA buy.

This is not a typical support role. In the early days, inbound volume will be limited. You'll spend a significant part of your time on outbound business customer outreach - activating new accounts, onboarding sellers, and building the operational muscle of the B2B platform from scratch.

**Customer & Seller Operations**

* Lead day-to-day operations across both customer and seller sides of the noon B2B platform
* Own end-to-end resolution of issues across customers, sellers, logistics, and internal teams
* Act as the escalation point for high-value or time-critical orders
* Work closely with sellers to improve performance, responsiveness, and fulfillment quality
* Ensure clear visibility and communication on orders, invoices, and operational updates

**Outbound Business Customer Outreach**

* Drive proactive outreach to business customers to activate accounts and drive first orders
* Follow up with sign-ups who haven't converted, understand blockers, and close the loop
* Collect structured feedback from early customers to feed back into product and operations
* Support the B2B sales team with pipeline generation through outbound calling and email campaigns

**Process & Operations**

* Monitor key metrics: fulfillment rates, cancellations, SLA adherence, customer satisfaction
* Identify recurring issues, drive root cause fixes, and implement process improvements
* Build and standardize SOPs and workflows across customer and seller operations
* Work with product and operations teams to design scalable solutions and improve tooling

**Team Management**

* Manage and develop a team handling B2B customer and seller operations
* Run daily audits on emails and chats for quality and consistency
* Conduct regular feedback sessions, track KPIs, and drive accountability
* Cross-train team members to ensure maximum flexibility and utilization

**What you'll need:**

* 3 to 5 years of experience in ecommerce, marketplace, or operations-heavy environments
* Strong written and verbal communication in English and Arabic
* Working knowledge of SQL/BigQuery with ability to independently query and analyze data
* Technical aptitude and agility to learn web-based tools quickly
* Data-driven mindset with ability to translate data into actionable operational insights
* Prior experience managing teams in customer support, operations, or seller/vendor management

We're looking for ambitious individuals who want to build something from zero. This role is for people who don't wait for tickets to come in - they go find the problems and fix them. You'll thrive here if you:

* Are comfortable with ambiguity and can adapt as the business evolves week to week
* See outreach and outbound work as an opportunity, not a step down from inbound support

This is a rare chance to be part of building a new business line inside one of the Middle East's largest technology companies. If you want to look back in two years and say you built the operations playbook for a $100 billion market, this is the role.

**Who will excel?**

* Takes ownership beyond ticket handling and drives issues to closure
* Comfortable operating in fast-paced, high-pressure environments
* Strong coordination skills across multiple stakeholders
* Focused on reliability, consistency, and long-term process improvement
* Bias for action with a practical, problem-solving mindset

data.jd_text:
**BUSINESS INTRODUCTION**

Majid Al Futtaim Holding is the leading shopping mall, retail, communities, entertainment developer and operator in the Middle East, North Africa, and Central Asia regions. With over 48,000 people, revenues of over US$ 11 Billion, and operations in 18 countries. Some of the iconic brands we carry include Mall of the Emirates, Carrefour, All Saints, Lego, City Center, Abercrombie & Fitch, & Vox Cinemas. We believe in making Great Moments for Everyone, Every day.

**JOB TITLE**

**Stock Associate | MAF Life Style | Operations**

**ROLE SUMMARY**

The Stock Associate will be responsible for supporting the smooth running of the business in Majid Al Futtaim LifeStyle by maintaining stock levels to business requirement, receiving deliveries, and ensuring the stockroom is clear, tidy and all internal systems and processes are maintained and adhered to.

**ROLE PROFILE**

* Support the set up and maintenance of shop floor, offices, stock rooms and other areas of the store.
* Assemble products as per the brand instruction manual and report any manufacturing defect.
* Attach barcode to each product as per the company and brand guidelines
* Check all stock received from warehouse/stores as per company guidelines and report discrepancies and defect to the manager
* Actively check stock room and report stock not displayed on the shop floor to VM and the management team
* Perform daily floor walk and replenish stock as per VM and operation direction
* Support store activities such as promotions/Mid-season sales/end of season sales as required by the management team
* Report and label the damaged stock and place it in the designated area in the

**REQUIREMENTS**

* High School Certificate
* 1-2 years industry experience
* Excellent to Fluent in English
* Must have Knowledge in the RFID system

**WHAT WE OFFER**

* At Majid Al Futtaim, we’re on a mission to create great moments, to spread happiness, to build, experiences that stay in our memories for a lifetime. We’re proud to say that over the past 27 years, we have built a reputation as a regional market leader in what we do. Join us!
* Work from any country in the world for 30 days a year.
* Work in a friendly environment, where everyone shares positive vibes and excited about our future.
* Work with over 50,000 diverse and talented colleagues, all guided by our Leadership Model.

data.jd_text:
Job responsibilities
  
  
This is an exciting opportunity for a determined individual who wants to be part of the worlds number 1 luxury brand based in our Store in Dubai Mall - Beauty Store.
  
  
Louis Vuitton has a fantastic opportunity to join the Brand as a full-time
**Stock Controller**
.
  
  
The ideal candidate will maintain the stock inventory in perfect condition, ensuring an efficient and logical organization of all stock rooms. This diverse role will manage the delivery operations, preparing and replenishing stock quickly and accurately as well as ensuring the right products are available on the sales floor to improve store efficiency and maximize the client experience. The Stock Controller will work closely with Supply Chain.
  
  
**Duties & Responsibilities**
**Inventory Management**

* Guaranteeing an efficient and logical organization of all the storage rooms (products and packaging).
* Manage delivery activities, preparing and replenishing the stocks quickly and precisely.
* Guarantee the availability of the appropriate products in the Store to improve its efficiency and maximize the Client experience.
* Improve the availability of products interacting with the Supply Chain.
* Improve stock KPI’s through different actions working with the store team and HO.
* Ensure a daily and optimal Stock counting by creating a precise Counting Calendar
* Prepare the shopfloor with the necessary supplies to ensure a smooth and seamless selling process and the comfort of Client Advisors.

**Administration**

* Manage contracts with suppliers.
* Supervise the Store’s maintenance.
* Manage office supplies, uniform requests, kitchen supplies, etc.
* Follow the Internal Audit guidelines.

**General Functions**

* Comply with the processes and procedures of the company.
* Be fully integrated in the Store team and contribute to fulfill the global objectives of the store.
* Help the Client Advisors to optimize their adaptability to the public inflow and adjust it to the Client’s necessities.
* Demonstrate curiosity and interest for the business, to be able to identify and resolve issues and therefore achieving a higher efficiency and Client experience.

Profile
  
  
**Requirements**

* At least 3 years of experience in stock management/supply chain, ideally in a retail environment
* Fluent in English
* Organized, careful and responsible
* Committed, proactive and able to adapt to a changing environment as retail
* Ability to work in a team and having a global vision of the business
* Basic Tech knowledge (daily use of computers, phones and tech tools)

Reference LVM30570
