data.jd_text:
**BUSINESS INTRODUCTION**

Majid Al Futtaim Holding is the leading shopping mall, retail, communities, entertainment developer and operator in the Middle East, North Africa, and Central Asia regions. With over 43,000 people, revenues of over US$ 11 Billion, and operations in 18 countries. Some of the iconic brands we carry include Mall of the Emirates, Carrefour, All Saints, Lego, City Center, Abercrombie & Fitch, & Vox Cinemas. We believe in making Great Moments for Everyone, Every day.

**JOB TITLE**

Store Manager | Majid Al Futtaim LifeStyle | Operations

**ROLE SUMMARY**

* The Store Manager is responsible for achievement of sales targets, managing and developing the store teams in order to maximize profitability, maintain brand and Company image, ensure operational compliance and offer an excellent customer experience. The role is fully accountable for the daily operations of the store and its workforce in line with the overall business objectives at Majid Al Futtaim Lifestyle.
* **ROLE PROFILE**
* Ensure that the highest levels of customer service are delivered by the entire store team at all times.
* Create innovative approaches to attract new customers, expand store traffic, and enhance profitability.
* Track brand performance, reviewing stock levels and monitoring best sellers and slow-moving stock in order to generate ideas and action plans to increase overall sales.
* Overall accountability for compliance of subordinates with established company policies, procedures and standards, including, but not limited to, keeping of funds and properties, personnel practices, security, sales and record keeping procedures
* Coach, train and mentor the store teams to enhance customer service levels through brand/product knowledge and overall understanding of retail.
* Ensure all Company Health & Safety, Security and Compliance policies are adhered to, raising any concerns to the Excellence and Compliance team in a timely manner.
* Plan, organize and execute in-store processes including cash intake and cash handling, stockroom and stock-take administration management.
* Provide critical analytical feedback to the Operations, Buying and Planning Departments in relation to product, ranging, pricing, competitive activities and opportunities.

**REQUIREMENTS**

* 4 – 5 years’ industry experience with Managerial Background experience
* A proven record of maximizing business performance
* Thinks Customer – Has a good understanding of main customer segments and helps team to understand them. Solicits customer feedback and ensures customer expectations are exceeded. Actively encourages “customer first” mindset.
* Leads the Way – Understand market trends and impact of value drivers directly affecting areas of responsibility (sector, function, geography). Ensures right resources are mobilized to ensure delivery. Prioritizes and allocates work among team members in
* Drives Impact – Make informed decisions and clearly communicates rationale behind them. Proactively identify and seek relevant information and data from team to make decisions. Identifies critical paths and proactively convenes the right stakeholder to ensure timely decisions are made. Makes hard decisions, knows when to make a call versus delegating upwards

**WHAT WE OFFER**

* At Majid Al Futtaim, we’re on a mission to create great moments, to spread happiness, to build, experiences that stay in our memories for a lifetime. We’re proud to say that over the past 27 years, we have built a reputation as a regional market leader in what we do. Join us!
* Work in a friendly environment, where everyone shares positive vibes and excited about our future.
* Work with over 45,000 diverse and talented colleagues, all guided by our Leadership Model.

data.jd_text:
**:هدف الوظيفة**
يشمل هذا المستوى شاغلي الوظائف من المهنيين ذوي الخبرة القادرين على القيام بالعمل من خلال الاستعانة بالتوجيهات العامة والرئيسية، حيث أنهم معنيين بشكل أساسي بإيجاد حلول للتحديات التي تتطلب بعض التحليل من أجل فهم وحل ومعالجة المشاكل التي تم تصعيدها من المستويات الأقل خبرة.
  
  
تتضمن الأنشطة التشغيلية المعقدة التي يقومون بها على تحديد المؤشرات لقياس ملاحظات العملاء، والإشراف على عملية تصميم استبيانات قياس مستوى الرضا عن الخدمات وتحليل وتحليل استطلاعات رضا العملاء وتقديم التوصيات ، وإعداد البرامج التوعوية، وخطط الحملات الإعلامية والرقمية، بما يشمل المنتجات والمنصات المتنوعة (فعاليات – مؤتمرات – ورش عمل- أخبار صحفية ..) وإدارة حسابات مع منصات وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي، مع الإشراف والمشاركة في عملية إعداد وتصميم المحتوى المخصص للنشر عبر منتجات التوعية والإعلام المتعددة، والإشراف على المراجعة الدورية لسلامة المحتوى المنشور عبر الموقع الإلكتروني وحسابات التواصل للتحقق من تحديثه وفق ما يلزم وموائمته للأعمال والمهام، والتنسيق مع مقدمي الخدمات الخارجيين وأصحاب المصلحة الخارجيين لتوحيد الجهود في مجال التوعية الإعلامية والنشر وفق السياسات المتبعة.
  
  
**المهام والمسؤوليات:**

* مواكبة التوجهات والممارسات الحديثة لإعداد وجهات النظر لكل من رحلات العملاء الحالية والمستقبلية
* مواءمة الاستراتيجيات مع توجيهات تجربة العملاء بالتنسيق مع جميع الإدارات ذات الصلة
* إعداد وتوزيع وجمع وتحليل استطلاعات رضا العملاء لقياس رضا العملاء وتحديد مجالات التحسين المحتملة
* تقديم الدعم في تحديد المقاييس متعددة الإدارات لقياس ذكاء العملاء وردود الفعل وإعداد التقارير الخاصة بها بشكل مستمر
* إعداد خطة شاملة ونوعية لتحسين تجربة العملاء بناءً على تحليل نقاط الضعف الحالية وأوجه القصور والثغرات
* التوصية بمعايير قياس جودة الخدمات المقدمة من قبل الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية وفروعها
* تحديد طرق تحديث الخدمات عبر المنصة الالكترونية الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية بالتنسيق مع ممثلي الإدارات
* العمل مع الفرق المرنة لتنسيق مبادرات التحسين المتعلقة بتجربة العملاء متعددة الإدارات
* تحديد الشركات الخارجية التي تقدم أفضل الأسعار والخدمات من أجل تلبية أهداف التوعية والتواصل المؤسسي وتقليل التكاليف ومتابعة نتائجها
* إعداد برامج توعية لزيادة الوعي العام بأعمال ومهام الأمانة العامة واللجان وحقوق والتزامات جميع الأطراف المعنية
* صناعة وإعداد سياسة النشر بما يتفق مع السياسات والأنظمة العامة وبالتنسيق مع الجهات الخارجية المعنية، والعمل على تحديثها ونشرها بشكل دوري
* صناعة وإعداد منهجيات التواصل الخارجي / الداخلي بما يتفق مع السياسات والأنظمة العامة وبالتنسيق مع الجهات الخارجية المعنية، والعمل على تحديثها ونشرها بشكل دوري
* إعداد وتنفيذ خطة توعية وتواصل سنوية، وتزويد رئيس مدير الإدارة ومدير عام الإدارة بتقارير دورية حول مستوى الأداء وأية ملاحظات رصدت خلالها وآلية المعالجة وما تم بشأنها
* إعداد والحفاظ على العلاقات مع الصحافة ومختلف الشركاء الإعلاميين لدعم خطط اتصالات الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية، وإعداد ونشر المقالات والأخبار الصحفية
* صناعة وإعداد وتصميم المحتوى المخصص للنشر عبر منتجات التوعية والإعلام المتعددة، والتأكد من ملاءمتها
* بناء وتصميم المنتجات التوعوية حسب خطط النشر المستهدفة وبما يتلاءم مع البرنامج المستهدف (فعاليات – مؤتمرات – ورش عمل – أخبار صحفية ..)
* تولي الأمور المتعلقة بحملات التوعية والتأكد من أنها تعكس رسالة الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية
* نشر الوعي من خلال حسابات وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي (مثل Twitter و LinkedIn) والموقع الإلكتروني بطريقة مستمرة والتعامل مع الحسابات ذات الصلة
* ضمان ملاءمة المحتوى المنشور والمعد للنشر والمراجعة الدورية لضمان التزامه بسياسات النشر المعتمدة في الأمانة العامة للجان الزكوية والضربية والجمركية المتعلقة بقنوات التواصل الاجتماعي (من حيث ملاءمة المحتوى للجمهور المستهدف، ونوع الموقع
    
    
  المؤهلات والمتطلبات الوظيفية:
    
  ما لا يقل عن 4 سنوات من الخبرة في المجال.
    
  بكالوريوس في الاتصالات أو التسويق أو الإدارة العامة.

data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Summary**
Apple Retail is where the best of Apple comes together. We bring our expertise to help people do what they love, delivering an only-at-Apple experience. We believe inclusion is a shared responsibility and we work together to foster a culture where everyone belongs and is inspired to do their best work.
  
  
You will build brand loyalty and create owners of Apple products and services. You’re dedicated to selling and delivering a customer service experience that is unlike any other. You are curious — you ask questions to learn about our customers’ needs, customizing recommendations to enrich their lives.
  
  
Please note: This is a part-time opportunity (20 hours per week) based in our retail stores. We’re hiring for multiple roles. You'll receive the same benefits as a full-time employee, alongside competitive pay.
  
  
**Description**
Deliver excellent service to Apple customers by seeking to understand their needs, identifying ownership opportunities, presenting products and services, and educating customers on relevant ways to buy products.
  
  
Understand and proactively stay up to date on Apple’s products, services, purchase options, and Product Zone sales processes.
  
  
Support your peers throughout the store as needed by sharing knowledge about Apple’s products, services, and purchase options, and assist in offering ownership opportunities.
  
  
Maintain accuracy and follow guidance.
  
  
Perform other tasks as needed, including but not limited to providing customer service and support in other areas of the store.
  
  
Contribute to an inclusive environment by respecting each other’s differences and having the curiosity to learn.
  
  
Demonstrate Apple’s values of inclusion and diversity in daily activities.
  
  
**Minimum Qualifications**

* This will be a part time opportunity (20 hours a week) working in our retail stores
* You should have availability to work a schedule based on business needs that may include nights, weekends, and public holidays in the retail store, and reliably attend work as scheduled, in line with local laws and subject to any approved accommodations.
* You should also be proficient in the local language, both written and spoken.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* You can:
* Demonstrate knowledge of Apple products and services.
* Personalize solutions based on customer needs, and effectively communicate them.
* Work in a fast-paced environment, often supporting multiple customers at the same time.
* Work in a team environment, demonstrating shared responsibility and accountability with other team members.
* Be curious and open to learning from others and helping each other grow.
* Learn about and deepen your understanding of Apple products and services, and third-party products, to enhance the customer experience.
* Be trusted with sensitive or confidential information, keeping with Apple’s core values.

At Apple, we’re not all the same. And that’s our greatest strength. We draw on the differences in who we are, what we’ve experienced, and how we think. Because to create products that serve everyone, we believe in including everyone. Therefore, we are committed to treating all applicants fairly and equally. We will work with applicants to make any reasonable accommodations.

Jobholders at this level are experienced professionals capable of conducting work with general directions. They are primarily concerned with developing solutions to challenges which require some analysis to understand and resolve, and addressing issues escalated from junior levels.

Unlike traditional platforms that stop at insights, Lucidya closes the loop. Our proprietary AI is built i
data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**About Lucidya**
Lucidya is an AI-native platform for customer experience (CX) intelligence that manages entire customer lifecycles, from initial engagement through retention and growth.
  
  
Unlike traditional platforms that stop at insights, Lucidya closes the loop. Our proprietary AI is built in-house and trained on millions of multilingual conversations, enabling teams across marketing, support, and CX to deliver experiences that actually move the needle.
  
  
We're scaling fast, and that growth brings complexity. That's where this role comes in.
  
  
**Why this role matters**
We're hiring fast. And hiring fast only works if the foundations behind it are strong.
  
  
Right now, our People team is lean, and we need someone who can own the operational backbone of how employees join, get set up, and stay compliant. This role is critical to making sure nothing slips, from contracts and payroll to onboarding and government systems.
  
  
This is not a strategy role. It's a precision execution role.
  
  
If things go wrong here, people don't get paid on time, contracts are delayed, or onboarding becomes messy. If things go right, everything just works, seamlessly.
  
  
You'll be the person who makes that happen.
  
  
**What You'll Do**
You'll own the day-to-day operations that keep our People function running smoothly and reliably.
  
  
**Own onboarding execution end-to-end**

* Make sure every new joiner is fully set up before day one, contracts ready, systems updated, no last-minute scrambling
* Coordinate closely with Talent Acquisition and HR Business Partners to ensure nothing falls through the cracks

**Ensure payroll runs smoothly and accurately**

* Work closely with Finance to ensure payroll is always correct and on time
* Catch errors before they become problems

**Manage contracts and government platforms**

* Prepare and upload contracts through government portals
* Keep all employee records clean, accurate, and up to date
* Ensure full compliance with local regulations

**Maintain clean and reliable systems**

* Keep internal trackers, HR systems, and documentation organized and always up to date
* Spot inconsistencies and fix them before they escalate

**Support the team as we scale**

* Help manage increasing hiring volume without compromising quality
* Be the reliable operator the team depends on when things get busy

**Who You Are**
This role is less about years of experience and more about how you work.
  
  
**You're extremely organized**
You naturally stay on top of multiple moving parts, deadlines, and details, nothing gets missed.
  
  
**You take ownership of outcomes**
You don't just complete tasks, you make sure the result is right. If something is off, you fix it.
  
  
**You communicate clearly and proactively**
You don't wait for problems to escalate. You keep stakeholders informed and aligned.
  
  
**You're reliable under pressure**
When things get busy (and they will), you stay calm and get things done.
  
  
**You're detail-obsessed**
You notice when something doesn't look right, whether it's a contract, a payroll number, or a system entry.
  
  
**You're easy to work with**
You'll work across teams daily, being approachable and collaborative matters.
  
  
**Requirements**
**What You'll Need**

* 1-2 years of experience in HR / People Operations / Administration
* Exposure to:

+ Contracts and onboarding
+ Payroll support
+ Employee documentation

* Strong written and verbal English communication
* Comfortable working with tools like Google Sheets and internal systems
* Saudi national (required)

Nice to have:
  
  

* Experience working with government portals or HR systems
* Familiarity with compliance or labor processes

**What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)**

* New hires are fully onboarded without delays or issues
* Payroll runs accurately and on time
* Contracts are prepared ahead of joining, not after
* Internal systems and trackers are clean and reliable
* You've built strong working relationships across People, Finance, and TA

**What The Hiring Process Will Look Like**

* Initial screening call with Talent Acquisition
* Interview with People team
* Final conversation with leadership

This role isn't about big ideas, it's about consistent, high-quality execution.
  
  
If you're someone who takes pride in getting the details right, keeping things organized, and making sure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes, you'll do very well here.

data.jd_text:
**About PulseMediaNL**
PulseMediaNL is a forward-thinking digital marketing agency delivering innovative, data-driven solutions for healthcare, medical, and wellness brands. We help our clients achieve sustainable growth through high-performance campaigns, strategic insights, and creative digital experiences.
  
  
As we continue to expand globally, we are seeking a
**Junior Front-End Developer (Remote)**
based in the
**MENA region**
to join our growing remote team. This role is ideal for a motivated developer eager to build modern user interfaces, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and grow technically in a fast-paced, healthcare-focused environment.
  
  
If you’re passionate about front-end development, modern web technologies, and crafting engaging digital experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Front-End Development
  
  

* Develop and maintain responsive, user-friendly interfaces for healthcare and medical clients
* Convert UI/UX designs into clean, reusable, and high-quality front-end code
* Support the creation of landing pages, websites, and marketing assets for digital campaigns

Collaboration
  
  

* Work closely with designers, marketers, and project managers to ensure accurate and seamless implementation
* Support SEO, CRO, and performance-focused front-end updates

Performance & Optimization
  
  

* Optimize websites for speed, performance, and cross-browser compatibility
* Ensure consistent responsiveness across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
* Follow best practices for accessibility and usability

CMS & Content Management
  
  

* Assist with maintaining and updating CMS-based websites (primarily WordPress)
* Implement content updates, page layouts, and templates as needed

Quality Assurance
  
  

* Identify and resolve front-end bugs and UI inconsistencies
* Test features across browsers and devices to ensure reliability

Continuous Learning
  
  

* Stay current with modern front-end technologies and best practices
* Participate in code reviews and learn from senior developers

**Experience**
Required Qualifications
  
  

* 0–2 years of front-end development experience (including internships, freelance, or personal projects)
* Hands-on experience with live websites or applications is a plus

Education
  
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Web Development, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience

Technical Skills
  
  

* Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
* Understanding of responsive and mobile-first design
* Familiarity with front-end frameworks (React, Vue, or similar) is a plus
* Experience with WordPress or other CMS platforms preferred
* Basic understanding of SEO-friendly front-end practices

Tools
  
  

* Experience with Git or other version control systems
* Familiarity with Figma, Adobe XD, or similar design tools
* Basic knowledge of performance optimization and cross-browser testing

Soft Skills
  
  

* Strong attention to detail and problem-solving abilities
* Clear communication skills and comfort working remotely
* Willingness to learn, accept feedback, and grow
* Good time management and ability to meet deadlines

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, or similar frameworks
* Basic knowledge of WCAG accessibility standards
* Exposure to healthcare, medical, or regulated industries
* Familiarity with JavaScript build tools or workflows
* Fluent in English; Arabic is a strong advantage

Why Join PulseMediaNL?
  
  
**Compensation & Benefits**

* Competitive salary based on experience and skills
* Paid time off and holidays (based on country of residence)

Professional Growth
  
  

* Mentorship from experienced developers and designers
* Clear growth path toward mid-level front-end or full-stack roles
* Exposure to real-world healthcare projects and global clients

Remote-First Culture
  
  

* Fully remote role within the MENA region
* Flexible working hours and strong work-life balance
* Collaborative, remote-friendly workflows

Culture & Impact
  
  

* Innovative, supportive, and quality-driven team
* Learning-focused environment that encourages growth
* Opportunity to contribute to meaningful healthcare and wellness solutions

How to Apply
  
  
If you’re a motivated Junior Front-End Developer (Remote) based in the MENA region and excited to grow your career in a healthcare-focused digital agency, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and portfolio (if available).
  
  
**PulseMediaNL is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and value diverse perspectives.**

data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub – a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 destinations.
  
  
**About The Role**
After showcasing our iconic cabin fashion on the global stage at Paris Fashion Week, we’re now offering you the opportunity to be a part of it. Ready to take flight with us? We’re searching for exceptional individuals to join our world-class Cabin Crew team.
  
  
As the face of Riyadh Air, our passengers will rely on you not only for a safe journey but for creating memorable moments that make them feel valued and cared for. We will provide comprehensive training to equip you with the skills needed to handle any situation confidently, always putting safety and customer care first.
  
  
Driven by a passion for service excellence and a commitment to safety, you will make a real difference in the experience of every passenger on board. Whether it's assisting with their needs or ensuring a smooth and safe journey, you’ll be at the forefront of ensuring the well-being of our guests.
  
  
Every day presents a new adventure, as you travel the world and represent Riyadh Air. And, of course, you’ll be part of a team that gets to wear our stylish, Paris-inspired cabin fashion—so you’ll look as amazing as you feel!
  
  
Are you ready to elevate your career and make a lasting impact? Join us and become part of a team that’s dedicated to safety, service, and the thrill of adventure.
  
  
**About You**
**What we’re looking for?**

* A natural communicator with a passion for providing top-tier service while keeping our passengers safe and sound throughout their journey.
* Someone who’s ready to wear their smile and bring that " Hafawa " hospitality magic while ensuring everyone feels safe and secure, no matter where the journey takes you.
* An adventurer at heart, team player, excited to be the face of Riyadh Air, take on new experiences and ready to embrace the thrill of travel all while making sure your passengers are in safe hands from takeoff to landing.

**Do you have what it takes to fly with us?**
✔
**Fluent in English?**
Great! Speak other languages? Even better! Communication is key when welcoming guests from around the world.
  
  
✔
**Height & Reach:**
At least 160 cm tall with an arm reach of 212 cm —just enough to reach those overhead bins and quickly access emergency equipment when needed. It’s all about keeping our guests safe while staying efficient and prepared!
  
  
✔
**Age requirement:**
You must be at least 21 years old to join our crew — because great adventures start at the right time!
  
  
✔
**Swimming skills:**
Safety first! Confidence in water is a must—you should be able to swim with a flotation device in case of an emergency.
  
  
✔
**Professional appearance:**
No visible tattoos or piercings in uniform—we take pride in a polished and professional look.
  
  
✔
**Visa & relocation:**
You must meet Saudi employment visa requirements and be open to relocating to Riyadh, your new home.
  
  
✔
**Education:**
A high school certificate or higher is required—because Knowledge and Personality go hand in hand.
  
  
✔
**Customer service experience:**
At least one year in hospitality or a customer-facing role— because a warm smile goes a long way! You’ll be the heart of the Riyadh Air experience.
  
  
If you’re ready to take your career to new heights with a team that champions
**safety, service, and adventure**
, this is your moment. Apply now, and let’s turn your dream job into reality—one flight at a time!
  
  
Click
**"Apply"**
to submit your application! Our Talent Acquisition team will be reviewing applications soon, and we can’t wait to connect with you.

data.jd_text:
Purpose of Job
  
  
Jobholders at this level are capable of operating with minimal supervision. They work within guidelines and procedures in order to prepare more complex, specialized or ad hoc reports to their related field. They undertake operational activities including performing complete tax audits on refundsâ requests including examination and desk audits on large accounts in order to identify non-compliance within applicable policies and procedures.
  
  
Job Responsibilities
  
  
Refund Planning
  
  

* Review and study refund policies to remain current on refund limit utilization, refund risk control authorizations and applicable margins and ensure adherence ZATCA’s rules, regulations, policies and procedures
* Develop and update assessment templates and audit tools in accordance with operational procedures and policies to facilitate customer request analysis and safeguard timely evaluation
* Keep abreast of the latest developments, news and updates by industry type and sector (business and insurance, telecommunication, consumer goods, etc.) to ensure awareness of new tax practices adopted by taxpayers and businesses to incorporate in assessments and audit reviews
* Maintain and update refunds’ manuals, eligibility criteria, legal requirements and supporting documents by taxpayer type, integrate in computer-aided audit tools to facilitate audit assessment and review

Refund Operations
  
  

* Consolidate, categorize and prioritize refunds’ requests and schedules, sort by tax/industry type and ensure dispatch to relevant audit teams for assessment and review
* Review refunds’ applications and requests, examine the validity of legal documents presented by taxpayers, and ensure completeness of supporting documents prior to case assessment and evaluation
* Gather needed data to perform desk audits activities, communicate with relevant stakeholders (account managers, taxpayers, banks, audit bureau, government entities, etc.) to obtain needed information and clarifications and communicate with legal function for contractual structures to safeguard legitimacy of applicants
* Research public news, articles, databases, shared channels, etc. to investigate and understand taxpayers’ business activity including structure, size, process, jurisdictions, etc.
* Study and assess taxpayers’ financial status, income statements, financial strength and capabilities, and revenue streams to compare with benchmarks and similar industries and decide on assessment approach (actual, estimated, reduced assessments)
* Inspect and investigate taxpayers’ declarations, pinpoint high-risk and speculative issues, detect non-compliant cases and communicate with internal stakeholders to avoid potential risks including tax evasion
* Consolidate legal and financial observations, study and evaluate against pre-approved eligibility criteria and refund requirements to recommend approval/ rejection decisions in line with applicable policies and procedures
* Manage the development of audit reports including tax assessments (actual / reduced / estimated assessments) to identify taxpayers’ refunds’ amount
* Develop lists of compliant taxpayers accepted refunds with related amounts, submit to internal committees to secure needed approvals for payments’ release/transfer
* Monitor taxpayer objections and appeals and ensure coordination with Legal Affairs or AMANA to resolve disputes and support in key testimonies by providing clarifications on final audit findings and results
* Maintain and update refund operations related systems and databases, ensure that all audit findings are administered and stored in a preserved manner in order to facilitate data exchange with internal stakeholders and other government agencies

Reporting and Support
  
  

* Draft refunds’ audit reports to highlight recommendations and conclusions along with relevant evidence, proofs and supporting documents and escalate for revision and verification

Job Details
  
  
Communication and Contacs
  
  
Education
  
  
Bachelor’s degree Business Administration or equivalent is required
  
  
**Experience**
A minimum of 4 years of relevant experience
  
  
Competencies
  
  
Negotiation and Influence - Developing
  
  
Collection Planning and Assessment - Developing
  
  
Collaboration and Communication - Developing
  
  
Professionalism - Developing
  
  
Fact Based Recommendations - Proficient
  
  
Results Oriented - Developing
  
  
Customer Focus - Developing
  
  
Quality Management - Developing
  
  
Collection Techniques - Proficient
  
  
Enablement of Change and Innovation - Developing

This is more than just a job! It’s an opportunity to be part of something larger than yourself. At Al-Qadsiah, you’ll play a key role in shaping our legacy, contributing to the nation’s sports vision, and making history every step of the way.

**OVERVIEW:**

Al Qadsiah Club is seeking a detail-oriented payroll officer who will be responsible for the day-to-day accounting operations related to payroll and employee-related benefits. This position will be responsible for providing payroll and benefit services by processing payroll and employee-related benefits, reimbursements and claims, maintaining accurate payroll accounts, answering payroll/benefit questions, maintaining employee benefit coverage information and personnel records.

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:**

* Prepares, analyzes and process payroll transactions on a timely manner.
* Prepares and/or analyzes periodic payroll reports, schedules, reconciliations, payroll related journal entries using established finance policies, procedures and guidelines on a timely manner.
* Prepares and/or reviews the accuracy of payroll related journal entries and performs account reconciliation and analysis while ensuring supporting documentation is accurate and in compliance with company policies.
* Evaluate and implement appropriate payroll policies and controls and payroll processing and system enhancements to increase efficiency.
* Prepare audit schedules and assists/coordinates audit of payroll and employee benefits.
* Coordinate payroll-related details with Human Resources department and other departments.
* Coordinate with HR on employee changes.
* Process bonuses and incentives for employees and players.
* Check employee payment documents related to leave balance, end-of-service benefits, employee advances and other entitlements in order to verify data / calculations against employee salaries, benefits, entitlement entries and process for payment execution.
* Preparing and submitting payroll reports to management, providing insights into various elements of payroll costs and allocation to cost centers.
* Record accruals for employee salaries and benefits including accrued vacation, accrued tickets, end of service benefits, bonuses and other entitlements.
* Reconcile payroll-related balance sheet accounts and resolve discrepancies to ensure accurate financial reporting.

Requirements
  
  

**EDUCATION, QUALIFICATION AND EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance.
* 5+ years payroll processing experience, including reconciliation of payroll-related accounts.

**PERSONAL SPECIFICATION – SKILLS & ATTRIBUTES**

* Knowledge of payroll systems and labor laws.
* Strong attention to detail and balanced with the speed at which information needs to be provided for effective decision making.
* High confidentiality, ethics and professionalism.

Benefits
  
  

**Why Join Al-Qadsiah?**

* **Be Part of the Legacy:**
  Join a club that’s redefining the future of Saudi sports, striving to lead the competition and set new standards of excellence.
* **Experience the Culture:**
  Thrive in an environment that values
  **quality, accountability, diversity, synergy, innovation, and ambition, while embracing harmony.**
  This is the Qadsiah Way.

data.jd_text:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Financial Analyst (Investment Banking) in Saudi Arabia.**
This is a high-impact opportunity for a detail-oriented financial professional to work on complex, high-value transactions across real estate and corporate finance. In this role, you will be deeply involved in financial modeling, valuation, and deal execution, supporting sophisticated investment decisions. Operating within a lean and fast-paced environment, you will collaborate closely with senior stakeholders and gain direct exposure to strategic transactions. The position requires strong analytical rigor, independence, and the ability to navigate intricate capital structures. You will play a key role in evaluating opportunities, structuring deals, and delivering actionable insights. This is an excellent opportunity for someone seeking hands-on experience in investment banking-style work with meaningful responsibility and growth potential.
  
  
Accountabilities
  
  
You will contribute directly to transaction execution and financial analysis, supporting complex investment decisions and deal structuring. Your responsibilities include:
  
  

* Building and maintaining advanced financial models, particularly for single-asset real estate investments.
* Analyzing asset performance, including cash flows, profit and loss statements, debt service coverage ratios, and key financial metrics.
* Structuring and modeling complex capital stacks, including senior debt, mezzanine financing, preferred equity, and waterfall distributions.
* Supporting a range of transactions such as acquisitions, refinancing, M&A deals, and corporate financing initiatives.
* Conducting sensitivity analyses and scenario modeling to assess risk and return profiles.
* Evaluating deal assumptions, identifying risks, and providing critical insights to improve investment decisions.
* Preparing internal investment memos, reports, and presentation materials for decision-making.
* Collaborating with senior stakeholders to ensure accurate execution and alignment with strategic objectives.

**Requirements**
The ideal candidate is analytically strong, detail-driven, and experienced in investment banking or similar transaction-focused environments. You bring both technical expertise and commercial insight. Key qualifications include:
  
  

* 2+ years of experience in investment banking, private equity, corporate finance, or transaction advisory.
* Strong hands-on experience in financial modeling, valuation, and deal underwriting.
* Proven ability to model real estate transactions and understand complex capital structures, including mezzanine and preferred equity.
* Solid understanding of financial statements, cash flow analysis, and key investment metrics.
* Strong analytical thinking with the ability to challenge assumptions and interpret complex data.
* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced, high-performance environment.
* Availability to work during Central European Time (CET) business hours.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills for delivering insights clearly.
* CFA (completed or in progress) or similar credentials are a plus.
* Experience in real estate transactions or working with high-net-worth clients is advantageous.

**Benefits**

* Fully remote work setup with flexible long-term growth potential.
* Opportunity to work on high-value, complex transactions across real estate and corporate finance.
* Direct exposure to senior leadership and strategic decision-making processes.
* Hands-on role with significant responsibility and ownership from day one.
* Competitive hourly compensation with potential for increase based on performance and experience.
* Dynamic and intellectually stimulating work environment with strong learning opportunities.

**How Jobgether Works**
We use an
**AI-powered matching process**
to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
  
  
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
  
  
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
  
  
**Data Privacy Notice:**
By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
  
  
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Job Description:

1. Perform business analysis tasks on the most complex projects, collaborate with stakeholders to explore all possible solution angles through feasibility studies,
2. Recommend and participate in the design and implementation of standards, tools and methodologies, share best practice, lessons learned and constantly update understanding based on changing technologies, practice, and knowledge.
3. Assist in preparation of Forecasts, Budget, Strategic reviews and project feasibility statements
4. Assist in introducing flashcards, dashboards and monthly performance reports
5. Maintain cash flow planning and ensure the availability of accurate data to Management
6. Ensure Budget controls over the actuals.
7. Assist in statutory & internal auditing
8. Participate on ad-hoc tasks when needed, and take the lead on any clearing-related functional requirements.
9. Perform daily P&L monitoring for ABC Bahrain including analysis of variance in coordination with appropriate persons in operations, business units and Group Finance
10. Assist in preparation, consolidation and monitoring of MIS reports of Financial Performance (Group, WB and Treasury) on a monthly basis
11. Assist in analyzing performance to ensure integrity of the reports and accuracy of the data. Highlight critical issues and escalate for resolution on a timely basis
12. Assist in data collation from core systems, external systems and preparation of adhoc. analysis of financial information as required

Not less than 3 years of experience in accounting / finance analyst.

Candidates to be available in Bahrain and ready to transfer.

**Job Title:**
Executive Secretary to the CEO

**Job Summary:**

We are seeking a highly organized and professional Executive Secretary to support the CEO. The ideal candidate will have prior experience in the Electricity or Oil & Gas sector, excellent communication skills, and a strong command of the English language. This role requires discretion, efficiency, and the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Manage and maintain the CEO’s calendar, including scheduling meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.
* Organize and coordinate meetings, including preparing agendas, presentations, and reports.
* Handle internal and external communications on behalf of the CEO.
* Draft and prepare official correspondence, reports, and documents in English (Arabic is a plus).
* Follow up on directives and ensure timely execution of assigned tasks.
* Maintain strict confidentiality of sensitive information.
* Coordinate with different departments, particularly in Electricity or Oil & Gas-related projects.
* Organize and maintain filing systems, records, and documentation.
* Provide administrative support and perform additional duties as assigned by the CEO.

**Qualifications & Requirements:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration or a related field.
* Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in a similar Executive Secretary or administrative role.
* Prior experience or strong familiarity with the Electricity or Oil & Gas industry.
* Excellent command of the English language (written and spoken).
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
* Strong organizational, time management, and multitasking skills.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
* Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
* High level of professionalism, integrity, and confidentiality.

**Preferred Skills:**

* Bilingual (Arabic & English).
* Experience working with senior executives or C-level management.

data.title: Buyer
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary & Purpose:**

The Merchandise Officer is responsible for leading, strategizing, monitoring, and reporting on category performance, including sales, margins, stock holding, and market share. This role operates under the guidance of the Category Head or Merchandising Manager.

**Key Perf
data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary & Purpose:**

The Merchandise Officer is responsible for leading, strategizing, monitoring, and reporting on category performance, including sales, margins, stock holding, and market share. This role operates under the guidance of the Category Head or Merchandising Manager.

**Key Performance Areas (KPAs) & Principal Accountabilities:**

**1 \*\*Sales and Margin Management\*\***

• Develop annual budgets and forecasts for assigned categories.

• Monitor sales performance against targets and adjust strategies as needed.

• Implement promotional strategies to drive sales and enhance margins.

**2 \*\*Supplier Negotiations\*\* -**

• Lead discussions on contract terms to optimize pricing and margins.

• Establish and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) for supplier performance.

• Cultivate strong relationships with suppliers for better collaboration.

**3 \*\*Inventory Management\*\***
-

• Maintain optimal inventory levels across all stores to meet demand.

• Utilize open-to-buy (OTB) management to control working capital.

• Conduct regular stock assessments to identify slow-moving or aging products.

**4 \*\*Market Awareness and Competitor Analysis\*\* -**

• Analyze market trends to identify new product opportunities. –

• Monitor competitor offerings and pricing strategies for strategic insights.

• Adapt category strategies in response to market changes and competitor actions.

**5 \*\*Cross-Departmental Collaboration\*\* -**

• Work closely with store teams for accurate inventory and sales reporting.

• Collaborate with marketing to develop effective promotional campaigns.

• Ensure coordination with finance for timely reconciliations and reporting.

**6 \*\*Promotional Planning and Execution\*\* -**

• Develop weekly and monthly promotional plans for the category.

• Work with marketing to execute successful in-store promotions.

• Analyze promotional performance and adjust future strategies based on outcomes.

**7 \*\*Training and Development\*\* -**

• Identify training needs for staff regarding new products.

• Coordinate with suppliers to provide comprehensive training sessions.

• Monitor training effectiveness and make adjustments as needed to improve team performance.

**Qualifications**

* Experience (Yrs & Field) 3 years + in Category Management in Retail Industry preferably in Electronics industry
* Educational Qualification Post Graduate
* Professional Certifications MBA in Sales and Marketing is Desirable
* Skills & Abilities:

Strong planning and organizing skills, analytical and problem-solving skills, effective communication, negotiation, and presentation abilities.

As part of our People & Culture vision, we foster an environment built on respect, fairness, and inclusion. We celebrate the different perspectives, backgrounds, and experiences that make us more innovative and empower every team member to learn, grow, and make an impact.

Our commitment is to empower every individual to reach their full potential and contribute to our mission of improving lives through innovation and excellence in the pharmaceutical industry. Together, we ensure a workplace where everyone feels respected, heard, and inspired to make a difference.

**Position Title:**

Manufacturing Supervisor

**Strategic Responsibilities**

• Oversee team operations, ensuring alignment with strategic objectives

• Manage and delegate tasks effectively, monitoring progress

• Foster team collaboration and communication

• Develop and train team members

• Report on team achievements and challenges to higher management

**Functional Responsibilities**

• Supervise daily manufacturing operations to ensure adherence to GMP standards and production schedules.

• Monitor equipment performance and troubleshoot operational issues to minimize downtime and production delays.

• Coordinate production activities with maintenance and quality teams to ensure uninterrupted manufacturing processes.

• Inspect production outputs to verify compliance with quality specifications and approved manufacturing procedures

• Analyze production data to identify efficiency gaps and implement process improvement initiatives.

• Maintain accurate production records and documentation to support regulatory compliance and audit requirements.

• Enforce health and safety procedures to ensure a safe working environment across manufacturing areas.

• Support training of production staff on operational procedures, GMP requirements, and equipment handling.

**Job Requirements:**

**Required**

* Bachelor’s Degree in relevant field.
* Minimum 5 years of experience.

**Preferred**

* Master’s Degree.
* Professional Certificate in relevant field.

**Language**

**Required**

English - proficient.

**Preferred**

Arabic - proficient.
